summaries.scene: 你和朋友们商量周末自驾游。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 2/8: Rent a Car
summaries.scene: 你在租车公司取车。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 3/8: Gas Stop
summaries.scene: 高速公路上你们停车加油。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 4/8: Scenic Stop
summaries.scene: 你们在观景台停车拍照。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 5/8: Check In at Cabin
summaries.scene: 傍晚你们到达民宿办理入住。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 6/8: Local Restaurant
summaries.scene: 晚上你们在镇上小馆吃饭。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 7/8: Hiking Trail
summaries.scene: 周日早上你们向游客中心问路线。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Chain 8/8: Drive Home
summaries.scene: 周日下午你们还车踏上归途。（对话链：旅游）

summaries.title: Hotel Check-in
summaries.scene: 你到达酒店前台办理入住。

summaries.title: Asking for Tourist Info
summaries.scene: 你在旅游咨询中心询问景点信息。

summaries.title: Taking a Taxi
summaries.scene: 你在路边拦出租车去机场。

summaries.title: Buying Souvenirs
summaries.scene: 你在旅游景点的小店买纪念品。

summaries.title: Taking Photos
summaries.scene: 你在著名景点，想请路人帮忙拍照。

summaries.title: Currency Exchange
summaries.scene: 你到达国外后在机场兑换当地货币。

summaries.title: Hotel Checkout
summaries.scene: 你准备离开酒店办理退房。

summaries.title: Tour Group
summaries.scene: 你参加一日游，导游集合讲解。

summaries.title: Cruise Embarkation
summaries.scene: 你在港口办理邮轮登船手续。

summaries.title: Road Trip Rest Stop
summaries.scene: 你自驾公路旅行，在休息站停一下。

summaries.title: Returning Rental Car
summaries.scene: 你还租车，工作人员检查车况。

summaries.title: Lost Luggage
summaries.scene: 你到达后行李没出来，去柜台查询。

summaries.title: Registering to Vote
summaries.scene: 你在 DMV 顺便办理选民登记。

summaries.title: At the Polling Place
summaries.scene: 选举日你去投票站投票。

summaries.title: Mail-in Ballot
summaries.scene: 你选择邮寄投票，向工作人员咨询流程。

summaries.title: Asking About a Ballot Issue
summaries.scene: 你对选票上的地方提案不清楚，向朋友请教。

summaries.title: Chain 1/8: Sign Up for Membership
summaries.scene: 你第一次去 Costco，在入口办会员。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 2/8: Get a Cart
summaries.scene: 你进去发现需要大推车，问员工在哪。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 3/8: Food Samples
summaries.scene: 你在仓储超市试吃样品。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 4/8: Bulk Household Items
summaries.scene: 你在买大包装日用品，向员工问路。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 5/8: Electronics Section
summaries.scene: 你看中一台电视，问保修政策。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 6/8: Checkout Line
summaries.scene: 结账队伍很长，你和旁边顾客聊天。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 7/8: Gas Station
summaries.scene: 你在 Costco 加油站加油。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Chain 8/8: Load the Car
summaries.scene: 你把大包装商品装进后备箱，室友来帮忙。（对话链：仓储超市）

summaries.title: Costco Membership
summaries.scene: 你第一次去 Costco，在入口办会员。

summaries.title: Sampling Food
summaries.scene: 你在仓储超市试吃样品并购买。

summaries.title: Bulk Shopping
summaries.scene: 你在买大包装日用品，向员工问路。

summaries.title: Gas Station at Costco
summaries.scene: 你在 Costco 加油站加油，排队较长。

summaries.title: Return at Warehouse
summaries.scene: 你在 Costco 退一个用了一周的电器。

summaries.title: At the Ceremony
summaries.scene: 你作为宾客参加户外婚礼仪式。

summaries.title: Reception Seating
summaries.scene: 婚宴开始，你在签到台找座位。

summaries.title: Wedding Toast
summaries.scene: 朋友请你帮忙在婚宴上简短祝酒。

summaries.title: Wedding Dance Floor
summaries.scene: 婚宴上有人邀请你跳舞。

summaries.title: Leaving the Reception
summaries.scene: 婚宴结束，你跟新人告别。

dlg-chain-acad-01.title: Chain 1/8: Conference Registration
dlg-chain-acad-01.scene: 你参加一场国际学术会议，在签到处登记并领取材料。（对话链：学术英语实战，适合第四册学习者）

turns.cn: 早上好，请出示您的确认邮件或二维码。
turns.en: Good morning. May I see your confirmation email or QR code?

turns.cn: 当然，我是张伟，注册的是分会场 B。
找到了。需要名牌吗？发音要标拼音还是英文？
turns.en: Found it. Would you like a name badge? Phonetic or English spelling?

turns.cn: 英文拼写就好，谢谢。主旨演讲在哪个厅？
主会场在三楼，您的分会场在二楼 201。
turns.en: The keynote is on the third floor. Your session is Room 201 on the second floor.

dlg-chain-acad-02.title: Chain 2/8: Question After the Lecture
dlg-chain-acad-02.scene: 主旨演讲结束，你举手向演讲者提问。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 感谢您精彩的演讲。我有一个关于方法论的问题。

turns.en: Please go ahead.

turns.cn: 您如何排除样本选择带来的偏差？
我们采用了分层随机抽样，并在附录中说明了局限。
turns.en: We used stratified random sampling. The limitations are noted in the appendix.

turns.cn: 这些发现是否可推广到其他文化背景？
谨慎推广。我们正在跨文化复制研究。
turns.en: Only with caution. We're replicating the study cross-culturally now.

dlg-chain-acad-03.title: Chain 3/8: Meeting Your Supervisor
dlg-chain-acad-03.scene: 你约导师讨论论文初稿的修改意见。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 初稿我读过了。论点清晰，但文献综述偏薄。
turns.en: I've read your draft. The argument is clear, but the literature review is thin.

turns.cn: 我会补充近五年的核心研究，尤其是欧洲那边的成果。
第三章的数据分析需要更严谨。你考虑过替代模型吗？
turns.en: The analysis in Chapter Three needs to be tighter. Have you considered alternative models?

turns.cn: 我打算用稳健性检验比较两种规格。
好。两周后带修订提纲再来。
turns.en: Good. Come back in two weeks with a revised outline.

turns.cn: 谢谢您的指导，我会按时提交。

dlg-chain-acad-04.title: Chain 4/8: Seminar Presentation
dlg-chain-acad-04.scene: 研究生研讨会上，你简要汇报研究进展。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 张伟，您有十五分钟，包括提问。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, you have fifteen minutes, including questions.

turns.cn: 谢谢。我今天汇报的主题是媒体对公众舆论的影响。
首先概述理论框架，然后展示初步数据。
请控制时间，十点前留两分钟讨论。
turns.en: Please watch the time. Leave two minutes for discussion before ten.
Please begin.

dlg-chain-acad-05.title: Chain 5/8: Peer Review Feedback
dlg-chain-acad-05.scene: 同事请你审阅一篇投稿，你给出书面意见后当面讨论。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 您读完手稿了吗？审稿意见对我们很有帮助。
turns.en: Have you finished the manuscript? Your review comments were very helpful.

turns.cn: 总体扎实，但结论部分超出了证据支持的范围。
您建议我们弱化措辞还是补实验？
turns.en: Would you suggest softening the claims or adding experiments?

turns.cn: 两者都做更稳妥：收窄结论，并增加一组对照。
截止日期很紧，您觉得修订需要多久？
turns.en: The deadline is tight. How long do you think revision will take?

turns.cn: 若数据现成，一周可完成主要修改。

dlg-chain-acad-06.title: Chain 6/8: Library Research Help
dlg-chain-acad-06.scene: 你在大学图书馆请学科馆员帮忙检索数据库。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 您好，我在找关于民主制度演变的英文期刊文章。
您需要同行评审的论文还是也包括专著章节？
turns.en: Do you need peer-reviewed articles only, or book chapters as well?

turns.cn: 主要是近十年内的同行评审论文。
可以用 JSTOR 和 Web of Science。需要我演示高级检索吗？
turns.en: Try JSTOR and Web of Science. Shall I show you advanced search?

turns.cn: 麻烦演示一下如何用布尔运算符组合关键词。
当然，请跟我到参考咨询台。
turns.en: Certainly. Please follow me to the reference desk.

dlg-chain-acad-07.title: Chain 7/8: Academic Debate
dlg-chain-acad-07.scene: 课堂上就「技术是否必然造福人类」展开辩论，你陈述反对观点。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 反方两分钟陈述，请张伟开始。
turns.en: Two minutes for the opposition. Zhang Wei, please begin.

turns.cn: 技术本身中立，但利益分配决定它造福谁。
历史表明，没有监管的创新往往加剧不平等。
时间到。正方可以回应了。
turns.en: Time's up. The proposition may respond.

turns.cn: 我稍后会在反驳环节回应监管成本的问题。

turns.en: Very well. Please be seated.

dlg-chain-acad-08.title: Chain 8/8: Networking at the Reception
dlg-chain-acad-08.scene: 会议茶歇时，你与一位外国学者寒暄并交换研究方向。（对话链：学术英语实战）

turns.cn: 您对今天上午的分议题有什么看法？
turns.en: What did you think of this morning's panel?

turns.cn: 很有启发，尤其是关于语言习得的那场。

turns.en: I work on second-language writing. And you?

turns.cn: 我关注媒体话语与公众认知，也许有合作空间。
乐意保持联系。这是我的名片。
turns.en: I'd be glad to stay in touch. Here's my card.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我也发您我的邮箱。

dlg-chain-air-01.title: Chain 1/8: Check-in Counter
dlg-chain-air-01.scene: 你到达机场，准备办理登机手续。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.cn: 您好，请出示护照和机票。
turns.en: Good morning. May I see your passport and ticket, please?

turns.cn: 好的，12A。您有行李要托运吗？
turns.en: Sure, that's 12A. Do you have any bags to check?

turns.cn: 请把行李放到传送带上。
turns.en: Please place your bag on the conveyor belt.

turns.cn: 这是您的登机牌，登机口 B7。
turns.en: Here's your boarding pass. Your gate is B7.

turns.cn: 下午两点三十分，祝您旅途愉快！
turns.en: Boarding begins at 2:30 PM. Have a great flight!

dlg-chain-air-02.title: Chain 2/8: Security Check
dlg-chain-air-02.scene: 你正在通过机场安检。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.cn: 请把笔记本电脑从包里拿出来。
turns.en: Please take your laptop out of your bag.
Yes, and please remove your jacket as well.

turns.cn: 液体不能过安检，请倒掉或扔掉。
turns.en: Liquids aren't allowed. Please empty it or throw it away.
Please walk through the scanner.
You're all set. Have a nice trip.

dlg-chain-air-03.title: Chain 3/8: Find Your Gate
dlg-chain-air-03.scene: 你在机场转机，找不到登机口 B7。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.cn: 打扰一下，去 B7 登机口怎么走？
坐扶梯上到二楼，然后左转。
turns.en: Take the escalator up to the second floor, then turn left.

turns.cn: 大约十分钟，你的航班几点？
turns.en: About ten minutes. What time is your flight?

turns.cn: 三点起飞，现在两点半了。

turns.en: You'll make it. Just walk briskly.

dlg-chain-air-04.title: Chain 4/8: Duty-Free Shopping
dlg-chain-air-04.scene: 路过免税店，你想买巧克力当礼物。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.en: Can I help you?

turns.cn: 这盒巧克力可以带上飞机吗？
可以，已安检区域买的都能带。
turns.en: Yes. Anything bought past security is fine.
Twelve dollars. Card?

dlg-chain-air-05.title: Chain 5/8: Gate Change
dlg-chain-air-05.scene: 登机口屏幕显示 B7 改到 C12。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.cn: 您好，B7 改到 C12，请尽快过去。
turns.en: Hi, gate B7 moved to C12. Please head there soon.

turns.cn: C12 远吗？还来得及登机吗？
走路八分钟，两点四十五开始登机。
turns.en: Eight minutes on foot. Boarding starts at two forty-five.
Have a good flight.

dlg-chain-air-06.title: Chain 6/8: Flight Delay
dlg-chain-air-06.scene: 到了登机口，广播说航班延误一小时。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.cn: 各位旅客，本次航班延误一小时，原因天气。
turns.en: Ladies and gentlemen, the flight is delayed one hour due to weather.

turns.cn: 会错过转机吗？我在芝加哥转机。
我查一下……应该来得及，我们会协调。
turns.en: Let me check. You should make it. We'll coordinate.

turns.cn: 能发个延误证明吗？公司报销用。

turns.en: Fill out a form at the desk. We'll stamp it.

dlg-chain-air-07.title: Chain 7/8: Boarding
dlg-chain-air-07.scene: 开始登机，你在登机口排队。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.en: Boarding pass and passport, please.

turns.cn: 随身行李只能一件，这个也要托运吗？
turns.en: One carry-on only. Does this need to be checked too?
Okay. Have a pleasant flight.

dlg-chain-air-08.title: Chain 8/8: Baggage Claim
dlg-chain-air-08.scene: 飞机落地，你到行李转盘取托运的箱子。（对话链：机场乘机）

chain.title: Airport Trip from Check-in to Landing

turns.cn: 我的行李还没出来，正常吗？
国际航班有时慢，再等五分钟。
turns.en: International flights can be slow. Give it five more minutes.
Please match the baggage tag number.
Welcome. Have a great stay.

dlg-chain-lay-01.title: Chain 1/8: Flight Delay
dlg-chain-lay-01.scene: 机场广播你的航班延误，你问柜台。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 您好，航班延误两小时，机械检修。
turns.en: Hello. Your flight is delayed two hours for maintenance.

turns.cn: 会错过转机吗？下一班去芝加哥。
我查一下……来得及，登机口会改。
turns.en: Let me check… You should make it. Gate will change.
Here you go. New gate C twelve.

dlg-chain-lay-02.title: Chain 2/8: Missed Connection
dlg-chain-lay-02.scene: 你错过了转机，在柜台改签。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 刚落地，上一班延误，赶不上芝加哥那班了。
抱歉，最近一班今晚八点，要吗？
turns.en: Sorry. The next one is eight PM tonight. Want it?

turns.cn: 延误超过三小时，给您十五块餐券。
turns.en: Delay over three hours. Here's a fifteen-dollar meal voucher.
Yes. Pick them up in Chicago.

dlg-chain-lay-03.title: Chain 3/8: Airport Lounge
dlg-chain-lay-03.scene: 你有信用卡权益，进机场休息室。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 请出示登机牌和会员卡。
turns.en: Boarding pass and membership card, please.

turns.cn: 欢迎，淋浴间在那边，餐食自助。
turns.en: Welcome. Showers are over there. Food is self-serve.
On the card at the table. It's free.

dlg-chain-lay-04.title: Chain 4/8: Gate Change
dlg-chain-lay-04.scene: 登机口临时变更，你向工作人员确认。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 去丹佛的航班改登机口了吗？App 显示 B7。
改到 B15 了，走过去十分钟。
turns.en: Moved to B fifteen. Ten-minute walk.
No. Still three twenty.

dlg-chain-lay-05.title: Chain 5/8: Duty Free Shopping
dlg-chain-lay-05.scene: 转机间隙你在免税店买礼物。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 最后登机前三十分钟结账哦。
turns.en: Please check out thirty minutes before boarding.

turns.cn: 这盒巧克力免税吗？去国内。
国内航班含税价，国际才免税。
turns.en: Domestic flights pay tax. Duty-free is international only.
Gift bag?

dlg-chain-lay-06.title: Chain 6/8: Security Again
dlg-chain-lay-06.scene: 国内转机需要重新安检。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 笔记本电脑单独放筐，液体拿出来。
turns.en: Laptop in its own bin. Liquids out, please.

turns.cn: 过安检不能带水，那边有过滤饮水。
turns.en: No liquids through security. Filtered water over there.
You're clear.

dlg-chain-lay-07.title: Chain 7/8: Board Connecting Flight
dlg-chain-lay-07.scene: 你开始登转机航班。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 登机牌和 ID 看一下。
turns.en: Boarding pass and ID, please.

turns.cn: 对，飞机小，可能换座位，上机问空姐。
turns.en: Yes. Smaller aircraft—seat might change. Ask the flight attendant.

turns.cn: 早登机够，晚了可能要托运。
turns.en: If you're early, yes. Late boarders may need to gate-check.

dlg-chain-lay-08.title: Chain 8/8: Arrive at Destination
dlg-chain-lay-08.scene: 转机后你终于抵达芝加哥，取行李。（对话链：机场）

turns.cn: 行李还没出来，正常吗？转机过来的。
转机行李稍慢，您的航班在这转盘。
turns.en: Connected bags take a bit longer. Your flight is on this carousel.

turns.cn: 出口左转打车，祝您愉快。
turns.en: Taxis are left out the exit. Have a good stay.

dlg-air-01.title: Check-in Counter
dlg-air-01.scene: 你到达机场，准备办理登机手续。

turns.cn: 您好，请出示护照和机票。
turns.en: Good morning. May I see your passport and ticket, please?

turns.cn: 好的，12A。您有行李要托运吗？
turns.en: Sure, that's 12A. Do you have any bags to check?

turns.cn: 请把行李放到传送带上。
turns.en: Please place your bag on the conveyor belt.

turns.cn: 这是您的登机牌，登机口是B7。
turns.en: Here's your boarding pass. Your gate is B7.

turns.cn: 下午两点三十分，祝您旅途愉快！
turns.en: Boarding begins at 2:30 PM. Have a great flight!

turns.cn: 请把笔记本电脑从包里拿出来。
turns.en: Please take your laptop out of your bag.
Yes, and please remove your jacket as well.

turns.cn: 液体不能过安检，请倒掉或扔掉。
turns.en: Liquids aren't allowed. Please empty it or throw it away.
Please walk through the scanner.
You're all set. Have a nice trip.

dlg-air-03.title: Asking for Directions
dlg-air-03.scene: 你在机场转机，找不到登机口。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，去C12登机口怎么走？
坐扶梯上到二楼，然后左转。
turns.en: Take the escalator up to the second floor, then turn left.

turns.cn: 大约十分钟，你的航班几点？
turns.en: About ten minutes. What time is your flight?

turns.cn: 三点起飞，现在两点半了。

turns.en: Then you'd better hurry!

dlg-air-04.title: Delayed Flight
dlg-air-04.scene: 你的航班延误了，去柜台咨询。

turns.cn: 请问，341航班为什么延误了？
因为天气原因，预计延误两小时。
turns.en: Due to weather, it's expected to be about two hours late.

turns.cn: 我会错过转机，能改签吗？

turns.en: Sure, let me look for the next available flight.

turns.cn: 今晚八点有一班，要换吗？
turns.en: There's one at eight tonight. Would you like that?

turns.cn: 好的，麻烦您了。有餐券吗？
有的，这是您的改签登机牌和十五美元餐券。
turns.en: Yes. Here's your new boarding pass and a fifteen-dollar meal voucher.

dlg-air-05.title: Lost Luggage
dlg-air-05.scene: 到达后发现自己的行李箱没有出来。

turns.cn: 你好，我的行李没有出来。
请出示您的行李票和登机牌。
turns.en: May I see your baggage claim tag and boarding pass?

turns.cn: 在这里。是一个黑色的拉杆箱。
我查一下系统……您的行李还在出发站。
turns.en: Let me check the system. Your bag is still at the departure airport.

turns.cn: 明天下午前会送到您登记的地址。
turns.en: It should arrive at your address by tomorrow afternoon.

turns.cn: 好的，这是我的酒店地址和电话。

dlg-air-06.title: Flight Delay
dlg-air-06.scene: 登机口广播航班延误，你向地勤询问改签。

turns.cn: 各位旅客，本次航班延误两小时。
turns.en: Attention passengers, this flight is delayed two hours.

turns.cn: 我会错过转机，能改签到更早的航班吗？
请出示登机牌，我查一下可选航班。
turns.en: May I see your boarding pass? I'll check available flights.

turns.cn: 如果今天走不了，酒店谁负责？
航司原因延误，我们可以安排住宿券。
turns.en: For airline-caused delays, we can issue a hotel voucher.

turns.cn: 不用，行李会直挂，新登机口稍后广播。
turns.en: No, bags stay checked through. The new gate will be announced.

dlg-air-07.title: Airport Lounge
dlg-air-07.scene: 你用信用卡权益进机场贵宾室。

turns.cn: 您好，请出示登机牌和信用卡。
turns.en: Hello. Boarding pass and credit card, please.

turns.cn: 可以，一位客人，淋浴需要预约。
turns.en: You're all set. One guest. Showers are by appointment.
Until nine PM. Drinks all day.
It's on the card at the table. Enjoy your stay.

dlg-amu-01.title: Theme Park Tickets
dlg-amu-01.scene: 你在主题乐园门口买票入园。

turns.en: One-day or two-day ticket?

turns.cn: 单日，两位成人一位儿童。
儿童多高？一米二以下免费。
turns.en: How tall is the child? Under four feet rides free.

turns.cn: 门口量一下，可能按儿童价。
turns.en: We'll measure at the gate. Might qualify for child pricing.

turns.cn: 入园后左手边游客中心。
turns.en: Guest services on your left after you enter.

dlg-amu-02.title: Waiting in Line
dlg-amu-02.scene: 热门过山车排队两小时，工作人员说明情况。

turns.cn: 目前等待约一百二十分钟。
turns.en: The wait is about a hundred twenty minutes right now.

turns.cn: 对，或者下午四点后人少一些。
turns.en: Yes, or come back after four when it's shorter.

turns.cn: 小孩身高够吗？一米三五。

turns.en: Yes. There's a height check at the entrance.

turns.cn: 免费储物柜在入口左边。
turns.en: Free lockers on the left at the entrance.

dlg-amu-03.title: Lost Child
dlg-amu-03.scene: 孩子在乐园走散了，你去客服中心求助。

turns.cn: 我孩子走丢了，七岁，穿蓝T恤。
别慌，请描述长相和名字。
turns.en: Stay calm. Describe him and his name.

turns.cn: 叫小明，黑色短发，戴眼镜。
我们广播了，失散儿童中心在这边。
turns.en: We've announced it. Lost children center is this way.

turns.cn: 找到了，您儿子在接待处。
turns.en: We found him. Your son is at the desk.

dlg-amu-04.title: Water Park
dlg-amu-04.scene: 你在水上乐园租储物柜和浮圈。

turns.cn: 储物柜一天十二，押金二十。
turns.en: Lockers are twelve for the day, twenty deposit.

turns.cn: 浅水区免费，漂流河要租。
turns.en: Free in the shallow pool. Lazy river requires rental.
Yes, but no glass bottles.
Six PM. Get in line before then.
Pumping yourself or full service?
Please swipe your card or pay inside first.
Yes, but don't top it off too much.
Behind the store. Ask for the key at the counter.

dlg-auto-02.title: Parking Ticket
dlg-auto-02.scene: 你发现车窗上贴了停车罚单。

turns.en: What's wrong? You look upset.

turns.cn: 收到一张停车罚单，七十五块。

turns.en: Were you parked in the wrong spot?

turns.cn: 咪表过期了，就差五分钟。

turns.en: You could try disputing it online.

turns.cn: 十五天内交还能减免吗？
早点交通常能少罚一点。
turns.en: Paying early usually reduces the fine a bit.

turns.cn: 常规保养还是只换机油？
turns.en: Full service or just an oil change?

turns.cn: 换机油和滤芯，检查一下轮胎。
大概三十分钟，请在休息室等。
turns.en: About thirty minutes. Please wait in the lounge.

turns.cn: 上次是一万英里前换的。
机油颜色偏黑，该换了。前胎磨损均匀。
turns.en: The oil is pretty dark. Time for a change. Front tires look even.
Forty-nine ninety, labor included.

dlg-auto-04.title: Asking for a Ride
dlg-auto-04.scene: 你的车坏了，请同事搭车回家。

turns.cn: 不好意思，今天能搭你的车吗？我车抛锚了。

turns.en: Sure. Where do you live?
Yeah, I'm off at six.
Don't worry about it.
Hello. Do you have a reservation?
Driver's license and credit card, please.

turns.cn: 您的信用卡若含租车险可以不买的。
turns.en: If your credit card covers rentals, you can skip it.

turns.cn: 加满油再还是预付油费？

turns.en: Returning full is usually cheaper.

dlg-auto-06.title: Roadside Assistance
dlg-auto-06.scene: 你车在高速上爆胎，打道路救援电话。

turns.cn: 道路救援，请说车牌和位置。
turns.en: Roadside assistance. License plate and location, please.

turns.cn: ABC1234，在95号公路南向，刚过42出口。
会员姓名？爆胎还是抛锚？
turns.en: Member name? Flat tire or breakdown?

turns.cn: 拖车约四十分钟到，请靠边双闪。
turns.en: A truck should arrive in about forty minutes. Pull over with hazards on.

turns.cn: 离车道远的话可以，注意来车。
turns.en: If you're well off the lane, yes. Watch for traffic.

dlg-bak-01.title: Morning Pastries
dlg-bak-01.scene: 你在社区面包店买早餐。

turns.cn: 早上好！今天可颂刚出炉。
turns.en: Good morning! Croissants just came out of the oven.

turns.cn: 两个可颂、一杯拿铁带走。
要加热吗？蓝莓马芬也新鲜。
turns.en: Want them warmed? Blueberry muffins are fresh too.
Twelve fifty total.
Yes. Buy ten, get one loaf free.

dlg-bak-02.title: Custom Birthday Cake
dlg-bak-02.scene: 你在面包店订制孩子生日蛋糕。

turns.en: What size? How many people?

turns.cn: 八寸，十二个人，巧克力味。

turns.en: Any message on top? Pick up Saturday afternoon?

turns.cn: 写 Happy 8th Birthday Lily，两点取。
水果夹心还是奶油？定金二十。
turns.en: Fruit filling or buttercream? Twenty-dollar deposit.
We'll text a photo when it's done.

dlg-bak-03.title: Gluten-Free Options
dlg-bak-03.scene: 你对麸质过敏，在面包店询问选项。

turns.cn: 有无麸质的面包？我对小麦过敏。
有，单独烤箱烤，在冷柜那边。
turns.en: Yes, baked in a separate oven. They're in the cooler.

turns.cn: 会跟普通面包交叉污染吗？
切面包用不同刀和板，员工会说明。
turns.en: Different knives and boards. Staff can walk you through it.

turns.cn: 我拿一条酸面包和两个布朗尼。
布朗尼也无麸质，一共十六。
turns.en: Brownies are gluten-free too. Sixteen total.

dlg-bak-04.title: Bread Slicing
dlg-bak-04.scene: 你买一条刚出炉的乡村面包。

turns.en: This loaf is still warm. Want it sliced?

turns.cn: 法棍下午三点出炉，要预留吗？
turns.en: Baguettes come out at three PM. Should I set one aside?
Paper bag or canvas tote?
The country loaf is seven fifty.

dlg-chain-bank-01.title: Chain 1/8: Open an Account
dlg-chain-bank-01.scene: 你刚到美国，去银行开支票账户。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 您好，今天需要什么服务？
turns.en: Hello. How can I help you today?

turns.cn: 请出示护照和地址证明。
turns.en: I'll need your passport and proof of address.

turns.cn: 这是我的租房合同，可以吗？
可以。最低存款二十五美元。
turns.en: Yes. The minimum deposit is twenty-five dollars.
Student accounts have no monthly fee.

dlg-chain-bank-02.title: Chain 2/8: Deposit a Check
dlg-chain-bank-02.scene: 开户后，你要存入第一笔工资支票。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.en: Hi. What can I do for you?
Please endorse the back. Account number here.

turns.cn: 一两个工作日，手机会通知。
turns.en: One or two business days. You'll get an app alert.

dlg-chain-bank-03.title: Chain 3/8: ATM Problem
dlg-chain-bank-03.scene: 几天后，你的卡被门口 ATM 吞了。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 你好，我的卡卡在 ATM 里了。

turns.en: Which machine? When did it happen?

turns.cn: 门口那台，大概十分钟前。
我查一下……卡已经取出来了。
turns.en: Let me check. We've already retrieved it.

turns.cn: 没有扣款，您可以重新取。
turns.en: No charge went through. You can try again.

dlg-chain-bank-04.title: Chain 4/8: Wire Transfer
dlg-chain-bank-04.scene: 你要往国内汇一笔钱，咨询手续费。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 我想电汇三千美元到中国。
请填写收款人姓名和银行信息。
turns.en: Please fill in the recipient's name and bank details.

turns.cn: 手续费四十五，三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Forty-five dollars, three to five business days.

turns.cn: 对，按处理时的实时汇率。
turns.en: Yes, the rate at the time of processing.

dlg-chain-bank-05.title: Chain 5/8: Question a Charge
dlg-chain-bank-05.scene: 你发现账单有一笔不认识的交易。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 银行客服，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Bank support. How can I help?

turns.cn: 账单上有一笔四十九块九，我不认识。
请报后四位卡号和交易日期。
turns.en: Last four digits of your card and the transaction date?

turns.cn: 像是流媒体订阅，要争议吗？
turns.en: Looks like a streaming subscription. Want to dispute it?

dlg-chain-bank-06.title: Chain 6/8: Report Lost Card
dlg-chain-bank-06.scene: 你丢了钱包，打电话挂失借记卡。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 挂失专线，请报姓名和生日。
turns.en: Card loss hotline. Name and date of birth?

turns.cn: 张伟，三月十五号，卡可能丢了。
已冻结，新卡五到七天寄到。
turns.en: It's frozen. A new card ships in five to seven days.

turns.cn: 能加急吗？我下周要出差。

turns.en: Express is two days for fifteen dollars.

dlg-chain-bank-07.title: Chain 7/8: Activate New Card
dlg-chain-bank-07.scene: 新卡到了，你去银行激活并设 PIN。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.en: Hi. What can I do for you?

turns.cn: 我收到新借记卡，想激活设密码。

turns.en: Insert the card and follow the prompts.

turns.cn: 好了，旧卡自动作废了吧？

turns.en: Yes, the old one is deactivated.

dlg-chain-bank-08.title: Chain 8/8: Set Up Mobile Banking
dlg-chain-bank-08.scene: 临走前，你请工作人员帮忙装手机银行 App。（对话链：银行办事）

turns.cn: 能帮我设置手机银行吗？刷脸登录不会弄。
先下载 App，用账号密码登录。
turns.en: Download the app first and log in with your username and password.

turns.cn: 每天两千五，可在设置里调高。
turns.en: Twenty-five hundred a day. You can raise it in settings.

turns.cn: 有问题随时来或打电话。
turns.en: Come in or call anytime if you need help.

dlg-bank-01.title: Opening an Account
dlg-bank-01.scene: 你刚到美国，去银行开支票账户。

turns.cn: 您好，今天需要什么服务？
turns.en: Hello. How can I help you today?

turns.cn: 请出示护照和地址证明。
turns.en: I'll need your passport and proof of address.

turns.cn: 这是我的租房合同，可以吗？
可以。最低存款二十五美元。
turns.en: Yes. The minimum deposit is twenty-five dollars.

turns.cn: 学生账户免月费，这是您的借记卡。
turns.en: Student accounts have no monthly fee. Here's your debit card.

dlg-bank-02.title: ATM Problem
dlg-bank-02.scene: 你的卡被取款机吞了，进银行求助。

turns.en: Which machine? When did it happen?

turns.cn: 门口那台，大概十分钟前。
我查一下……卡已经取出来了。
turns.en: Let me check. We've already retrieved it.

turns.cn: 没有扣款，您可以重新取。
turns.en: No charge went through. You can try again.

dlg-bank-03.title: Wire Transfer
dlg-bank-03.scene: 你要往国内汇款，咨询手续费。

turns.cn: 我想电汇五千美元到中国。
请填写收款人姓名和银行信息。
turns.en: Please fill in the recipient's name and bank details.

turns.cn: 手续费四十五，三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Forty-five dollars, three to five business days.

turns.cn: 对，按处理时的实时汇率。
turns.en: Yes, the rate at the time of processing.

dlg-bank-04.title: Lost Debit Card
dlg-bank-04.scene: 你丢了借记卡，打电话挂失。

turns.cn: 银行客服，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Bank customer service. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我的借记卡丢了，需要挂失。
请提供您的姓名和卡号后四位。
turns.en: May I have your name and the last four digits of the card?

turns.cn: 卡已冻结，新卡五到七天寄到。
turns.en: The card is now frozen. A new one will arrive in five to seven days.

turns.cn: 这期间能用手机银行吗？
可以，转账和缴费不受影响。
turns.en: Yes, transfers and bill pay still work.

dlg-bank-05.title: Depositing a Check
dlg-bank-05.scene: 你拿到工资支票，到银行柜台存入账户。

turns.cn: 存到哪个账户？请填背面并签字。
turns.en: Which account? Please endorse the back and sign it.

turns.cn: 一千二百美元，今天能到账一部分。
turns.en: Twelve hundred dollars. Part of it may be available today.

turns.cn: 通常两个工作日，手机银行可查进度。
turns.en: Usually two business days. You can track it in mobile banking.

dlg-bank-06.title: Credit Card Application
dlg-bank-06.scene: 你在银行申请第一张信用卡。

turns.cn: 想办哪种卡？我们有返现和旅行积分。
turns.en: Which card interests you? We have cash back and travel rewards.

turns.cn: 日常消费返现那种，年费多少？
首年免年费，之后九十五，消费够可免。
turns.en: No fee the first year, then ninety-five unless you spend enough to waive it.

turns.cn: 需要什么材料？多久能批？
身份证、收入证明，网上几分钟，卡一周寄到。
turns.en: ID and proof of income. Online takes minutes; the card arrives in a week.

turns.cn: 根据收入，新客一般三千到五千。
turns.en: Based on income, new customers often get three to five thousand.

dlg-bank-07.title: Deposit Cash
dlg-bank-07.scene: 你有一笔现金要到银行柜台存入。

turns.cn: 想存一千二现金到支票户。
请填存款单，身份证看一下。
turns.en: Fill out a deposit slip. May I see your ID?
Cash posts immediately.
Here you go. Please verify the amount.

dlg-bank-08.title: Monthly Fee Question
dlg-bank-08.scene: 你发现账户被扣月费，到银行询问。

turns.cn: 为什么这个月扣了十二块月费？
余额低于一千五要收，或没达直接存款。
turns.en: Balance under fifteen hundred or direct deposit not met.
At least five hundred a month.
Here's the form for your employer.

dlg-bank-09.title: Notary Service
dlg-bank-09.scene: 你需要公证文件，去银行办理。

turns.cn: 你们有notary吗？租房合同要签。
有，客户免费，请带证件原件。
turns.en: Yes. Free for customers. Bring original ID.

turns.cn: walk-in，公证员十一点到两点在。
turns.en: Walk-in. Notary is here eleven to two.
Signers must be present.

dlg-bank-10.title: Mobile Deposit Problem
dlg-bank-10.scene: 手机银行存支票失败，你到柜台求助。

turns.cn: App存支票一直失败，能柜台存吗？
可以，支票平整，四角在框内拍照。
turns.en: Sure. For the app, keep the check flat and all corners in frame.

turns.cn: 第一个工作日部分，全部两个工作日。
turns.en: Partial first business day, full amount in two.
Please endorse the back.

dlg-chain-cafe-01.title: Chain 1/8: Find a Seat
dlg-chain-cafe-01.scene: 周六下午，咖啡馆很满，你问店员有没有位。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 还有空位吗？我想待一会儿。
靠墙高脚桌刚空出来，有插座。
turns.en: A high-top by the wall just opened. It has an outlet.
Order at the counter when you're ready.

dlg-chain-cafe-02.title: Chain 2/8: Order Coffee
dlg-chain-cafe-02.scene: 你在柜台点咖啡。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.en: Hi there! What can I get for you today?

turns.cn: 一杯大杯拿铁，燕麦奶，少冰。

turns.en: Would you like any syrup in that?
For here or to go?

dlg-chain-cafe-03.title: Chain 3/8: Wrong Drink
dlg-chain-cafe-03.scene: 叫到你的名字，发现拿铁做成了全脂奶。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 不好意思，我点的是燕麦奶。

turns.en: My apologies. I'll remake it.
Two minutes. Please wait nearby.

dlg-chain-cafe-04.title: Chain 4/8: Work on Laptop
dlg-chain-cafe-04.scene: 你用笔记本工作，需要连 Wi-Fi。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 印在收据上，用户名是店名。
turns.en: It's on your receipt. Username is the shop name.

turns.cn: 插座能用吗？要待两小时。
没问题，高峰时段请分享座位。
turns.en: Sure. During rush hour, please share the table.

dlg-chain-cafe-05.title: Chain 5/8: Order a Pastry
dlg-chain-cafe-05.scene: 工作一会儿，你想加个蓝莓司康。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 能再加一个蓝莓司康吗？

turns.en: Want it warmed up?

turns.cn: 加热，再来一杯美式续杯。
续杯一块五，一共四块八。
turns.en: Refill is a dollar fifty. Four eighty total.

dlg-chain-cafe-06.title: Chain 6/8: Friend Arrives
dlg-chain-cafe-06.scene: 朋友如约来咖啡馆见面。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.en: Hey! Long time no see!
Pretty good. I just started a new job.

turns.cn: 在一家科技公司做产品经理。
turns.en: I'm a product manager at a tech company.

turns.cn: 太棒了！要不要再点一杯？

dlg-chain-cafe-07.title: Chain 7/8: Who Pays
dlg-chain-cafe-07.scene: 聊完准备走，朋友说要请客。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 今天我请，你上次帮了大忙。
turns.en: My treat today. You helped me out last time.
Don't argue. You get the next one.
Next time let's try that new place.

dlg-chain-cafe-08.title: Chain 8/8: Leave and Review
dlg-chain-cafe-08.scene: 离开前你跟店员道别，打算写评价。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 今天打扰久了，谢谢换燕麦奶那杯。

turns.en: No problem. Come back anytime.

turns.cn: 插座和 Wi-Fi 都很棒，我会写好评。

turns.en: Thank you! See you tomorrow.
Hi there! What can I get for you today?

turns.cn: 要加什么奶？全脂、脱脂还是燕麦奶？
turns.en: What kind of milk? Whole, skim, or oat?
Would you like any syrup in that?
For here or to go?

dlg-cafe-02.title: Working at a Cafe
dlg-cafe-02.scene: 你在咖啡店用笔记本电脑工作，需要更多插座。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问有带插座的座位吗？

turns.en: The high-top tables along the wall have outlets.

turns.cn: 太好了。我还可以续杯吗？
当然可以，同一种咖啡吗？
turns.en: Sure. Same drink?

turns.cn: 马上来。需要加点吃的吗？
turns.en: Coming right up. Would you like anything to eat?

dlg-cafe-03.title: Meeting a Friend
dlg-cafe-03.scene: 你和朋友约在咖啡店见面。

turns.en: Hey! Long time no see!
Pretty good. I just started a new job.

turns.cn: 在一家科技公司做产品经理。
turns.en: I'm a product manager at a tech company.

turns.cn: 太棒了！要不要再来一杯？

turns.en: Sure, my treat!

dlg-cafe-04.title: Wrong Order
dlg-cafe-04.scene: 店员给你的饮品不对，你去柜台说明。

turns.cn: 不好意思，我点的是热拿铁，这是冰的。
非常抱歉，我马上给您重做。
turns.en: I'm so sorry. I'll remake it for you right away.
And that was with oat milk, right?

turns.cn: 好了，这杯是您的，抱歉让您久等。
turns.en: Here you go. Sorry for the wait.

dlg-cafe-05.title: Studying at the Cafe
dlg-cafe-05.scene: 你在咖啡店自习，需要安静环境。

turns.cn: 请问哪个区域比较安静？
靠里侧的高桌区人少一些。
turns.en: The high-top tables in the back are usually quieter.

turns.cn: 我待两个小时，需要再点一杯吗？
高峰时段建议每小时点一杯。
turns.en: During busy hours, we ask for one drink per hour.
The Wi-Fi password is on your receipt.

dlg-cafe-06.title: Wrong Drink
dlg-cafe-06.scene: 店员端上的咖啡不是你点的，你需要礼貌说明。

turns.cn: 不好意思，我点的是燕麦拿铁。
非常抱歉，这杯是全脂牛奶的。
turns.en: I'm sorry. This one was made with whole milk.

turns.cn: 我对乳制品过敏，能重做一杯吗？
当然，马上为您重做，请稍等。
turns.en: Of course. I'll remake it right away.

turns.cn: 新的好了，这杯请您不用付钱。
turns.en: Here's the new one. Please don't pay for the mistake.

dlg-chain-camp-01.title: Chain 1/8: Book a Campsite
dlg-chain-camp-01.scene: 你打电话预订州立公园营地。（对话链：露营）

turns.cn: 州立公园营地，需要什么帮助？
turns.en: State park campground. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想订下周末两晚，有电的营地。

turns.en: Site twelve is open. Thirty-five a night.

turns.cn: 可以，必须拴绳，清理粪便。
turns.en: Yes, on leash. Clean up after them.

dlg-chain-camp-02.title: Chain 2/8: Pack Gear
dlg-chain-camp-02.scene: 出发前一天，你和同伴核对露营装备。（对话链：露营）

turns.cn: 帐篷、睡袋、炉具都带了吗？
turns.en: Got the tent, sleeping bags, and stove?

turns.cn: 帐篷在我车里，你带睡袋和防潮垫。

turns.en: Flashlights and first-aid kit?

turns.cn: 急救包我准备了，你带头灯。
天气预报周六晚上冷，多带层衣服。
turns.en: Forecast says cold Saturday night. Pack extra layers.

dlg-chain-camp-03.title: Chain 3/8: Check In
dlg-chain-camp-03.scene: 你到达营地入口办理入住。（对话链：露营）

turns.en: Reservation? ID, please.

turns.cn: 签这里。禁止明火，用火在指定炉。
turns.en: Sign here. No open flames except at designated grills.

turns.cn: 入口有水龙头，厕所在营地东边。
turns.en: Spigots at the entrance. Restrooms east of the sites.
Store food in bear boxes. Don't leave it outside.

dlg-chain-camp-04.title: Chain 4/8: Set Up Tent
dlg-chain-camp-04.scene: 你第一次搭帐篷，向邻营求助。（对话链：露营）

turns.cn: 不好意思，这帐篷杆怎么穿？
两根长的先交叉，插进四角。
turns.en: Cross the long ones first, then slot them into the corners.
At least halfway in. Tighten the guy lines.

turns.cn: 预报说无雨，但带上雨布保险。
turns.en: Forecast says no rain, but bring a rain fly just in case.

dlg-chain-camp-05.title: Chain 5/8: Cook Dinner
dlg-chain-camp-05.scene: 傍晚你们在营地炉子上做饭。（对话链：露营）

turns.en: Stove won't light. Is there gas?

turns.cn: 气罐满的，可能阀门没开。

turns.en: There we go. Noodles first, then sausages.

turns.cn: 我去拿水，顺便锁食物进熊箱。

turns.en: Don't dump dishwater on the ground.

dlg-chain-camp-06.title: Chain 6/8: Morning Hike
dlg-chain-camp-06.scene: 早上你们向管理员问徒步路线。（对话链：露营）

turns.cn: 有适合初学者的步道吗？
环湖步道三英里，平缓好走。
turns.en: The lake loop is three miles, fairly flat.

turns.cn: 慢慢走大概一个半小时，带够水。
turns.en: About ninety minutes at a leisurely pace. Bring enough water.

turns.cn: 有熊吗？需要喷熊喷雾吗？
偶尔有，出声走路，别喂野生动物。
turns.en: Occasionally. Make noise on the trail. Don't feed wildlife.

dlg-chain-camp-07.title: Chain 7/8: Campfire Night
dlg-chain-camp-07.scene: 晚上你们在指定火坑旁烤棉花糖。（对话链：露营）

turns.cn: 火不能太大，管理员说过。
turns.en: Keep the fire small. The ranger said so.
You roast marshmallows. I'll tell a story.

turns.cn: 别烤焦了……完美，夹饼干里。
十点前熄灭火，准备睡了。
turns.en: Put it out before ten. Time to sleep.

turns.cn: 我去浇灭，检查熊箱锁好。

dlg-chain-camp-08.title: Chain 8/8: Pack Up and Leave
dlg-chain-camp-08.scene: 周日中午你们退房离开营地。（对话链：露营）

turns.cn: 退房时间是十一点，营地收拾干净了吗？
turns.en: Checkout is eleven. Did you leave the site clean?

turns.cn: 垃圾带走了，火坑也浇灭了。

turns.en: Great. Hope you come back.
Book early for fall foliage season.

dlg-camp-01.title: Campground Check-in
dlg-camp-01.scene: 你开车到州立公园营地办理入住。

turns.en: Do you have a reservation?

turns.cn: 请填表，禁止明火，用火在指定炉。
turns.en: Please sign in. No open flames except at designated grills.

turns.cn: 水龙头在营地入口，厕所在那边。
turns.en: Spigots at the entrance. Restrooms are over there.

turns.cn: 食物锁熊箱，垃圾别留外面。
turns.en: Store food in bear boxes. Don't leave trash outside.

dlg-camp-02.title: Setting Up Tent
dlg-camp-02.scene: 你第一次露营，向邻营求助搭帐篷。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这帐篷杆怎么穿？
先把两根长的交叉，插进四角。
turns.en: Cross the long ones first, then slot them into the corners.
At least halfway in. Tighten the guy lines.

turns.cn: 降到四十多华氏度，睡袋要够温标。
turns.en: Down to the forties. Make sure your bag is rated for it.

dlg-camp-03.title: Hiking Trail
dlg-camp-03.scene: 你在游客中心咨询徒步路线。

turns.cn: 有没有半天能走完的路线？
瀑布步道，四英里来回，中等难度。
turns.en: Waterfall Trail, four miles round trip, moderate.
Recommended. The last section is steep.

turns.cn: 免费，记得带水，下午雷雨。
turns.en: Free maps. Bring water. Thunderstorms possible this afternoon.

dlg-camp-04.title: Campfire Cooking
dlg-camp-04.scene: 你在营地用篝火烤棉花糖，和邻居聊天。

turns.en: First time roasting marshmallows?

turns.cn: 离火远一点，转着烤，外面焦里面软。
turns.en: Hold it farther from the flame, rotate until crispy outside and gooey inside.
Right, with a piece of chocolate.
One of the best parts of camping.

dlg-camp-05.title: Renting Gear
dlg-camp-05.scene: 你在户外店租露营装备。

turns.en: Renting a tent or sleeping bags?

turns.cn: 四人帐加两个睡袋，周末两天。
一共七十五，押金一百可退。
turns.en: Seventy-five total. A hundred refundable deposit.
Yes, ten a day. Fuel canisters sold separately.
Sounds good. Fifteen extra per late day.

dlg-campus-01.title: Campus Tour
dlg-campus-01.scene: 新生入学前你参加校园导览。

turns.cn: 图书馆在这边，二十四小时开放期末周。
turns.en: The library is here. It's open twenty-four hours during finals.

turns.cn: 网上或学生中心机器，用学生ID。
turns.en: Online or at kiosks in the student center with your ID.
It's included in tuition. Show your student ID.
The campus app shows live locations.

dlg-campus-02.title: Dorm Check-in
dlg-campus-02.scene: 开学日你办理宿舍入住。

turns.cn: 欢迎！请签入住表，领钥匙。
turns.en: Welcome! Sign in and pick up your key.

turns.cn: 室友还没到，我可以先选床位吗？
可以，但最好等对方一起商量。
turns.en: You can, but it's better to wait and discuss together.
First floor. Coins or student card.
Ten PM to eight AM.

dlg-campus-03.title: Joining a Club
dlg-campus-03.scene: 社团招新周，你咨询英语辩论社。

turns.cn: 对辩论感兴趣？我们每周三练。
turns.en: Interested in debate? We practice Wednesdays.
Yes. We train newcomers. Competitions are optional.

turns.cn: 一学期二十，含比赛交通。
turns.en: Twenty per semester, includes travel to meets.
Welcome aboard!

dlg-campus-04.title: Printing on Campus
dlg-campus-04.scene: 你要打印论文，电脑显示余额不足。

turns.cn: 学生账户要充值，一页黑白七分。
turns.en: You need to add funds to your student account. Seven cents per black-and-white page.
Student portal. Five-dollar minimum.
Twenty-five cents a page.

dlg-campus-05.title: Career Fair
dlg-campus-05.scene: 你在校园招聘会和招聘人员交流。

turns.en: Hi there. Do you know our company?

turns.cn: 做过功课，你们做云计算，我投软件工程岗。
太好了，请留简历，今晚网申。
turns.en: Great. Leave your resume and apply online tonight.

turns.cn: 表现好可以，明年八月入职。
turns.en: Strong performers can start full-time next August.
Good luck!

dlg-wash-01.title: Drive-Through Car Wash
dlg-wash-01.scene: 你第一次用自助洗车机。

turns.en: Basic wash is eight bucks. With wax is twelve.

turns.cn: 关好，后视镜折进去，挂N档。
turns.en: Close it. Fold mirrors in and put it in neutral.

turns.cn: 不用，跟着传送带走就行。
turns.en: No, just let the conveyor pull you through.

turns.cn: 出口有免费吸尘器和毛巾架。
turns.en: Free vacuums and towel racks at the exit.

dlg-wash-02.title: Hand Wash Detail
dlg-wash-02.scene: 你预约了车内精洗服务。

turns.cn: 全套内饰一百二，大概两小时。
turns.en: Full interior detail is a hundred twenty, about two hours.

turns.cn: 座椅上有咖啡渍，能去掉吗？
八成能清，严重的话会淡很多。
turns.en: Usually yes. Bad ones fade a lot.

turns.cn: 含吸尘和擦拭，个人物品请先拿走。
turns.en: Vacuum and wipe-down included. Remove personal items first.
We'll text you when it's ready.

dlg-wash-03.title: Brake Noise
dlg-wash-03.scene: 刹车吱吱响，你去修理店检查。

turns.cn: 可能是刹车片磨薄了，我开一圈听听。
turns.en: Pads might be worn. Let me take it for a quick listen.

turns.cn: 还能开几百英里，但尽快换。
turns.en: A few hundred miles, but swap them soon.

turns.cn: 零件加人工大概三百五。
turns.en: About three fifty parts and labor.

dlg-wash-04.title: Tire Rotation
dlg-wash-04.scene: 你去做定期轮胎换位和打气。

turns.cn: 换位免费，胎压我帮您测。
turns.en: Rotation's free with your service. I'll check tire pressure.

turns.cn: 门框贴纸写三十二，现在都偏低。
turns.en: Thirty-two on the door sticker. They're all a bit low.

turns.cn: 右前轮磨损是不是快一点？
轻微偏磨，换位后会均匀些。
turns.en: Slight uneven wear. Rotation should even it out.
About fifteen minutes.

dlg-wash-05.title: Smog Check
dlg-wash-05.scene: 你去做加州式的尾气年检。

turns.cn: 注册快到期了？检测费五十五。
turns.en: Registration expiring? The smog check is fifty-five.

turns.cn: 发动机暖机五分钟再测。
turns.en: Warm up the engine for five minutes first.

turns.cn: 免费复测一次，修好后两周内。
turns.en: One free retest within two weeks after repairs.
It's sent electronically to the DMV. You can view it on your phone too.

dlg-wash-06.title: Repair Estimate
dlg-wash-06.scene: 修理厂报价偏高，你和师傅商量。

turns.cn: 变速箱和刹车一起修，报价一千二。
turns.en: Transmission and brakes together, twelve hundred quoted.

turns.cn: 能分开做吗？先修刹车站得住吗？
刹车四百可以先做，变速箱再预约。
turns.en: Brakes are four hundred now. Schedule transmission later.

turns.cn: 大概省一百五，质保短一点。
turns.en: About a hundred fifty less, shorter warranty.

turns.cn: 刹车用副厂，今天能取车吗？

turns.en: Before five PM, yes.

dlg-cln-01.title: Hiring a Cleaner
dlg-cln-01.scene: 你第一次请家政上门打扫。

turns.cn: 您好，两小时基础清洁一百二。
turns.en: Hi. Basic two-hour clean is a hundred twenty.

turns.cn: 厨房油污重，能重点擦吗？

turns.en: Sure. Do you have pets?

turns.cn: 一只猫，清洁用品在柜子里。
贵重物品请收好，我换鞋套。
turns.en: Please put valuables away. I'll use shoe covers.

turns.cn: 每月两次，能固定周三吗？

turns.en: Yes. I'll come the same time next visit.

dlg-cln-02.title: Move-Out Cleaning
dlg-cln-02.scene: 你搬出公寓前请深度清洁拿押金。

turns.cn: 需要退房标准清洁，明天房东来检查。
三室大概两百五，含烤箱和冰箱内。
turns.en: For a three-bedroom, about two fifty, including oven and fridge inside.
I'd recommend it. Eighty extra.
I'll text photos when we're done.

dlg-cln-03.title: Cleaning Complaint
dlg-cln-03.scene: 家政打扫后你觉得浴室没清理干净。

turns.cn: 浴室瓷砖还是脏的，水龙头有水渍。
很抱歉，我安排明天免费返工。
turns.en: I'm sorry. I'll schedule a free touch-up tomorrow.

turns.cn: 今天能来吗？晚上有客人。
四点前派人，半小时搞定。
turns.en: We'll send someone before four. About thirty minutes.
I'll add that to the checklist.

turns.cn: 三个房间地毯，报价一百八。
turns.en: Three carpeted rooms, quote is a hundred eighty.

turns.cn: 布艺沙发加六十，宠物味用酵素剂。
turns.en: Fabric sofa is sixty more. We use enzyme treatment for pet odors.
Six to eight hours. Open windows to speed it up.

turns.cn: 九点可以，请移开小家具。
turns.en: Nine AM works. Please move small furniture off the carpet.

dlg-cln-05.title: Office Cleaning
dlg-cln-05.scene: 你是小公司员工，和保洁沟通夜间清洁。

turns.en: Are all the trash bins emptied tonight?

turns.cn: 会议室的忘了，我现在去倒。
地板蜡下周做，请把椅子摞起来。
turns.en: We're waxing floors next week. Please stack the chairs.

turns.cn: 冰箱里的过期食物能扔吗？
周五统一清理，贴个便签提醒大家。
turns.en: We clear it Fridays. Put a note reminding everyone.
Lock up. I'll be in after seven.

dlg-club-01.title: Pool Guest Pass
dlg-club-01.scene: 你住公寓，想带朋友去社区泳池。

turns.cn: 住户卡请刷一下，访客要登记。
turns.en: Swipe your resident card. Guests need to sign in.

turns.cn: 朋友今天来游泳，访客证怎么买？
一天五块，最多两位访客。
turns.en: Five dollars per day, up to two guests.

turns.cn: 住户必须在场，十二岁以下要成人陪。
turns.en: Residents must be present. Under twelve needs an adult.
Nine PM. Please shower first.

dlg-club-02.title: Gym Orientation
dlg-club-02.scene: 你第一次去小区会所健身房。

turns.cn: 第一次来？我带您熟悉器械。
turns.en: First time? I'll show you around the equipment.

turns.cn: 会费包含在物业费里吗？
基础器械免费，私教另收费。
turns.en: Basic equipment is free. Personal training is extra.

turns.cn: 前台可领，用完投回收筐。
turns.en: Pick one up at the desk. Drop it in the bin after.

turns.cn: 上午十点到十二点通常空。
turns.en: Usually quiet from ten to noon.

dlg-club-03.title: Tennis Court Booking
dlg-club-03.scene: 你在会所前台订网球场。

turns.cn: 网球场要提前订，每次一小时。
turns.en: Courts are by reservation, one hour per slot.

turns.cn: 有，需要灯费吗？室内场加五块。
turns.en: Yes. Need lights? Indoor is five extra.
Twenty deposit at the desk, refunded on return.
The clock starts at booking time. Please be on time.

dlg-club-04.title: Clubhouse Rental
dlg-club-04.scene: 你想租社区会所办生日聚会。

turns.cn: 会所四小时两百，押金一百。
turns.en: Clubhouse is two hundred for four hours, hundred deposit.

turns.cn: 下周六晚上六点，大概二十人。
十点后禁大声，厨房可用但需清理。
turns.en: Quiet after ten. Kitchen available but must be cleaned.
Yes. We provide trash bags.

turns.cn: 支票或业主门户在线付。
turns.en: Check or pay through the resident portal.

dlg-club-05.title: Hot Tub Rules
dlg-club-05.scene: 你想用会所热水按摩池，咨询规定。

turns.cn: 热水池最多八人，每次十五分钟。
turns.en: Hot tub holds eight, fifteen minutes per session.

turns.cn: 建议先问医生，水温一百零四华氏度。
turns.en: Ask your doctor first. It's one oh four degrees.

turns.cn: 不用，但请穿泳装，禁止玻璃杯。
turns.en: No cap, but swimwear required. No glass.
Two people ahead. Sign up and wait your turn.

dlg-chain-com-01.title: Chain 1/8: Community Center Class
dlg-chain-com-01.scene: 你在社区中心报名瑜伽课。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 社区中心，需要什么帮助？
turns.en: Community center. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想报下周开始的瑜伽入门班。
十节课六十块，需自备瑜伽垫。
turns.en: Sixty dollars for ten sessions. Bring your own mat.
Your first class is free.

dlg-chain-com-02.title: Chain 2/8: First Yoga Class
dlg-chain-com-02.scene: 你参加第一次瑜伽试听。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 第一次吗？哪里不舒服告诉我。
turns.en: First time? Tell me if anything hurts.
Go slowly. Don't push too hard.
Good. Breathe a little deeper.

dlg-chain-com-03.title: Chain 3/8: Volunteer Sign-up
dlg-chain-com-03.scene: 你想在食物银行做志愿者。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 感谢有兴趣！之前做过志愿吗？
turns.en: Thanks for your interest! Have you volunteered before?

turns.cn: 在大学做过，周末可以来。
周六上午分拣食品，三小时一班。
turns.en: Saturday mornings sorting food, three-hour shifts.

turns.cn: 第一次来提前半小时 orientation。
turns.en: Come thirty minutes early your first day for orientation.

dlg-chain-com-04.title: Chain 4/8: Food Bank Shift
dlg-chain-com-04.scene: 周六你在食物银行帮忙分拣。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 罐头放这边，过期的一律剔除。
turns.en: Canned goods here. Toss anything expired.
A week left. Keep it.
Wheel it to the cooler. Thanks.

dlg-chain-com-05.title: Chain 5/8: Neighborhood Meeting
dlg-chain-com-05.scene: 你参加小区业主大会讨论游乐场翻新。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 今晚议题是游乐场翻新，欢迎发言。
turns.en: Tonight's topic is playground renovation. Comments are welcome.

turns.cn: 我支持翻新，但希望保留大树。
园林方案会尽量保留现有树木。
turns.en: The landscape plan will try to preserve existing trees.

turns.cn: 十二万，从维修基金出，不另收费。
turns.en: A hundred twenty thousand from the reserve fund, no extra assessment.

dlg-chain-com-06.title: Chain 6/8: Community Cleanup
dlg-chain-com-06.scene: 社区组织清洁日，你领手套和垃圾袋。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 报名清洁日的？领手套和袋子。
turns.en: Here for cleanup day? Grab gloves and bags.
East Oak Street. Pair up with someone.

turns.cn: 几点结束？中午有披萨吗？
十二点，社区中心有披萨和饮料。
turns.en: Noon. Pizza and drinks at the community center.

dlg-chain-com-07.title: Chain 7/8: Church Visit
dlg-chain-com-07.scene: 你第一次去当地教堂，工作人员热情接待。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.en: Welcome! Is this your first time here?

turns.cn: 节目单在门口，礼拜约一小时。
turns.en: There's a bulletin by the door. Service is about an hour.

turns.cn: 不用，随便坐，中间是家庭区。
turns.en: No, sit anywhere. Families often sit in the middle.

turns.cn: 有的，大厅免费咖啡和点心。
turns.en: Yes, free coffee and snacks in the hall.

dlg-chain-com-08.title: Chain 8/8: Reflect on the Month
dlg-chain-com-08.scene: 月底，你和瑜伽课同学聊社区参与感受。（对话链：社区活动）

turns.cn: 这月瑜伽、志愿、清洁日，你挺活跃啊。
turns.en: Yoga, volunteering, cleanup day. You've been busy.

turns.cn: 下月有街头音乐节，来吗？
turns.en: Street music festival next month. Coming?
See you there.

dlg-com-01.title: Church Service
dlg-com-01.scene: 你第一次去当地教堂，工作人员热情接待。

turns.en: Welcome! Is this your first time here?

turns.cn: 节目单在门口，礼拜约一小时。
turns.en: There's a bulletin by the door. Service is about an hour.

turns.cn: 不用，随便坐，中间是家庭区。
turns.en: No, sit anywhere. Families often sit in the middle.

turns.cn: 有的，大厅免费咖啡和点心。
turns.en: Yes, free coffee and snacks in the hall.

dlg-com-02.scene: 你在社区中心报名瑜伽课。

turns.cn: 社区中心，需要什么帮助？
turns.en: Community center. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想报下周开始的瑜伽入门班。
十节课六十块，需自备瑜伽垫。
turns.en: Sixty dollars for ten sessions. Bring your own mat.
Your first class is free.
Please fill in an emergency contact.

dlg-com-03.title: Volunteering
dlg-com-03.scene: 你想在食物银行做志愿者。

turns.cn: 感谢有兴趣！之前做过志愿吗？
turns.en: Thanks for your interest! Have you volunteered before?

turns.cn: 在大学做过，周末可以来。
周六上午分拣食品，三小时一班。
turns.en: Saturday mornings sorting food, three-hour shifts.

turns.cn: 第一次来提前半小时 orientation。
turns.en: Come thirty minutes early your first day for orientation.
Wonderful. I'll email you a confirmation.

dlg-com-04.title: Neighborhood Meeting
dlg-com-04.scene: 你参加小区业主大会讨论绿化改造。

turns.cn: 今晚议题是游乐场翻新，欢迎发言。
turns.en: Tonight's topic is playground renovation. Comments are welcome.

turns.cn: 我支持翻新，但希望保留大树。
园林方案会尽量保留现有树木。
turns.en: The landscape plan will try to preserve existing trees.

turns.cn: 十二万，从维修基金出，不另收费。
turns.en: A hundred twenty thousand from the reserve fund, no extra assessment.

turns.cn: 谢谢，请把票投进箱子里。
turns.en: Thank you. Please drop your ballot in the box.

dlg-com-05.title: Library Story Time
dlg-com-05.scene: 你带孩子参加图书馆周末故事会。

turns.cn: 故事会十点开始，请先签到。
turns.en: Story time starts at ten. Please sign in first.

turns.cn: 不用，但座位有限，早到为好。
turns.en: No, but seats are limited. Come early.

turns.cn: 三到六岁，大约三十分钟。
turns.en: Ages three to six, about thirty minutes.
Of course. The kids' section is right next door.

dlg-chain-cmp-01.title: Chain 1/8: Problem at Restaurant
dlg-chain-cmp-01.scene: 你的菜等了四十分钟还没上，你向经理投诉。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 经理，我们点的菜四十分钟了还没来。
非常抱歉，厨房人手不够。
turns.en: I'm so sorry. We're short-staffed in the kitchen.

turns.cn: 能理解，但能优先上孩子的餐吗？
当然，我亲自去催，甜点请你们。
turns.en: Of course. I'll check myself. Dessert is on the house.

turns.cn: 谢谢，希望下次体验更好。
给您一张优惠券，欢迎再来。
turns.en: Here's a coupon. We'd love to have you back.

dlg-chain-cmp-02.title: Chain 2/8: Store Refund Dispute
dlg-chain-cmp-02.scene: 商店拒绝你的退货，你据理力争。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 这件衣服有瑕疵，我要退款。

turns.en: It's past our thirty-day return window.

turns.cn: 让我看一下……日期确实在期内。
turns.en: Let me see. You're right, it's within the window.

turns.cn: 可以换一件吗？同款没货就退。
可以退款，抱歉给您添麻烦。
turns.en: We'll refund you. Sorry for the trouble.

dlg-chain-cmp-03.title: Chain 3/8: Leave a Bad Review
dlg-chain-cmp-03.scene: 外卖体验差，你在 App 上写差评。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 真要给一星吗？会不会太狠？
turns.en: Really one star? Isn't that harsh?

turns.cn: 凉了还漏送，我写清楚事实。

turns.en: Photos make it more convincing.

turns.cn: 拍了，也点了「食物凉了」标签。

turns.en: The owner might reach out.

dlg-chain-cmp-04.title: Chain 4/8: Owner Calls Back
dlg-chain-cmp-04.scene: 你给了差评，商家打电话沟通。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 您好，看到您的评价，想了解一下问题。
turns.en: Hi, I saw your review and wanted to understand what went wrong.

turns.cn: 那天骑手不够，我们改进了包装。
turns.en: We were short on drivers that day. We've improved our packaging.

turns.cn: 希望如此，我经常点你们家。
下次订单我亲自备注加保温，送您饮料。
turns.en: I'll note extra insulation on your next order and include a free drink.

dlg-chain-cmp-05.title: Chain 5/8: Hotel Room Problem
dlg-chain-cmp-05.scene: 酒店房间不干净，你要求换房。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 房间浴室有头发，床单也不干净。
非常抱歉，我给您换一间。
turns.en: I'm terribly sorry. I'll move you to another room.

turns.cn: 要安静一点的，别靠电梯。
八楼角落套房空着，我升级给您。
turns.en: A corner suite on eight is open. I'll upgrade you at no charge.
I'll send a bellhop right up.

dlg-chain-cmp-06.title: Chain 6/8: Flight Delay
dlg-chain-cmp-06.scene: 航班延误五小时，你在柜台要求补偿。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 延误五小时，有餐券或酒店吗？
天气原因，我们可以发二十块餐券。
turns.en: It's weather-related. We can offer a twenty-dollar meal voucher.

turns.cn: 错过转机，能改签到明早吗？
可以，七点航班，今晚酒店我们安排。
turns.en: Yes. Seven AM flight. We'll arrange a hotel tonight.

turns.cn: 请把延误证明发我邮箱，公司报销用。

turns.en: Sending now. Sorry for the inconvenience.

dlg-chain-cmp-07.title: Chain 7/8: Credit Card Dispute
dlg-chain-cmp-07.scene: 商家多扣费，你打电话给银行争议。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.cn: 信用卡客服，请问什么问题？
turns.en: Credit card support. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 商家重复扣款，同一笔收了两次。

turns.en: Transaction date and amount, please?

turns.cn: 上周三，八十九块九，两次。
已登记争议，四十五天内调查。
turns.en: Dispute filed. Investigation within forty-five days.
That amount is on hold during the dispute.

dlg-chain-cmp-08.title: Chain 8/8: Complaint Resolved
dlg-chain-cmp-08.scene: 一周后，商家和银行都给了满意答复。（对话链：投诉维权）

turns.en: How did the complaints turn out?

turns.cn: 外卖店送了券，银行退了一笔重复扣款。

turns.en: Speaking up actually works.

turns.cn: 对，留好小票和截图很重要。
下次我遇到问题也跟你学。
turns.en: I'll follow your lead next time.

给您一张优惠券，欢迎再来。

turns.en: Let me see. You're right, it's within the window.

turns.cn: 可以换一件吗？同款没货就退。
可以退款，抱歉给您添麻烦。
turns.en: We'll refund you. Sorry for the trouble.

dlg-cmp-03.scene: 你给了差评，商家打电话沟通。

turns.cn: 您好，看到您的评价，想了解一下问题。
turns.en: Hi, I saw your review and wanted to understand what went wrong.

turns.cn: 那天骑手不够，我们改进了包装。
turns.en: We were short on drivers that day. We've improved our packaging.

下次订单我亲自备注加保温，送您饮料。
turns.en: I'll note extra insulation on your next order and include a free drink.

dlg-cmp-04.title: Hotel Room Problem
dlg-cmp-04.scene: 酒店房间不干净，你要求换房。

turns.cn: 房间浴室有头发，床单也不干净。
非常抱歉，我给您换一间。
turns.en: I'm terribly sorry. I'll move you to another room.

turns.cn: 要安静一点的，别靠电梯。
八楼角落套房空着，我升级给您。
turns.en: A corner suite on eight is open. I'll upgrade you at no charge.
I'll send a bellhop right up.

dlg-cmp-05.title: Flight Complaint
dlg-cmp-05.scene: 航班严重延误，你在柜台要求补偿。

turns.cn: 航班延误五小时，错过转机，怎么补偿？
可以免费改签下一班，或退部分票款。
turns.en: We can rebook you for free or offer a partial refund.

turns.cn: 延误超四小时，有酒店券和十五美元餐券。
turns.en: For delays over four hours, you get a hotel voucher and fifteen dollars for meals.

turns.cn: 请安排最早的航班，并给我书面证明。

turns.en: Working on it now. One moment, please.

dlg-chain-store-01.title: Chain 1/8: Morning Breakfast
dlg-chain-store-01.scene: 工作日早上，你在便利店买早餐。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.en: Good morning. What can I get you?

turns.cn: 一个三明治和一大杯咖啡。
要加热吗？奶和糖自己加。
turns.en: Want it heated? Cream and sugar are over there.
That'll be nine twenty.

dlg-chain-store-02.title: Chain 2/8: Find Batteries
dlg-chain-store-02.scene: 中午遥控器没电，你顺路进便利店。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.cn: 请问有 AA 电池吗？

turns.en: Behind the register. How many do you need?
Four ninety-nine. Need a bag?

dlg-chain-store-03.title: Chain 3/8: Heat a Meal
dlg-chain-store-03.scene: 傍晚你买便当，请店员加热。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.cn: 这个鸡肉饭便当，请加热。
微波一分钟半，要筷子吗？
turns.en: One and a half minutes in the microwave. Need chopsticks?

turns.cn: 六块五，在这边吃还是带走？
turns.en: Six fifty. For here or to go?

dlg-chain-store-04.title: Chain 4/8: ATM Swallowed Card
dlg-chain-store-04.scene: 店里取款机吞了你的卡。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.cn: 你好，取款机把我的卡吞了。
机器不是我们管的，要打银行电话。
turns.en: We don't manage that machine. You'll need to call your bank.

turns.cn: 银行电话在机器上有吗？

turns.en: Yes, it's on the side of the machine.
Sure, come to the counter.

dlg-chain-store-05.title: Chain 5/8: Late Night Run
dlg-chain-store-05.scene: 深夜肚子不舒服，你去便利店买应急用品。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.en: Good evening. What do you need?

turns.cn: 胃不舒服，有止疼药和胃药吗？
止疼药在第三过道，胃药在柜台后。
turns.en: Pain relief is aisle three. Antacid is behind the counter.
Eleven dollars total.

dlg-chain-store-06.title: Chain 6/8: Pay a Bill
dlg-chain-store-06.scene: 你在便利店柜台缴电费。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.cn: 能代缴电费吗？账单在这。
可以，账号和金额确认一下。
turns.en: Sure. Please confirm the account and amount.

turns.cn: 加手续费一块五，现金还是卡？
turns.en: Plus a dollar fifty fee. Cash or card?
Done. It posts in a day or two.

dlg-chain-store-07.title: Chain 7/8: Wrong Change
dlg-chain-store-07.scene: 你发现店员找零少了一块，回去说明。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.cn: 不好意思，刚才找零好像少了一块。
我查一下小票……您说得对。
turns.en: Let me check the receipt. You're right.
Sorry about that. Here's your dollar.

dlg-chain-store-08.title: Chain 8/8: Regular Customer
dlg-chain-store-08.scene: 第二天早上，店员认出你是常客。（对话链：便利店）

chain.title: A Day at the Convenience Store

turns.cn: 还是老样子？大杯咖啡加三明治？
turns.en: The usual? Large coffee and a sandwich?

turns.cn: 新到的蓝莓马芬，要试试吗？
turns.en: New blueberry muffins. Want to try one?

turns.cn: 来一个吧，昨天谢谢借电话。

turns.en: No problem. Ten fifty total.

dlg-store-01.title: Buying at 7-Eleven
dlg-store-01.scene: 你在便利店买早餐和咖啡。

turns.en: Good morning. What can I get you?

turns.cn: 一个三明治和一大杯咖啡。
要加热吗？奶和糖自己加。
turns.en: Want it heated? Cream and sugar are over there.
That'll be nine twenty.

turns.cn: 请拿好，祝你有美好的一天。
turns.en: Here you go. Have a great day.

dlg-store-02.title: ATM at the Store
dlg-store-02.scene: 便利店里的取款机吞卡了，你向店员求助。

turns.cn: 你好，取款机把我的卡吞了。
机器不是我们管的，要打银行电话。
turns.en: We don't manage that machine. You'll need to call your bank.

turns.cn: 银行电话在机器上有吗？

turns.en: Yes, it's on the side of the machine.
Sure, come to the counter.

dlg-store-03.title: Asking for a Product
dlg-store-03.scene: 你在便利店找某种电池。

turns.en: Behind the register. How many do you need?
Four ninety-nine. Need a bag?

turns.cn: 不用，顺便问下附近有药店吗？
出门右转，两个路口就有。
turns.en: Turn right out the door, two blocks down.

dlg-store-04.title: Late Night Purchase
dlg-store-04.scene: 深夜你去便利店买应急用品。

turns.en: Will that be all?

turns.cn: 你们二十四小时营业吗？

turns.en: Yes, we're open every day.

turns.cn: 那太好了。有充电线吗？iPhone的。

turns.en: Yes, on the bottom shelf over there.
Sixteen seventy total.

dlg-store-05.title: ATM at Store
dlg-store-05.scene: 你在便利店用店内ATM取现金遇到问题。

turns.cn: 请稍等，我联系银行热线。
turns.en: One moment. I'll call the bank hotline.

turns.cn: 钱已经扣了但机器没吐钞。
记下交易编号，银行会核查。
turns.en: Write down the transaction ID. The bank will investigate.

turns.cn: 三到五个工作日，卡会寄给您。
turns.en: Three to five business days. They'll mail your card back.

dlg-chain-cus-01.title: Chain 1/8: On the Plane
dlg-chain-cus-01.scene: 飞机降落前，空姐发海关申报表。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.cn: 请填海关申报表，没有申报的打否。
turns.en: Please complete the customs form. Mark no if you have nothing to declare.

turns.cn: 带了两瓶红酒，要申报吗？

turns.en: Yes. Fill in the alcohol section.
Only if it's over ten thousand.

dlg-chain-cus-02.title: Chain 2/8: Immigration
dlg-chain-cus-02.scene: 你抵达美国，在移民局柜台入境。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.cn: 护照和签证请出示。来美国做什么？
turns.en: Passport and visa, please. What's the purpose of your visit?

turns.cn: 旅游，待两周，这是返程机票。

turns.en: Where will you stay? How much cash are you carrying?

turns.cn: 住在曼哈顿这家酒店，现金五百美元。

turns.en: Are you carrying any fruit or meat products?
Welcome to the United States. Please scan your fingerprints.

dlg-chain-cus-03.title: Chain 3/8: Baggage Claim
dlg-chain-cus-03.scene: 过关后你到行李转盘等托运行李。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.cn: 请问这个航班行李在哪个转盘？

turns.en: Screen says four. Bags just started.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我等到蓝色箱子就行。

turns.en: Was the immigration line long?

dlg-chain-cus-04.title: Chain 4/8: Customs Declaration
dlg-chain-cus-04.scene: 你填写海关申报单，官员询问物品。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.en: Anything to declare?

turns.cn: 有，我带了两瓶本国红酒送礼。
每人在免税额度内，请开箱检查。
turns.en: Within the duty-free limit per person. Please open the bag.

turns.cn: 还有一台旧笔记本电脑，个人用。
个人用品没问题，酒也放行。
turns.en: Personal items are fine. The wine is okay too.
No. Please take the green channel.

dlg-chain-cus-05.title: Chain 5/8: Agriculture Check
dlg-chain-cus-05.scene: 海关警犬区域，官员问你包里有没有食物。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.cn: 包里有水果、种子或肉类吗？
turns.en: Any fruit, seeds, or meat in your bags?

turns.cn: 没有，飞机上吃剩的饼干扔了。

turns.en: Please place your bag on the belt.
You're clear. You may go.

dlg-chain-cus-06.title: Chain 6/8: Currency Exchange
dlg-chain-cus-06.scene: 出关后你在机场换一点美元零钱。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.cn: 能换一百美元小面额吗？
可以，汇率在这，手续费五块。
turns.en: Yes. Rate's posted here. Five-dollar fee.

turns.cn: 刷卡行吗？我只有大额钞票。

turns.en: Card is fine.

dlg-chain-cus-07.title: Chain 7/8: Ground Transport
dlg-chain-cus-07.scene: 你在机场问讯处咨询去市区交通。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.cn: 去曼哈顿中城，地铁还是机场大巴？
大巴十八块，地铁便宜但要换乘。
turns.en: Bus is eighteen. Subway is cheaper but you transfer.
Right out the door, gate four.
About forty-five minutes without traffic.

dlg-chain-cus-08.title: Chain 8/8: Hotel Check-in
dlg-chain-cus-08.scene: 傍晚你到达预订的酒店办理入住。（对话链：入境）

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

turns.en: Welcome! Do you have a reservation?

turns.cn: 请出示护照，需要信用卡担保。
turns.en: Passport, please. We'll need a card for incidentals.

turns.cn: 在这。行李能帮忙送房间吗？
当然，行李员马上来。祝您住得愉快！
turns.en: Of course. A bellhop will be right up. Enjoy your stay!

dlg-cus-01.title: Immigration Entry
dlg-cus-01.scene: 你抵达美国，在移民局柜台入境。

turns.cn: 护照和签证请出示。来美国做什么？
turns.en: Passport and visa, please. What's the purpose of your visit?

turns.cn: 旅游，待两周，这是返程机票。

turns.en: Where will you stay? How much cash are you carrying?

turns.cn: 住在曼哈顿这家酒店，现金五百美元。

turns.en: Are you carrying any fruit or meat products?
Welcome to the United States. Please scan your fingerprints.

dlg-cus-02.title: Customs Declaration
dlg-cus-02.scene: 你填写海关申报单，官员询问物品。

turns.en: Anything to declare?

turns.cn: 有，我带了两瓶本国红酒送礼。
每人在免税额度内，请开箱检查。
turns.en: Within the duty-free limit per person. Please open the bag.

turns.cn: 还有一台旧笔记本电脑，个人用。
个人用品没问题，酒也放行。
turns.en: Personal items are fine. The wine is okay too.
No. Please take the green channel.

dlg-cus-03.title: Student Visa Entry
dlg-cus-03.scene: 你持学生签证入境，官员核实学校信息。

turns.en: F-1 visa? Which school?

turns.cn: 哥伦比亚大学，这是I-20表格。
第一次来美国吗？住校还是校外？
turns.en: First time in the US? On campus or off?
When does the semester start?
Good luck with your studies.

dlg-cus-04.title: Secondary Inspection
dlg-cus-04.scene: 你被带到二次检查室，官员进一步询问。

turns.cn: 请坐，我们需要多问几个问题。
turns.en: Please have a seat. We need to ask a few more questions.
Do you have contacts in the United States?

turns.cn: 有，我朋友住在波士顿，这是他的地址。
这次会待多久？谁付费用？
turns.en: How long will you stay? Who's paying for the trip?

turns.cn: 十天，我自己付，这是银行证明。

turns.en: Understood. You're cleared to enter.

dlg-cus-05.title: Bringing Medication
dlg-cus-05.scene: 你携带处方药入境，官员询问。

turns.en: What are these medications?

turns.cn: 个人处方药，高血压和过敏药。
有医生证明或处方单吗？
turns.en: Do you have a doctor's note or prescription?

turns.cn: 数量不超过九十天的用量吧？
turns.en: It's not more than a ninety-day supply, right?
That's fine. Please keep them with you.

dlg-cus-06.title: Arrival Card on the Plane
dlg-cus-06.scene: 空姐发入境卡，邻座旅客提醒你如何填写。

turns.cn: 第一次填这个？用英文或拼音。
turns.en: First time filling this out? Use English or romanized spelling.
Yes, and use the hotel phone number too.

turns.cn: 携带现金超过一万要申报吗？
美元一万以上要申报，你五百不用。
turns.en: Over ten thousand US dollars, yes. You're fine with five hundred.
Right. The crew collects them before landing.

dlg-chain-errands-01.title: Chain 1/8: Plan the Errands
dlg-chain-errands-01.titleCn: 第1环：计划今天要办的事
dlg-chain-errands-01.scene: 周六早上，你和室友商量今天出门要办哪些事。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.cn: 今天出去办事吗？我列了个单子。
turns.en: Running errands today? I made a list.

turns.cn: 行，我要取药、寄包裹、买菜。

turns.en: Drive or take the bus?
Leave at ten?

dlg-chain-errands-02.title: Chain 2/8: Parking at the Mall
dlg-chain-errands-02.scene: 你们到商场停车场，问工作人员停车规则。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.cn: 周末前两小时免费，需要小票吗？
turns.en: First two hours free on weekends. Need a validation?

turns.cn: 要，我们会在超市里买东西。

turns.en: Get a stamp at checkout and show it at the exit.
Yes. Near the elevator.

dlg-chain-errands-03.title: Chain 3/8: Grocery Shopping
dlg-chain-errands-03.scene: 在超市里找东西，问店员货架在哪。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.cn: 不好意思，意大利面酱在哪？

turns.en: Aisle five, middle shelf.
Yes. Same aisle, left side.
Front left by the exit.

dlg-chain-errands-04.title: Chain 4/8: Pharmacy Pickup
dlg-chain-errands-04.scene: 你到药店柜台取处方药。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.en: Pickup? Last name?

turns.cn: 一种处方药，一天两次饭后。
turns.en: One prescription. Twice daily after meals.

turns.cn: 可能犯困，第一次别开车。
turns.en: May cause drowsiness. Don't drive the first time.

dlg-chain-errands-05.title: Chain 5/8: ATM Banking
dlg-chain-errands-05.scene: 银行 ATM 前，提示太快你没听清。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.cn: 机器在问要不要打印收据，你按Yes就行。
turns.en: It's asking for a receipt. Just hit Yes.

turns.cn: 谢谢，提示太快了没听清。

turns.en: You can tap the speaker icon to repeat.
No problem.

dlg-chain-errands-06.title: Chain 6/8: Ship a Package
dlg-chain-errands-06.scene: 你在邮局寄包裹回国。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.en: Where's it going?

turns.cn: 标准两周，加急一周，都能追踪。
turns.en: Standard two weeks, express one week. Both trackable.

turns.cn: 填海关单，重量一公斤，二十八块。
turns.en: Fill out customs form. One kilo, twenty-eight dollars.

dlg-chain-errands-07.title: Chain 7/8: Food Court Lunch
dlg-chain-errands-07.scene: 办完事在商场美食广场吃午饭。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.en: Next!

turns.cn: 牛肉饭套餐，外带，不要洋葱。

turns.en: Want a drink?
Twelve dollars. We'll call your number.

dlg-chain-errands-08.title: Chain 8/8: Home and Unpack
dlg-chain-errands-08.scene: 你们买完东西回家，和室友一起收拾。（对话链：周末办事）

turns.en: All done? Tired?

turns.cn: 还行，药和包裹都搞定了。

turns.en: I'll put groceries in the fridge.
Movie this afternoon?

dlg-chain-weekday-01.title: Chain 1/12: Morning Rush
dlg-chain-weekday-01.scene: 工作日早上七点，闹钟响了，你赶时间出门。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.cn: 你要迟到了，地铁七点二十那班！
turns.en: You're gonna be late! The seven twenty train!

turns.cn: 知道了，我 shower 三分钟解决。

turns.en: I poured you coffee.
See you tonight.

dlg-chain-weekday-02.title: Chain 2/12: Grab Coffee on the Go
dlg-chain-weekday-02.scene: 楼下咖啡店排队，你快速点单。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: Next!
Name?
Ready at the counter.

dlg-chain-weekday-03.title: Chain 3/12: On the Subway
dlg-chain-weekday-03.scene: 地铁上很挤，有人问你下一站。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.cn: 不好意思，这是去市中心的方向吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, is this the downtown direction?
Thanks. First time on this line.

turns.cn: 不客气，高峰期很挤，抓紧。

turns.en: This is my stop. Thanks!

dlg-chain-weekday-04.title: Chain 4/12: Arrive at Office
dlg-chain-weekday-04.scene: 九点前到公司，和同事打招呼。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: Morning. Was traffic bad?
Standup at nine. Don't forget.
Coffee machine's fixed.

dlg-chain-weekday-05.title: Chain 5/12: Morning Standup
dlg-chain-weekday-05.scene: 站会轮到你发言。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: Zhang Wei, yesterday, today, and blockers?

turns.cn: 昨天完成接口，今天写测试，没阻碍。
下午客户会你能参加吗？
turns.en: Can you join the client call this afternoon?
Two PM. I'll send an invite.

dlg-chain-weekday-06.title: Chain 6/12: Lunch with Colleague
dlg-chain-weekday-06.scene: 中午你和同事去楼下吃午饭。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: What do you want? Japanese or sandwiches?
Did you get promoted?

turns.cn: 下午客户会我帮你顶幻灯片。
turns.en: I'll cover slides on the client call if you need.

dlg-chain-weekday-07.title: Chain 7/12: Afternoon Client Call
dlg-chain-weekday-07.scene: 下午你参加客户电话会，汇报进度。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: What's shipping this week?

turns.cn: 登录优化周三提测，周五演示。

turns.en: Any risks?

turns.cn: 短信延迟，我们加了备用通道。

turns.en: Good. See you Friday.

dlg-chain-weekday-08.title: Chain 8/12: Leaving the Office
dlg-chain-weekday-08.scene: 六点下班，你和同事道别。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: Heading out? Don't be late for standup tomorrow.

turns.cn: 走了，明天见，你也别加班太晚。

turns.en: I'll try. Drive safe.
Bye!

dlg-chain-weekday-09.title: Chain 9/12: Commute Home
dlg-chain-weekday-09.scene: 晚高峰地铁回家，你听不清广播。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: …this stop is closed. Transfer next stop…

turns.cn: 不好意思，广播没听清，这站停吗？
停，但下两站施工，要换乘公交。
turns.en: Yes, but construction in two stops. Bus transfer.
No problem.

dlg-chain-weekday-10.title: Chain 10/12: Stop at Grocery Store
dlg-chain-weekday-10.scene: 回家路上进超市买点菜。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: Do you have a loyalty card?

turns.cn: 有，手机号五五五一二三四。
一共十二块五，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Twelve fifty total. Need a bag?
Thank you. Good evening.

dlg-chain-weekday-11.title: Chain 11/12: Home Dinner
dlg-chain-weekday-11.scene: 到家后简单做晚饭，和室友聊天。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: You're back. How was today?

turns.cn: 累但还行，我炒个菜，二十分钟。

turns.en: I'll make rice. Eat together?
Don't forget deep clean this weekend.

dlg-chain-weekday-12.title: Chain 12/12: Tired at Bedtime
dlg-chain-weekday-12.scene: 晚上十一点，工作日结束，准备睡觉。（对话链：工作日）

chain.title: Weekday Out the Door
chain.titleCn: 对话链：工作日出门一天

turns.en: Still up? Seven AM tomorrow.

turns.cn: 马上，回完这封邮件就睡。

turns.en: Don't burn out. Health first.
Good night.

dlg-daily-01.title: Didn't Catch That
dlg-daily-01.scene: 收银员说话太快，你没听清总价。

turns.cn: 一共二十三块四，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Twenty-three forty. Need a bag?

turns.cn: 不好意思，能说慢一点吗？一共多少？

turns.en: Twenty-three forty.
Go ahead and tap.

dlg-daily-02.title: Ask to Spell It
dlg-daily-02.scene: 前台登记名字，你没听清怎么拼。

turns.en: How do you spell your last name?
And your first name?

turns.cn: W-e-i，伟。能写下来给我确认吗？

turns.en: Sure. Check if this looks right on the screen.

dlg-daily-03.title: Drive-Through Speaker
dlg-daily-03.scene: 快餐得来速喇叭声音模糊，你听不清。

turns.en: Welcome. Order when you're ready.

turns.cn: 对不起，喇叭不清楚，我开到窗口点可以吗？

turns.en: Sure. Please pull forward.

turns.cn: 要一个巨无霸套餐，可乐换水。
十二块八，第一家窗口付款。
turns.en: Twelve eighty. Pay at the first window.

dlg-daily-04.title: Confirm by Repeating Back
dlg-daily-04.scene: 医生前台口头告诉你预约时间，你复述确认。

turns.cn: 下周三四点十五，史密斯医生。
turns.en: Next Wednesday at four fifteen with Dr. Smith.

turns.cn: 我确认一下：三月二十号，周三，下午四点十五，对吗？

turns.en: Correct. Arrive fifteen minutes early.
No, it's a routine follow-up.

dlg-daily-05.title: Heavy Accent
dlg-daily-05.scene: 对方口音重，你礼貌请对方换种说法。

turns.cn: （快速指路）……turn at the light, ya know, the big ole building.
turns.en: …turn at the light, ya know, the big ole building.

turns.cn: 抱歉，我英语不太好，能再说简单一点吗？
红绿灯左转，白色教堂旁边。
turns.en: Left at the traffic light, by the white church.
About five minutes.

dlg-daily-06.title: Elevator Small Talk
dlg-daily-06.scene: 电梯里邻居跟你闲聊天气，你简单回应。

turns.en: Pretty cold today, huh?

turns.cn: 是啊，我差点忘了穿外套。

turns.en: They're saying snow this weekend.

turns.cn: 希望别太大，我还得去超市。

turns.en: Which floor?

turns.cn: 八楼，谢谢，Have a good one。

turns.en: You too!

dlg-daily-07.title: Excuse Me in Aisle
dlg-daily-07.scene: 超市过道被挡，你礼貌请人让路。

turns.en: Oh sorry. My cart was in the way.

turns.cn: 你找番茄酱？在那边尽头。
turns.en: Looking for ketchup? It's at the end there.
Sure thing.

dlg-daily-08.title: Bumped Into Someone
dlg-daily-08.scene: 你走路看手机撞到人，赶紧道歉。

turns.cn: 天哪，非常抱歉！您没事吧？

turns.en: I'm fine. Just watch where you're going.
It's okay. Go ahead.

dlg-daily-09.title: Hold the Door
dlg-daily-09.scene: 你帮别人扶门，简单寒暄。

turns.en: Thanks. My hands are full.
Busy day, huh?
Hang in there. Bye.

dlg-daily-10.title: Ending a Chat
dlg-daily-10.scene: 同事聊得正欢，但你有会要开，礼貌告辞。

turns.en: Going to the game this weekend?

turns.cn: 可能去，还没买票。我得走了，十点有会。

turns.en: Sure. Talk later.
Bye.

dlg-daily-11.title: Write It Down Please
dlg-daily-11.scene: 物业口头说一串步骤，你请对方写下来。

turns.cn: 先填表，再带ID去B窗口盖章，最后邮箱确认。
turns.en: Fill the form, get a stamp at window B with ID, then confirm by email.

turns.cn: 步骤有点多，能写在这张纸上吗？

turns.en: Sure. One, two, three.
Four PM.

dlg-daily-12.title: Coffee Line Chat
dlg-daily-12.scene: 咖啡店排队，前面的人跟你闲聊。

turns.en: This line's always long.
Do you come here often?
I recommend the oat milk latte.
You're welcome.

dlg-daily-13.title: Didn't Understand the Joke
dlg-daily-13.scene: 同事讲了个玩笑你没听懂，诚实询问。

turns.en: …so the PM said that's a feature!

turns.cn: 不好意思，我没get到，能解释一下吗？
就是说bug被说成新功能，行业老梗。
turns.en: It's when a bug gets called a new feature. Old industry joke.

turns.cn: 没事，我有时候也说太快。
turns.en: No worries. I talk too fast sometimes.

dlg-daily-14.title: Fast Food Counter Rush
dlg-daily-14.scene: 午餐高峰快餐店很吵，店员问你加什么。

turns.cn: 要加薯条还是沙拉？饮料多大？
turns.en: Fries or salad? What size drink?

turns.cn: 请等一下，你说薯条还是什么？

turns.en: Fries, medium drink.

turns.cn: 好的，薯条，中杯可乐，在这吃。
九块五，请拿号牌等叫号。
turns.en: Nine fifty. Take a number and wait.

dlg-daily-15.title: Is This the Right Line
dlg-daily-15.scene: 你不确定是否排对窗口，问后面的人。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这是办驾照换新的队吗？

turns.en: Yes, but you need a ticket from the kiosk first.
Kiosk by the door. Pick renewal.
Not too busy. Should be quick.

dlg-daily-16.title: Over the Phone Bad Connection
dlg-daily-16.scene: 手机信号不好，你听不清对方说什么。

turns.en: …reschedule to… afternoon…

turns.cn: 对不起，信号不好，您能大声一点吗？
我说改到周四下午三点。
turns.en: I said Thursday at three PM.

turns.cn: 周四三点，我重复一下对吗？

turns.en: Correct. Thank you.

dlg-daily-17.title: Tipping at Restaurant
dlg-daily-17.scene: 结账时你不确定小费该给多少，问朋友。

turns.cn: 服务不错，给百分之十八吧。
turns.en: Service was good. Let's do eighteen percent.

turns.cn: 账单五十八，小费大概多少？
十块出头，可以点屏幕上的百分比。
turns.en: A bit over ten. Tap the percentage on the screen.

turns.cn: 自取可不给，堂食一般要给。
turns.en: Takeout optional. Dine-in usually yes.

dlg-daily-18.title: Nurse Calls Your Name
dlg-daily-18.scene: 候诊区护士喊名字，你没听清是不是自己。

turns.en: Zhang? Zhang Wei?
Yes. Come with me for vitals.
Just roll up your sleeve.

dlg-daily-19.title: Holding the Elevator
dlg-daily-19.scene: 你进电梯，后面有人跑来，你帮忙按住开门。

turns.en: Thanks! Almost missed it.
Twelve, please.
Have a good one.

dlg-daily-20.title: Someone Cut in Line
dlg-daily-20.scene: 排队时有人插到你前面，你礼貌提醒。

turns.en: Oh sorry. I didn't notice.
Have you been waiting long?
It's packed today.

dlg-daily-21.title: ATM Instructions Fast
dlg-daily-21.scene: ATM语音提示太快，你没跟上选项。

turns.cn: 你好，机器提示太快，能帮我存款吗？

turns.en: Sure. Cash or check?
To checking. Here's your receipt.

turns.cn: 可以选中文界面，设置里。
turns.en: You can switch to Chinese in settings.

dlg-daily-22.title: Weather Small Talk Extended
dlg-daily-22.scene: 同事聊天气，你接话并问周末计划。

turns.en: It's blazing out there. Did you bring an umbrella?

turns.cn: 没有，预报说下午有雷雨。
我周末去海边，希望别下雨。
turns.en: I'm hitting the beach this weekend. Hope it doesn't rain.
What about you?

turns.cn: 在家休息，可能去健身房。

turns.en: Nice. See you Monday.

dlg-daily-23.title: Delivery at Door
dlg-daily-23.scene: 快递员敲门，你听不清他说什么。

turns.en: Package for Zhang. Sign here?
Signature. Sign right here.
Have a good one.

dlg-daily-24.title: Ask to Repeat the Price
dlg-daily-24.scene: 小贩报价太快，你没听清总价。

turns.en: Three for five, tax included.

turns.cn: 一共五美元吗？能再说一次吗？

turns.en: Yes, five flat.
Cards for ten or more.

dlg-daily-25.title: Nice to Meet You
dlg-daily-25.scene: 朋友把你介绍给新朋友，你打招呼。

turns.en: Hi, I'm Sarah. Nice to meet you.

turns.cn: 你好，我是张伟，也很高兴认识你。

turns.en: I heard you just moved here?

turns.cn: 对，上个月搬来的，还在熟悉环境。

turns.en: Feel free to ask if you need anything.
Sit with us later.

dlg-daily-26.title: Morning Greeting
dlg-daily-26.scene: 早上进公司，你和同事打招呼。

turns.en: Morning, Zhang Wei!
Yeah, meeting at nine.
It's fixed. I just made a cup.

turns.cn: 太好了，我去倒一杯。回头见。

turns.en: See you.

dlg-daily-27.title: How's It Going
dlg-daily-27.scene: 你在小区散步，碰到邻居打招呼。

turns.en: Hey Zhang Wei, how's it going?
Busy, but good.
Yeah. I'm walking the dog.

turns.cn: 那我不耽误你了，回头聊。

turns.en: Sure. Take care.

dlg-daily-28.title: Long Time No See
dlg-daily-28.scene: 你在超市偶遇很久没见的朋友。

turns.en: Zhang Wei? Long time no see!

turns.cn: 是啊，至少半年了吧？你好吗？

turns.en: Pretty good. I just started a new job.
A tech company downtown.
Definitely. I'll add you on WeChat.

dlg-daily-29.title: Introduction by Friend
dlg-daily-29.scene: 朋友聚会，主人介绍你认识其他客人。

turns.en: Hi, I'm Mike. John's friend.

turns.cn: John常提起你，说你是项目骨干。
turns.en: John mentions you a lot. Says you're key on the project.

turns.cn: 他过奖了，你们认识很久吗？

turns.en: College roommates. Over ten years.
Thanks for having us.

dlg-daily-30.title: Saying Goodbye Casually
dlg-daily-30.scene: 聊了几句后，你要离开跟朋友道别。

turns.cn: 我得走了，今晚很高兴见到你。

turns.en: Me too. Drive safe.
Shoot me a message.
Bye!
I'm heading out. See you tomorrow.
You too. Don't stay too late.
Okay. Bye.

dlg-daily-32.title: Apologizing for Being Late
dlg-daily-32.scene: 你约朋友喝咖啡迟到了，见面先道歉。

turns.cn: 对不起，路上堵车，让你等了。

turns.en: No worries. I just got here too.
Okay, work's busy. You?
Don't mention it. Let's order.

dlg-daily-33.title: School Pickup Greeting
dlg-daily-33.scene: 你接孩子放学，和其他家长打招呼。

turns.cn: 你好，你是小明的爸爸吧？
turns.en: Hi, you're Tommy's dad, right?

turns.cn: 对，我是张伟，你是Lily的妈妈？

turns.en: Yes. The kids play together a lot.

turns.cn: 是啊，谢谢你上次邀请生日会。

turns.en: You're welcome. We could do a playdate sometime.
Bye!

dlg-daily-34.title: Regular at Coffee Shop
dlg-daily-34.scene: 你是咖啡店熟客，店员跟你寒暄。

turns.en: Zhang Wei! The usual?
Chilly today. Careful, it's hot.
Have a good weekend.
Next!

dlg-daily-35.title: Meeting Room Small Talk
dlg-daily-35.scene: 会议还没开始，你和客户寒暄几句。

turns.en: Did you have a good drive over?

turns.cn: 挺顺利，谢谢。第一次来你们办公室，环境不错。

turns.en: Thank you. Coffee and water are over there.

turns.cn: 好的。今天您时间还够吗？

turns.en: An hour should be fine.

dlg-daily-36.title: Weekend Plans
dlg-daily-36.scene: 周五下午，同事问你周末有什么计划。

turns.en: Any plans for the weekend?

turns.cn: 可能去爬山，天气好的话。
不错，我带小孩去动物园。
turns.en: Nice. I'm taking the kids to the zoo.
Hope it's not too hot. Have a great weekend!
See you Monday.

dlg-daily-37.title: Formal Handshake
dlg-daily-37.scene: 商务活动上，你与对方正式见面握手。

turns.cn: 您好，我是David Chen，请多关照。
turns.en: Hello, I'm David Chen. Pleasure to meet you.

turns.cn: 您好，张伟，也很荣幸认识您。

turns.en: I hear you lead the Asia-Pacific market?
Likewise. Here's my card.
Let's stay in touch.

dlg-daily-38.title: Compliment and Response
dlg-daily-38.scene: 同事称赞你今天打扮，你礼貌回应。

turns.en: You look sharp today!
Nice tie.

turns.cn: 谢谢，你昨天汇报也很棒。

turns.en: Ha, thanks.

dlg-daily-39.title: Checking In on Someone
dlg-daily-39.scene: 听说同事家里有事，你见面关心一下。

turns.cn: 听说你父亲住院了，现在怎么样？

turns.en: Thanks for asking. He's stable now.

turns.cn: 那就好，有需要帮忙的说一声。

turns.en: Thanks. Everyone's been really helpful.
Thanks, Zhang Wei.

dlg-daily-40.title: See You Soon
dlg-daily-40.scene: 聚会结束，你和新朋友约好下次见面。

turns.en: I really enjoyed talking today.

turns.cn: 我也是，下次一起打球吧。
好啊，周六上午我常去社区球场。
turns.en: Sure. I'm usually at the community court Saturday mornings.
Cool. Save my number.
See you!

dlg-daily-41.title: Introducing Your Spouse
dlg-daily-41.scene: 朋友来访，你把爱人介绍给朋友认识。

turns.en: Hi Lisa. Nice to meet you.

turns.cn: 张伟常提起你，说你是大厨。
turns.en: Zhang Wei talks about your cooking all the time.

turns.cn: 她今晚做了中餐，随便吃。

turns.en: Thanks so much. Smells amazing.

dlg-daily-42.title: Introducing Your Kids
dlg-daily-42.scene: 邻居来访，你让孩子出来打招呼。

turns.en: Hi, kids! So cute.
What grade are you in?

turns.cn: 我家孩子在同一所学校。
turns.en: My kids go to the same school.

turns.cn: 那太好了，以后可能常见面。

dlg-daily-43.title: Merry Christmas
dlg-daily-43.scene: 圣诞节前，你在公司和同事互致节日问候。

turns.en: Merry Christmas, Zhang Wei!
Heading home for the holidays?

turns.cn: 在本地过，亲戚来我们家。

turns.en: Nice. Happy New Year in advance!
You too!

dlg-daily-44.title: Happy New Year
dlg-daily-44.scene: 新年第一个工作日，你和同事互相拜年。

turns.cn: 新年快乐！假期过得怎么样？
turns.en: Happy New Year! How was your break?
Went skiing. Tiring but fun.
Let's make it a good year.

dlg-daily-45.title: Happy Thanksgiving
dlg-daily-45.scene: 感恩节前，你和朋友简短互致问候。

turns.en: Happy Thanksgiving!

turns.cn: 感恩节快乐！你去谁家吃饭？

turns.en: My parents' house. You?

turns.cn: 在家做火鸡，请几个朋友。

turns.en: Awesome. Eat lots.

dlg-daily-46.title: Happy Birthday
dlg-daily-46.scene: 同事生日，你在办公室送上祝福。

turns.cn: 生日快乐！蛋糕看起来不错。

turns.en: Thank you! I didn't expect you to remember.

turns.cn: 日历上写了。有什么计划吗？

turns.en: Dinner with my husband tonight.

turns.cn: 好好享受，今天别加班太晚。

turns.en: Ha, I'll try. Thanks!

dlg-daily-47.title: Congratulations New Baby
dlg-daily-47.scene: 同事休完产假回来，你当面祝贺。

turns.cn: 谢谢！她很好，晚上还是常醒。
turns.en: Thanks! She's great. Still up a lot at night.

turns.cn: 恭喜当妈妈，照片真可爱。

turns.en: Thanks for everyone's gifts.

turns.cn: 有需要灵活办公就说一声。

turns.en: I really appreciate that.

dlg-daily-48.title: Welcoming Guests Home
dlg-daily-48.scene: 朋友第一次来你家，你门口迎接。

turns.en: Thanks for having me. Should I take off my shoes?
Your place is really cozy.
I brought a bottle of wine.

dlg-daily-49.title: Back from Vacation
dlg-daily-49.scene: 同事度假回来，你热情打招呼。

turns.cn: 欢迎回来！晒黑了不少啊。

turns.en: Ha, yeah. Hawaii.

turns.cn: 羡慕，邮件我尽量处理了。

turns.en: Thanks so much. Lunch is on me.
At lunch.

dlg-daily-50.title: Casual What's Up
dlg-daily-50.scene: 你在校园遇到同学，随意打招呼。

turns.en: Hey, what's up?
Same. Heading to the library.
Later!

dlg-daily-51.title: New Neighbor Moving In
dlg-daily-51.scene: 新邻居搬来，你上门自我介绍。

turns.cn: 你好，我是隔壁的张伟，欢迎搬来。

turns.en: Thank you! I'm Emily. Just moved in.

turns.cn: 有需要帮忙搬东西说一声。
太感谢了，这边垃圾哪天收？
turns.en: That's kind. Which day is trash pickup?
Got it. Nice to meet you.

dlg-daily-52.title: Thanks for Having Us
dlg-daily-52.scene: 聚会结束，你向主人道谢告别。

turns.cn: 别客气，你们能来我很高兴。
turns.en: Don't mention it. I'm glad you came.
I'm glad you liked it. Come anytime.
Good night. Drive safe.

dlg-daily-53.title: Graduation Congrats
dlg-daily-53.scene: 朋友大学毕业，你当面祝贺。

turns.en: Thanks! It's finally over.

turns.cn: 先找工作，可能留在这边。
turns.en: Job hunting. Maybe staying around here.

turns.cn: 需要推荐或改简历找我。

turns.en: I will. Thanks a lot.

dlg-daily-54.title: Get Well Soon Visit
dlg-daily-54.scene: 同事生病在家，你带水果探望。

turns.cn: 听说你感冒了，感觉怎么样？

turns.en: Much better. Thanks for visiting.
You're too kind. Don't worry about work.
Thanks, Zhang Wei.

dlg-daily-55.title: Greeting the Doorman
dlg-daily-55.scene: 你每天进出公寓，和门卫例行问候。

turns.en: Good morning, Mr. Zhang!

turns.cn: 早上好！今天有我的包裹吗？

turns.en: One. It's at the desk.
Have a good day!

dlg-chain-deliv-01.title: Chain 1/8: Decide What to Order
dlg-chain-deliv-01.scene: 周六晚上，你和室友商量晚饭点外卖。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: Cook tonight or order in?
How spicy can you handle?

turns.cn: 中辣，你点炒河粉我点绿咖喱。

turns.en: Okay. I'll place the order.

dlg-chain-deliv-02.title: Chain 2/8: Add Delivery Notes
dlg-chain-deliv-02.scene: 室友下单时问你送餐细节。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: What should I put in the delivery notes?

turns.cn: 走侧门，在停车场那边，到了打电话。

turns.en: How much tip?

turns.cn: 下单了，预计三十五分钟。
turns.en: Ordered. ETA thirty-five minutes.

dlg-chain-deliv-03.title: Chain 3/8: Driver Can't Find You
dlg-chain-deliv-03.scene: 外卖员打电话说找不到楼。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.cn: 喂，我是送您外卖的，找不到入口。
turns.en: Hi, I'm delivering your food. I can't find the entrance.

turns.cn: 走侧门，在停车场那边，我下来接你。

turns.en: Okay. I'm wearing a yellow rain jacket.
Here you go. Enjoy it while it's hot.

dlg-chain-deliv-04.title: Chain 4/8: Check the Order
dlg-chain-deliv-04.scene: 你拿外卖上楼，和室友核对袋子。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: Looks fine. Enough chopsticks?
At the bottom. Thai iced tea.

dlg-chain-deliv-05.title: Chain 5/8: Missing Item
dlg-chain-deliv-05.scene: 打开盒子发现少了一碗炒饭。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.cn: 我那份炒饭呢？只有咖喱和河粉。
turns.en: Where's my fried rice? Just curry and noodles.

turns.cn: 要不先吃我的河粉分你一半？
turns.en: Want half my noodles while we wait?
Receipt's in the bag.

dlg-chain-deliv-06.title: Chain 6/8: Call Support
dlg-chain-deliv-06.scene: 你打客服电话反映漏送。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.cn: 客服中心，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Customer support. How can I help?

turns.cn: 订单少了炒饭，能补送吗？
抱歉，我查一下……确实漏了。
turns.en: I'm sorry. Let me check. It was missed.

turns.cn: 二十分钟，给您退炒饭的钱。
turns.en: Twenty minutes. We'll refund the rice too.

dlg-chain-deliv-07.title: Chain 7/8: Resend Arrives
dlg-chain-deliv-07.scene: 补送的炒饭到了门口。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: Resend fried rice for Mr. Zhang?

turns.cn: 餐厅道歉了，祝您用餐愉快。
turns.en: The restaurant apologizes. Enjoy your meal.

dlg-chain-deliv-08.title: Chain 8/8: Rate the Order
dlg-chain-deliv-08.scene: 吃完后，App 弹出评价请求。（对话链：点外卖）

turns.en: How was the food? How many stars?

turns.cn: 咖喱不错，漏送扣一星，四星吧。
备注里写一下漏送处理了？
turns.en: Note that they fixed the missing item?
Order from them again?

dlg-chain-delv-01.title: Chain 1/8: Order on the App
dlg-chain-delv-01.scene: 晚上你用外卖 App 点餐。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.cn: 这家有满三十减五，凑一下？
turns.en: This place has five off thirty. Want to hit the minimum?

turns.cn: 地址还是咱家吧？门牌写清楚。
