turns.en: Same address? Make sure the unit number is clear.

turns.cn: 写了 3B，备注放门口别按铃，孩子在睡。

turns.en: Forty minutes estimated. Sounds good.

dlg-chain-delv-02.title: Chain 2/8: Track the Order
dlg-chain-delv-02.scene: 下单后你在 App 上看配送进度。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.en: Has a driver picked it up yet?

turns.cn: 还没，显示预计三十五分钟到。

turns.en: We can complain if it's late, right?

dlg-chain-delv-03.title: Chain 3/8: Driver Calls
dlg-chain-delv-03.scene: 骑手打电话说找不到楼。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.cn: 您好，外卖到了，3B 在哪？
turns.en: Hi, delivery here. Where's unit 3B?

turns.cn: 进大门左转，三楼右手边。

turns.en: What's the gate code?
Got it. Be right at your door.

dlg-chain-delv-04.title: Chain 4/8: Receive the Food
dlg-chain-delv-04.scene: 你开门取外卖。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.en: Your order. Please confirm.

turns.cn: 封好了，饮料单独袋子里。
turns.en: Yes. Drinks are in a separate bag.

turns.cn: 好，小费在 App 里给了。

turns.en: Thank you. Enjoy!

dlg-chain-delv-05.title: Chain 5/8: Wrong Item
dlg-chain-delv-05.scene: 打开发现少了一份饭，你联系客服。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.en: Support here. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 订单里两份炒饭只收到一份。
抱歉，我查一下……确实漏了，补送还是退款？
turns.en: Sorry. Let me check… You're right. Redeliver or refund?

turns.cn: 好的，二十分钟到，送您优惠券。
turns.en: Okay. Twenty minutes. We'll add a coupon for you.

dlg-chain-delv-06.title: Chain 6/8: Rate the Order
dlg-chain-delv-06.scene: 吃完后你在 App 上评价。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.cn: 味道不错，给骑手五星吧。
turns.en: Food was good. Five stars for the driver?

turns.cn: 行，虽然晚了几分钟但态度好。

turns.en: Four stars for the restaurant. Soup was salty.
We'll try a different place next time.

dlg-chain-delv-07.title: Chain 7/8: Grocery Delivery
dlg-chain-delv-07.scene: 你订了超市生鲜配送，配送员到了。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.cn: 生鲜配送，三袋，有冷冻品请尽快放冰箱。
turns.en: Grocery delivery. Three bags. Please refrigerate frozen items soon.

turns.cn: 我小心放的，您检查一下。
turns.en: I packed them carefully. Please check.
Leave bags for pickup at the door if you'd like.

dlg-chain-delv-08.title: Chain 8/8: Subscribe for Regular Delivery
dlg-chain-delv-08.scene: 你觉得牛奶配送方便，咨询定期送。（对话链：外卖配送）

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

turns.cn: 可以，选订阅每周一早上送。
turns.en: Yes. Subscribe for Monday morning delivery.

turns.cn: 提前一天在 App 里改就行。
turns.en: Change it in the app one day ahead.
All set. First delivery is tomorrow.

dlg-del-01.title: Food at the Door
dlg-del-01.scene: 外卖员到了，你下楼取餐。

turns.en: Hi, I have your DoorDash order.
Yes, Thai food. Please double-check it.
You already tipped in the app. Thank you!

dlg-del-02.title: Wrong Order
dlg-del-02.scene: 外卖送错了，你联系骑手。

turns.cn: 你好，这不是我点的，我点的是牛肉面。
抱歉，可能拿混了，我回去换。
turns.en: Sorry, I must have mixed it up. I'll go swap it.

turns.cn: 大概要多久？我已经很饿了。
十五分钟，餐厅会重做一份。
turns.en: About fifteen minutes. The restaurant will remake it.

turns.cn: 好的，到了请给我打电话。

turns.en: Will do. Sorry again!

dlg-del-03.title: Delivery Instructions
dlg-del-03.scene: 你打电话给外卖员说明送餐细节。

turns.cn: 喂，我是送您外卖的，找不到门。
turns.en: Hi, I'm delivering your food. I can't find the entrance.

turns.cn: 走侧门，在停车场那边，我下来接你。

turns.en: Okay. I'm wearing a red jacket.
Here you go. Enjoy it while it's hot.

dlg-del-04.title: Grocery Delivery
dlg-del-04.scene: 超市生鲜送到家，有商品缺货。

turns.cn: 您好，牛奶没货了，能换脱脂的吗？
turns.en: Hi, they're out of milk. Can I substitute skim?

turns.cn: 有，一打大的。香蕉太青，要换吗？
turns.en: Yes, a dozen large. The bananas are green. Want a swap?

turns.cn: 青的也行，放门口就行，我在开会。

turns.en: Okay. I'll send a photo when I arrive.

dlg-del-05.title: Late Delivery
dlg-del-05.scene: 外卖迟了四十分钟，你询问情况。

turns.cn: 客服中心，请问有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Customer support. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我的订单晚了四十分钟，还没送到。
抱歉，我查一下……骑手还在路上。
turns.en: I'm sorry. Let me check. The driver is still on the way.

turns.cn: 可以部分退款，并送您一张五元优惠券。
turns.en: We can offer a partial refund and a five-dollar coupon.

dlg-del-06.title: Wrong Item Delivered
dlg-del-06.scene: 外卖送来的饭菜和你点的不一致。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这份好像不是我的订单。
我核对一下单号……确实拿错了。
turns.en: Let me check the order number. I grabbed the wrong bag.

turns.cn: 我点的是鸡肉饭，这是牛肉面。
我回去换正确的，大概十五分钟。
turns.en: I'll swap it for the right one. About fifteen minutes.
No problem. Sorry for the trouble.

dlg-chain-dir-01.title: Chain 1/8: Lost on the Street
dlg-chain-dir-01.scene: 你在街上迷路了，向路人问路。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问百老汇大街怎么走？
往前直走两个路口，然后右转。
turns.en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn right.
About ten minutes.

turns.cn: 有，百老汇大街那头就有一个。
turns.en: Yes, there's one at the end of Broadway.

dlg-chain-dir-02.title: Chain 2/8: Which Way to Turn
dlg-chain-dir-02.scene: 你在十字路口，不确定该往哪边走。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 不好意思，中央车站是在这边吗？
不是，你得往回走，在第二个红绿灯左转。
turns.en: No, you need to go back and turn left at the second light.

turns.cn: 对，一直走到底就能看到。
turns.en: Yes, keep going until you see it.

turns.cn: 走路十五分钟，打车五分钟。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes walking, five by taxi.

dlg-chain-dir-03.title: Chain 3/8: Find the Subway
dlg-chain-dir-03.scene: 你想坐地铁，问地铁站入口在哪。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 前面那个绿色亭子就是。
turns.en: That green kiosk up ahead.

turns.cn: 下去看指示牌，N 线或 R 线。
turns.en: Check the signs downstairs. N or R train.

dlg-chain-dir-04.title: Chain 4/8: Inside a Building
dlg-chain-dir-04.scene: 你在一栋办公大楼里找会议室。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 你好，请问 1208 会议室在哪？

turns.en: Twelfth floor. Turn right out of the elevator.

turns.cn: 请在这本子上写名字和公司。
turns.en: Please write your name and company in this book.
On every floor, next to the elevators.

dlg-chain-dir-05.title: Chain 5/8: Map Not Working
dlg-chain-dir-05.scene: 手机导航不准，你向街边店员求助。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 不好意思，手机导航把我搞糊涂了，博物馆在哪边？
出店左转，过两座桥就到了。
turns.en: Left out of the store, past two bridges.
Yes, the one with the big steps.
About twelve or thirteen minutes.

dlg-chain-dir-06.title: Chain 6/8: Which Bus Line
dlg-chain-dir-06.scene: 你在公交站，不确定该坐哪辆车。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 去中央公园该坐哪路公交？

turns.en: The M10 heading north. Wait at this stop.
About every eight to ten minutes.
Just tap your card. Two seventy-five.

dlg-chain-dir-07.title: Chain 7/8: Taxi Going Wrong Way
dlg-chain-dir-07.scene: 出租车好像走反了，你礼貌提醒司机。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 不好意思，应该是在第五大道往南，不是往北。

turns.en: Oh, I'll loop around and turn up front.
Here we are. Thirty-Fourth Street entrance.

dlg-chain-dir-08.title: Chain 8/8: Arrive at Destination
dlg-chain-dir-08.scene: 你终于到了面试大楼，向保安确认楼层。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Hello. Who are you here to see?

turns.cn: 两点面试，ABC 科技，十二楼。
请登记，电梯需要刷卡，我帮您刷。
turns.en: Please sign in. The elevator needs a badge. I'll swipe you up.
Twelfth floor, turn left. Good luck.

dlg-chain-nav-01.title: Chain 1/8: Ask in a Store
dlg-chain-nav-01.scene: 你在便利店问附近地铁站怎么走。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，最近的地铁站在哪？
出门左转，走两个路口就到。
turns.en: Left out the door, two blocks down.
Line six. You'll see signs at the entrance.

dlg-chain-nav-02.title: Chain 2/8: On the Bus
dlg-chain-nav-02.scene: 你坐公交不确定在哪下车。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Fifth stop. I'll let you know.
Better pull it. Sometimes we skip if no signal.

dlg-chain-nav-03.title: Chain 3/8: Taxi Ride
dlg-chain-nav-03.scene: 你打车去朋友家，给司机指路。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: One twenty-eight Park Road?

turns.cn: 对，在第三个红绿灯右转。

turns.en: The blue apartment building?

turns.cn: 对，门口有棵大树，在那停。

turns.en: We're here. Twenty dollars.

dlg-chain-nav-04.title: Chain 4/8: Subway Exit
dlg-chain-nav-04.scene: 你出地铁后找不到出口，问工作人员。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 去现代艺术博物馆走哪个出口？
B 出口，上去后往北走。
turns.en: Exit B. Head north when you come up.
Five minutes. It's across the street.

dlg-chain-nav-05.title: Chain 5/8: Map App Confusion
dlg-chain-nav-05.scene: 导航把你带到死胡同，你向路人确认。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 手机导航说在这转，但路封了，图书馆怎么走？
施工呢，往回走绕到主街。
turns.en: Construction. Go back and loop around to Main Street.

turns.cn: 对，过两个路口看见钟楼左转。
turns.en: Yes. Two blocks past the clock tower, turn left.

dlg-chain-nav-06.title: Chain 6/8: Find Parking
dlg-chain-nav-06.scene: 你开车到市区找停车位。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 街边难，后面有个车库，入口在巷子里。
turns.en: Street parking's tough. Garage in the back, entrance in the alley.
Eight bucks. Cheaper after six.

dlg-chain-nav-07.title: Chain 7/8: Lost in the Mall
dlg-chain-nav-07.scene: 你在大型商场里找不到朋友说的餐厅。（对话链：问路）

turns.cn: 日式拉面店在几楼？叫一风堂。
四楼美食区，扶梯上去左转。
turns.en: Fourth floor food court. Up the escalator, turn left.

turns.cn: 饭点大概二十分钟，可以先取号。
turns.en: About twenty minutes at peak. You can get a number first.

dlg-chain-nav-08.title: Chain 8/8: Confirm with Friend
dlg-chain-nav-08.scene: 你快到了，打电话和朋友确认门牌。（对话链：问路）

turns.en: Almost here?

turns.cn: 在公园路了，是 45 号还是 45B？

turns.en: Forty-five B. Side entrance, blue doorbell.
Door's unlocked. Just come up.

dlg-dir-01.title: Finding a Street
dlg-dir-01.scene: 你在街上迷路了，向路人问路。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，请问百老汇大街怎么走？
往前直走两个路口，然后右转。
turns.en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn right.
About ten minutes.

turns.cn: 有，百老汇大街那头就有一个。
turns.en: Yes, there's one at the end of Broadway.

dlg-dir-02.title: Left or Right
dlg-dir-02.scene: 你在十字路口，不确定该往哪边走。

turns.cn: 不好意思，中央车站是在这边吗？
不是，你得往回走，在第二个红绿灯左转。
turns.en: No, you need to go back and turn left at the second light.

turns.cn: 对，一直走到底就能看到。
turns.en: Yes, keep going until you see it.

turns.cn: 走路十五分钟，打车五分钟。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes walking, five by taxi.

dlg-dir-03.title: Inside a Building
dlg-dir-03.scene: 你在一栋办公大楼里找会议室。

turns.en: Twelfth floor. Turn right out of the elevator.

turns.cn: 请在这本子上写名字和公司。
turns.en: Please write your name and company in this book.
On every floor, next to the elevators.

turns.cn: 请问苹果专卖店怎么走？

turns.en: Third floor. Take the escalator up and turn left.
Fourth floor, right across from the escalator.
Nine PM.

dlg-dir-05.title: Which Bus to Take
dlg-dir-05.scene: 你在公交站，不确定该坐哪趟车。

turns.cn: 你好，去唐人街坐哪路车？

turns.en: The M15, heading downtown.
Yes. It comes about every five minutes.

turns.cn: 运河街，我到了可以提醒你。
turns.en: Canal Street. I can let you know when we get there.

dlg-dir-06.title: Completely Lost
dlg-dir-06.scene: 手机没电了，你完全不知道自己在哪。

turns.cn: 警官您好，我迷路了，能帮我吗？

turns.en: Where are you trying to go? Do you have an address?

turns.cn: 我住万豪酒店，手机没电了。
酒店就在六个街区外，我指给您看。
turns.en: The hotel is six blocks from here. I'll point you the way.

turns.cn: 可以，沿这条街一直走，看到大钟楼就快到了。
turns.en: Yes. Go straight down this street until you see the big clock tower.

dlg-dir-07.title: Hospital Department
dlg-dir-07.scene: 你第一次去医院，找放射科拍片。

turns.en: Building B, second floor. Left out of the elevator.

turns.cn: 对，一楼大厅，带保险卡和ID。
turns.en: Yes, main lobby. Bring insurance card and ID.

turns.cn: 穿过这条走廊，过了咖啡店就是。
turns.en: Down this hall, past the coffee shop.

dlg-dir-08.title: DMV Inside the Building
dlg-dir-08.scene: 你在 DMV 大楼里找不到正确窗口。

turns.en: Get a ticket first. Pick renewal and wait.
Small room next to window seven.
To the right when you're done. No charge.

dlg-dir-09.title: Parking Garage Exit
dlg-dir-09.scene: 你在商场停车场找不到出口。

turns.cn: 不好意思，出口怎么走？我绕了两圈了。

turns.en: Follow the green Exit signs toward P2 east.

turns.cn: 票在车里插一下，十五分钟内免费。
turns.en: Insert your ticket. Free if under fifteen minutes.
No problem. I got lost here too.

dlg-dir-10.title: Ride-Share Pickup
dlg-dir-10.scene: 机场你想找 Uber 上车区。

turns.en: Terminal two, right outside, ground transportation.

turns.cn: 对，紫色标志，等司机说到了再走。
turns.en: Yes, purple signs. Wait until your driver says they've arrived.
About three minutes.

dlg-dir-11.title: How Far to Walk
dlg-dir-11.scene: 你问路人走到地铁站要多久。

turns.cn: 地铁站在步行距离内吗？
走大概七八分钟，两个街区。
turns.en: About seven or eight minutes, two blocks.
Yes, left at McDonald's.
Not really. I'd bring an umbrella.

dlg-dir-12.title: Where Is the Restroom
dlg-dir-12.scene: 你在餐厅商场找洗手间。

turns.cn: 走廊尽头左转，要钥匙吗？
turns.en: Down the hall and left. Do you need a key?

turns.cn: 不用，男女分开，标志清楚。
turns.en: No key. Men's and women's are marked clearly.
Yes, in the women's room.

dlg-dir-13.title: Airport Gate
dlg-dir-13.scene: 你在机场转机，找登机口。

turns.en: B thirty-two. Take the air train to concourse B.

turns.cn: 上楼跟着标志，五分钟一班。
turns.en: Upstairs, follow the signs. Runs every five minutes.

turns.cn: 起飞前四十分钟，屏上查。
turns.en: Forty minutes before departure. Check the screens.

dlg-dir-14.title: Finding a Store in Plaza
dlg-dir-14.scene: 你在露天商业广场找华人超市。

turns.en: Across the parking lot, by Target.
Three minutes. There's a covered walkway.

turns.cn: 晚上九点，节假日可能早。
turns.en: Nine PM, maybe earlier on holidays.

dlg-chain-drive-01.title: Chain 1/8: Enroll in School
dlg-chain-drive-01.scene: 你去驾校咨询报名。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 您好，想学车还是路考加强？
turns.en: Hi, are you starting from scratch or need road test prep?

turns.cn: 套餐含十节课加路考陪同，八百起。
turns.en: Packages start at eight hundred with ten lessons and test accompaniment.
Yes. Slots after six PM are available.

dlg-chain-drive-02.title: Chain 2/8: First Lesson
dlg-chain-drive-02.scene: 你第一次上驾校练车，教练在副驾驶。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 先调座椅和后视镜，系安全带。
turns.en: Adjust your seat and mirrors first. Buckle up.

turns.cn: 轻踩刹车，挂D档，慢慢松刹车。
turns.en: Press the brake lightly, shift to drive, and ease off the brake slowly.

turns.cn: 停车场里十五迈以内，看两边。
turns.en: Under fifteen in the lot. Watch both sides.

turns.cn: 对，提前三十英尺打转向灯。
turns.en: Yes. Signal at least thirty feet before you turn.

dlg-chain-drive-03.title: Chain 3/8: Parallel Parking
dlg-chain-drive-03.scene: 教练教你练习侧方停车。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 侧方停车是路考重点，慢慢来。
turns.en: Parallel parking is a big part of the road test. Take your time.

turns.cn: 对，倒车时看后视镜和右肩盲点。
turns.en: Yes. When backing up, check your mirror and blind spot over your right shoulder.

turns.cn: 十二英寸以内，车身平行。
turns.en: Within twelve inches, and parallel to the curb.

turns.cn: 没关系，开出来再练一次。
turns.en: That's okay. Pull out and try again.

dlg-chain-drive-04.title: Chain 4/8: Highway Driving
dlg-chain-drive-04.scene: 教练带你上高速练并线。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 上匝道加速，并入要看左后视镜。
turns.en: Speed up on the ramp. Check your left mirror before merging.

turns.cn: 打灯，找空隙，别犹豫太久。
turns.en: Signal, find a gap, but don't hesitate too long.

turns.cn: 限速六十五，我跟车距离够吗？

turns.en: Give more space. At least three seconds.

dlg-chain-drive-05.title: Chain 5/8: DMV Road Test
dlg-chain-drive-05.scene: 你在参加 DMV 路考。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 请出示练车许可和保险证明。
turns.en: Show me your learner's permit and proof of insurance.

turns.cn: 在这里。需要我演示灯光吗？

turns.en: No. Make a left at the intersection ahead.

turns.cn: 限速二十五，注意学校区域。
turns.en: Speed limit twenty-five. School zone ahead.
Parallel park up ahead.

dlg-chain-drive-06.title: Chain 6/8: Pass the Test
dlg-chain-drive-06.scene: 路考结束，考官告诉你结果。（对话链：学车）

turns.en: Congratulations. You passed.

turns.cn: 太好了！临时驾照现在就发吗？

turns.en: Yes. The real one mails in about two weeks.

turns.cn: 并线多看盲点，继续保持。
turns.en: Keep checking blind spots when merging. Well done.

dlg-chain-drive-07.title: Chain 7/8: First Solo Drive
dlg-chain-drive-07.scene: 你第一次独自开车，朋友在车上给你提醒。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 别紧张，跟平时练的一样。
turns.en: Don't stress. Same as practice.

turns.cn: 后面有车贴很近，我有点慌。
保持速度，必要时靠右让它过。
turns.en: Hold your speed. Move right if you need to let them pass.

turns.cn: 慢慢开，有灯闪的空位就行。
turns.en: Take it slow. Any spot with blinkers is fine.

dlg-chain-drive-08.title: Chain 8/8: Pulled Over
dlg-chain-drive-08.scene: 几周后尾灯坏了被拦下，你配合检查。（对话链：学车）

turns.cn: 晚上好，知道为什么拦您吗？
turns.en: Good evening. Do you know why I pulled you over?

turns.cn: 尾灯坏了，请出示驾照和保险。
turns.en: Your tail light is out. License and insurance, please.
Please stay in the vehicle. I'll be right back.
This is a warning. Fix it before you drive again.

dlg-drive-01.title: First Driving Lesson
dlg-drive-01.scene: 你第一次上驾校练车，教练在副驾驶。

turns.cn: 先调座椅和后视镜，系安全带。
turns.en: Adjust your seat and mirrors first. Buckle up.

turns.cn: 轻踩刹车，挂D档，慢慢松刹车。
turns.en: Press the brake lightly, shift to drive, and ease off the brake slowly.

turns.cn: 停车场里十五迈以内，看两边。
turns.en: Under fifteen in the lot. Watch both sides.

turns.cn: 对，提前三十英尺打转向灯。
turns.en: Yes. Signal at least thirty feet before you turn.

dlg-drive-02.title: Parallel Parking
dlg-drive-02.scene: 教练教你练习侧方停车。

turns.cn: 侧方停车是路考重点，慢慢来。
turns.en: Parallel parking is a big part of the road test. Take your time.

turns.cn: 对，倒车时看后视镜和右肩盲点。
turns.en: Yes. When backing up, check your mirror and blind spot over your right shoulder.

turns.cn: 十二英寸以内，车身平行。
turns.en: Within twelve inches, and parallel to the curb.

turns.cn: 没关系，开出来再练一次。
turns.en: That's okay. Pull out and try again.

dlg-drive-03.title: DMV Road Test
dlg-drive-03.scene: 你在参加 DMV 路考。

turns.cn: 请出示练车许可和保险证明。
turns.en: Show me your learner's permit and proof of insurance.

turns.cn: 在这里。需要我演示灯光吗？

turns.en: No. Make a left at the intersection ahead.

turns.cn: 限速二十五，注意学校区域。
turns.en: Speed limit twenty-five. School zone ahead.
Parallel park up ahead.

dlg-drive-04.title: Getting Pulled Over
dlg-drive-04.scene: 警察拦下你的车，你配合检查。

turns.cn: 晚上好，知道为什么拦您吗？
turns.en: Good evening. Do you know why I pulled you over?

turns.cn: 尾灯坏了，请出示驾照和保险。
turns.en: Your tail light is out. License and insurance, please.
Please stay in the vehicle. I'll be right back.
This is a warning. Fix it before you drive again.

dlg-drive-05.title: Buying a Used Car
dlg-drive-05.scene: 你看了一辆二手车，和卖家谈条件。

turns.en: It's a 2018 with eighty thousand miles. Eighty-five hundred.

turns.cn: 能试驾吗？保养记录有吗？

turns.en: Sure. Records are in the glove box.

turns.cn: 刹车有点响，能便宜五百吗？

turns.en: Eight thousand firm if you pay cash today.

turns.cn: 好，我明天带机械师再看一眼。
没问题，下午两点可以吗？
turns.en: No problem. Does two PM work?

dlg-drive-06.title: Parking Ticket
dlg-drive-06.scene: 你收到停车罚单，去市政网站咨询申诉。

turns.cn: 交通违章窗口，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Parking violations desk. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我收到一张罚单，但当时咪表是付过费的。
有付款收据或银行扣款记录吗？
turns.en: Do you have a receipt or bank charge record?

turns.cn: 填申诉表，附上截图，十四个工作日内答复。
turns.en: Fill out an appeal form with screenshots. You'll hear back in fourteen business days.

turns.cn: 可以先不交，批准后会撤销。
turns.en: You can wait. It'll be dismissed if approved.

dlg-drive-07.title: Highway Merging
dlg-drive-07.scene: 教练带你练习上高速并线。

turns.cn: 加速道要踩油门，匹配车流速度。
turns.en: Use the ramp to speed up and match traffic.

turns.cn: 后面有车很近，我还能并进去吗？
看后视镜和盲点，打灯，找空隙。
turns.en: Check your mirror and blind spot, signal, and find a gap.
Merge now and keep your following distance.
Signal early. Don't brake at the last second.

dlg-drive-08.title: Passed the Road Test
dlg-drive-08.scene: 你路考通过了，和教练分享好消息。

turns.cn: 我通过了！谢谢您这些周的指导。
恭喜！侧方停车那次很稳。
turns.en: Congratulations! Your parallel parking was solid.

turns.cn: 考官说我观察镜子做得好。
接下来去 DMV 换正式驾照。
turns.en: Next step is getting your full license at the DMV.

turns.cn: 好意心领了，路上永远安全第一。
turns.en: That's kind of you. Always put safety first on the road.

dlg-drive-09.title: DMV Check-In
dlg-drive-09.scene: 路考当天，你在 DMV 排队签到。

turns.cn: 路考预约？驾照和练车许可。
turns.en: Road test appointment? License and learner's permit.

turns.cn: 十点那场，车在外面停车场。
保险和登记有效吗？考官马上出来。
turns.en: Is insurance and registration current? Your examiner will be out shortly.

turns.cn: 正常，按练的来，打灯观察镜子。
turns.en: That's normal. Drive like you practiced. Signal and check mirrors.
Yes, but you might wait two weeks for the next slot.

dlg-chain-emer-01.title: Chain 1/8: Witness a Fall
dlg-chain-emer-01.scene: 路边有人摔倒，你上前查看。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.cn: 他刚倒下，要不要叫救护车？
turns.en: He just collapsed. Should we call an ambulance?

turns.cn: 要，我来打911，你看着别乱动他。

turns.en: He's still breathing.
Should I start CPR?

turns.cn: 有呼吸先别按，等接线员指示。

dlg-chain-emer-02.title: Chain 2/8: Call 911
dlg-chain-emer-02.scene: 你拨打紧急电话。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.en: 911, what's your emergency?

turns.cn: 有人摔倒了，好像昏迷了！
请告诉我您的具体位置。
turns.en: Please tell me your exact location.

turns.cn: 第五大道和42街交叉口，北边人行道。
救护车已派出，他会呼吸吗？
turns.en: An ambulance is on the way. Is he breathing?

turns.cn: 做得好，救援人员马上到。
turns.en: Good. Help is almost there.

dlg-chain-emer-03.title: Chain 3/8: Paramedics Arrive
dlg-chain-emer-03.scene: 救护人员到场，你简要说明情况。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.en: When did he go down?

turns.cn: 大概三分钟前，没撞到头。
有糖尿病或心脏病史吗？
turns.en: Any history of diabetes or heart problems?
Please step back. We need to examine him.

dlg-chain-emer-04.title: Chain 4/8: Minor Car Accident
dlg-chain-emer-04.scene: 你轻微追尾，和对方司机交涉。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.en: Are you okay?

turns.cn: 我没事，非常抱歉，是我的错。
我们交换一下保险信息吧。
turns.en: Let's exchange insurance information.

turns.cn: 好的，这是我的驾照和保险卡。

turns.en: I'll take some photos for the record.

turns.cn: 损坏不大，不用了，我联系保险公司。
turns.en: The damage is minor. No need. I'll contact my insurer.

dlg-chain-emer-05.title: Chain 5/8: Lost Wallet
dlg-chain-emer-05.scene: 你在商场发现钱包丢了，向保安求助。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.cn: 你好，我的钱包好像丢了。
什么时候最后见到的？什么颜色？
turns.en: When did you last have it? What color is it?

turns.cn: 二十分钟前在美食广场，黑色皮夹。
我查一下失物招领……还没有。
turns.en: Let me check lost and found. Nothing yet.

turns.cn: 里面有身份证和信用卡，需要挂失。
请先填这份遗失报告，有消息会联系您。
turns.en: Please fill out this report. We'll call if it turns up.

dlg-chain-emer-06.title: Chain 6/8: Cancel Cards
dlg-chain-emer-06.scene: 你打电话挂失信用卡。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.cn: 银行挂失专线，请报姓名。
turns.en: Card loss hotline. Your name, please?

turns.cn: 张伟，钱包丢了，要冻结所有卡。
已冻结，新卡五到七天寄到。
turns.en: They're frozen. New cards ship in five to seven days.

turns.cn: 最近交易能查吗？怕被盗刷。

turns.en: No suspicious activity today.

dlg-chain-emer-07.title: Chain 7/8: Fire Alarm
dlg-chain-emer-07.scene: 办公楼火警响起，保安指挥疏散。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.cn: 请走楼梯，不要使用电梯！
turns.en: Please use the stairs. Do not use the elevator!

turns.cn: 往前左转，到一楼集合点。
turns.en: Go straight and turn left. Assembly point is on the first floor.
We're not sure yet. Please evacuate first.

dlg-chain-emer-08.title: Chain 8/8: All Clear
dlg-chain-emer-08.scene: 疏散后确认是误报，保安通知可以回去。（对话链：紧急情况）

turns.cn: 各位，误报，可以有序回楼。
turns.en: Everyone, false alarm. You may return in an orderly way.

turns.cn: 可以，但建议走楼梯热身。
turns.en: Yes, but stairs are fine if you prefer.

turns.cn: 我电脑还在桌上，没事吧？

turns.en: All clear. Back to work as usual.

dlg-emer-01.title: Calling 911
dlg-emer-01.scene: 路边有人摔倒，你拨打紧急电话。

turns.en: 911, what's your emergency?

turns.cn: 有人摔倒了，好像昏迷了！
请告诉我您的具体位置。
turns.en: Please tell me your exact location.

turns.cn: 第五大道和42街交叉口，北边人行道。
救护车已派出，他会呼吸吗？
turns.en: An ambulance is on the way. Is he breathing?

turns.cn: 做得好，救援人员马上到。
turns.en: Good. Help is almost there.

dlg-emer-02.title: Car Accident
dlg-emer-02.scene: 你轻微追尾，和对方司机交涉。

turns.en: Are you okay?

turns.cn: 我没事，非常抱歉，是我的错。
我们交换一下保险信息吧。
turns.en: Let's exchange insurance information.

turns.cn: 好的，这是我的驾照和保险卡。

turns.en: I'll take some photos for the record.

turns.cn: 损坏不大，不用了，我联系保险公司。
turns.en: The damage is minor. No need. I'll contact my insurer.

dlg-emer-03.title: Lost Wallet
dlg-emer-03.scene: 你在商场发现钱包丢了，向保安求助。

turns.cn: 你好，我的钱包好像丢了。
什么时候最后见到的？什么颜色？
turns.en: When did you last have it? What color is it?

turns.cn: 二十分钟前在美食广场，黑色皮夹。
我查一下失物招领……还没有。
turns.en: Let me check lost and found. Nothing yet.

turns.cn: 里面有身份证和信用卡，需要挂失。
请先填这份遗失报告，有消息会联系您。
turns.en: Please fill out this report. We'll call if it turns up.

dlg-emer-04.title: Fire Alarm
dlg-emer-04.scene: 办公楼火警响起，保安指挥疏散。

turns.cn: 请走楼梯，不要使用电梯！
turns.en: Please use the stairs. Do not use the elevator!

turns.cn: 往前左转，到一楼集合点。
turns.en: Go straight and turn left. Assembly point is on the first floor.
We're not sure yet. Please evacuate first.
Don't run. Hold the handrail.

dlg-emer-05.title: Lost Child
dlg-emer-05.scene: 商场里孩子不见了，你向服务台求助。

turns.cn: 我的孩子走丢了，大概七岁，穿红色外套。
别慌，请说一下孩子姓名和您的电话。
turns.en: Stay calm. What's his name and your phone number?

turns.cn: 我们广播寻人，保安已在各出口查看。
turns.en: We'll make an announcement. Security is checking every exit.

turns.cn: 有人带孩子到服务台了，请确认是不是。
turns.en: Someone just brought a child to the desk. Please see if it's him.

dlg-emer-06.title: Heat Wave Warning
dlg-emer-06.scene: 极端高温天，社区中心开放避暑，你咨询。

turns.cn: 社区中心今天开放避暑，有水。
turns.en: The center is open as a cooling shelter today. We have water.

turns.cn: 可以带老人来吗？家里空调坏了。
当然，有椅子休息，宠物也可以。
turns.en: Of course. There are chairs to rest. Pets are welcome too.

turns.cn: 到晚上九点，或高温预警解除。
turns.en: Until nine PM or until the heat advisory ends.
Just medications and personal items.

dlg-chain-fun-01.title: Chain 1/8: Pick a Movie
dlg-chain-fun-01.scene: 你和朋友说今晚看电影，商量看哪部。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.en: Action or comedy?

turns.cn: 动作片吧，七点那场怎么样？
行，网上订票还是现场买？
turns.en: Sure. Book online or at the box office?
Okay. I'll check showtimes.

dlg-chain-fun-02.title: Chain 2/8: Buy Tickets
dlg-chain-fun-02.scene: 你在电影院售票处取票。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.en: Hi, which showtime?

turns.cn: 七点那场动作片，网上订了两张。

turns.en: Confirmation code, please?

turns.cn: 在这，能买爆米花套餐吗？
加十二块，七号厅在这边。
turns.en: Twelve more. Theater seven is this way.

dlg-chain-fun-03.title: Chain 3/8: Wrong Theater
dlg-chain-fun-03.scene: 你们进了影厅发现是错的，问工作人员。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.cn: 不好意思，我们应该是七号厅。
这是六号，七号在楼上左转。
turns.en: This is six. Seven is upstairs on the left.
Just previews. You still have time.

dlg-chain-fun-04.title: Chain 4/8: After the Movie
dlg-chain-fun-04.scene: 电影散场，你和朋友聊观后感。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.en: Did you see that ending coming?

turns.cn: 去打保龄球还是直接回家？
turns.en: Bowling or head home?

turns.cn: 走，我知道一家开到半夜。
turns.en: Let's go. I know a place open late.

dlg-chain-fun-05.title: Chain 5/8: Bowling Alley
dlg-chain-fun-05.scene: 你和朋友去保龄球馆。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.en: How many people, and how long?

turns.cn: 鞋码多少？租鞋每人五块。
turns.en: Shoe sizes? Rental is five per person.
Lane six is open. The screen keeps score.

dlg-chain-fun-06.title: Chain 6/8: Arcade Games
dlg-chain-fun-06.scene: 保龄球馆旁边有电玩，你去买游戏币。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.en: Forty. Fifty gets you ten bonus tokens.
Card or cash?

dlg-chain-fun-07.title: Chain 7/8: Late Night Snack
dlg-chain-fun-07.scene: 玩完你们去附近餐车买夜宵。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.en: What'll it be? Hot dog or fried chicken?
Anything to drink?
Fourteen dollars.

dlg-chain-fun-08.title: Chain 8/8: Head Home
dlg-chain-fun-08.scene: 深夜你们各自打车回家。（对话链：休闲娱乐）

turns.cn: 今晚玩得开心，你球技进步了。
turns.en: Fun night. Your bowling's getting better.
Sure. Let me know when you get tickets.
You too. Good night.

dlg-fun-01.title: Buying Movie Tickets
dlg-fun-01.scene: 你在电影院售票处买票。

turns.en: Hi, which showtime?
Middle back or closer to the front?

turns.cn: 中间靠后吧，有学生折扣吗？
出示学生证减两元，一共二十六。
turns.en: Two off with student ID. Twenty-six total.

turns.cn: 加十二块，七号厅在这边。
turns.en: Twelve more. Theater seven is this way.
Twenty-five. It's free on Wednesday evenings.

turns.cn: 三楼有古埃及展，含在门票里。
turns.en: Ancient Egypt on the third floor, included in admission.

turns.cn: 一般展区可以，不要开闪光灯。
turns.en: Yes in most areas. No flash, please.

dlg-fun-03.title: Concert Tickets
dlg-fun-03.scene: 你在线下票务点买演唱会票。

turns.en: Which artist's show?

turns.cn: 下周五泰勒·斯威夫特的，还有票吗？
只剩看台后排，每张一百二。
turns.en: Only upper deck left, a hundred twenty each.

turns.cn: 电子票发您邮箱，凭手机入场。
turns.en: E-tickets to your email. Show your phone at the gate.
Seven thirty. I'd arrive by six thirty.
How many people, and how long?

turns.cn: 鞋码多少？租鞋每人五块。
turns.en: Shoe sizes? Rental is five per person.

turns.cn: 八九十十一，我们要轻球。

turns.en: Lane six is open. The screen keeps score.
Yes. Menu's on the table.

dlg-fun-05.title: Streaming at Home
dlg-fun-05.scene: 你和室友商量晚上看什么。

turns.cn: 今晚看啥？我找到了一部新剧。
turns.en: What should we watch? I found a new series.

turns.cn: 悬疑的还是喜剧？我脑子累了。
喜剧吧，八集，每集半小时。
turns.en: Comedy. Eight episodes, thirty minutes each.

turns.cn: 行，我爆米花已经微波好了。
用谁的账号？我那边登不上了。
turns.en: Whose account? Mine won't log in.
Okay. Episode one is starting!

dlg-fun-06.title: Concert Tickets
dlg-fun-06.scene: 你在票务网站买演唱会票遇到问题。

turns.en: Ticketing support. Order number, please?

turns.cn: 我付款成功了，但邮箱没收到电子票。
请核对垃圾邮件文件夹。
turns.en: Please check your spam folder.

turns.cn: 看了，没有。能重新发送吗？
已重发，也可在账户订单里下载。
turns.en: I've resent them. You can also download from your order history.

turns.cn: 需补差价，我帮您查余票。
turns.en: That requires a price difference. Let me check availability.

dlg-chain-fam-01.title: Chain 1/8: Invite Family
dlg-chain-fam-01.scene: 你打电话邀请父母周日来家里吃饭。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 妈，周日来我们家吃饭吧？

turns.en: Sure. What time? Should we bring anything?

turns.cn: 中午十二点，人齐了就行，不用带。

turns.en: Your dad wants to bring fruit.

turns.cn: 行，那买点草莓孩子爱吃。

turns.en: Alright. See you Sunday.

dlg-chain-fam-02.title: Chain 2/8: Shop for Ingredients
dlg-chain-fam-02.scene: 周六你和配偶去超市买聚餐食材。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 爸妈来，咱做火锅还是炒菜？
turns.en: Parents are coming. Hot pot or stir-fry?

turns.cn: 火锅吧，热闹，买羊肉和蔬菜。

turns.en: Dipping sauce? Do we have sesame paste?

turns.cn: 没了，顺便买豆腐和粉丝。

turns.en: Orange juice and tea for drinks.

turns.cn: 好，再去买点零食给孩子。

dlg-chain-fam-03.title: Chain 3/8: Parents Arrive
dlg-chain-fam-03.scene: 周日父母到了，孩子在门口迎接。（对话链：家庭）

turns.en: We're here! We missed you all.

turns.cn: 快进来，外面冷，拖鞋在这。

turns.en: The kids have grown so much!

turns.cn: 是啊，去把水果洗一下给孩子吃。

turns.en: Need help in the kitchen?

turns.cn: 不用，你们先坐，马上开饭。

dlg-chain-fam-04.title: Chain 4/8: Cook Together
dlg-chain-fam-04.scene: 你和妈妈在厨房准备火锅。（对话链：家庭）

turns.en: I'll make the broth. You prep the vegetables.
Just until it changes color. Don't overcook it.

turns.cn: 要，你爸爱吃辣的，单独放辣椒油。
turns.en: Yes. Your dad likes spice—set chili oil aside for him.

dlg-chain-fam-05.title: Chain 5/8: Dinner Table Chat
dlg-chain-fam-05.scene: 一家人围桌吃饭聊天。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 最近工作怎么样？别太累。
turns.en: How's work lately? Don't overwork yourself.

turns.cn: 还行，项目快上线了，忙一阵就好。

turns.en: Are the kids adjusting at school?

turns.cn: 挺好的，老大交了新朋友。

turns.en: Good. Eat more—you've lost weight.

dlg-chain-fam-06.title: Chain 6/8: Family Photos
dlg-chain-fam-06.scene: 饭后你们拍全家福。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 来，站沙发前面，我设倒计时。
turns.en: Come on, stand in front of the couch. I'll set the timer.

turns.cn: 爸妈坐中间，孩子蹲前面。

turns.en: Three, two, one—smile!
This one's good. I'll post it in the family chat.

dlg-chain-fam-07.title: Chain 7/8: Video Call Overseas
dlg-chain-fam-07.scene: 晚上你和国外的兄弟姐妹视频。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 听得见吗？爸妈今天也在吧？
turns.en: Can you hear me? Are Mom and Dad there today?

turns.cn: 听得见，他们刚走，今天聚餐了。
羡慕，我这边凌晨，刚下班。
turns.en: Lucky you. It's the middle of the night here. Just off work.

turns.cn: 注意休息，春节能回来吗？

turns.en: I'll try. Tickets are pricey, but I want to come.

dlg-chain-fam-08.title: Chain 8/8: Clean Up Together
dlg-chain-fam-08.scene: 聚会结束，你和配偶收拾厨房。（对话链：家庭）

turns.cn: 今天挺成功的，剩菜不少。
turns.en: Today went well. Lots of leftovers.

turns.cn: 我洗碗，你打包剩菜放冰箱。

turns.en: Mom and Dad said they'll come again next month.
Deal. I'll take out the trash.

turns.cn: 欢迎！袋子五块，按磅称重。
turns.en: Welcome! Bags are five bucks, pay by the pound.
Honeycrisp and Fuji, up on that hill.
Sample in the orchard, just don't waste them.

turns.cn: 轻轻一拧就下来就是熟了。
turns.en: If it twists off easily, it's ready.

dlg-farm-02.title: Pumpkin Patch
dlg-farm-02.scene: 万圣节前夕你带孩子去南瓜农场。

turns.cn: 小南瓜三块，大的按磅算。
turns.en: Small pumpkins are three dollars. Big ones by the pound.

turns.cn: 雕刻南瓜，皮薄肉少的那种。
turns.en: Carving pumpkins, thin skin and less flesh.
Six PM. Come out before it gets too dark.

turns.cn: 每半小时一班，谷仓那边上车。
turns.en: Every half hour. Board by the barn.

turns.cn: 草莓四块五一磅，先领篮子。
turns.en: Strawberries are four fifty a pound. Grab a basket first.

turns.cn: 靠左边三行，红的捏柄轻摘。
turns.en: The three rows on the left. Pinch the stem on red ones.

turns.cn: 可以，别踩苗，别坐地上吃。
turns.en: Yes, but don't step on plants or sit and eat in the field.

turns.cn: 冷藏两三天，当天吃最好。
turns.en: Two or three days chilled. Best eaten today.

dlg-farm-04.title: Farmers Market Stand
dlg-farm-04.scene: 你在农贸市场直接向农场主买蔬菜。

turns.cn: 今早摘的番茄，三磅五块。
turns.en: Tomatoes picked this morning, five bucks for three pounds.
Certified organic, no spray.

turns.cn: 再来一把罗勒和六个玉米。
玉米十块一打，你要半打？
turns.en: Corn is ten a dozen. Want half a dozen?
Sure. Eighteen total.

dlg-farm-05.title: Petting Zoo
dlg-farm-05.scene: 你带孩子去农场喂小动物。

turns.cn: 喂山羊请用掌心，别捏饲料。
turns.en: Feed goats from a flat palm. Don't pinch the pellets.

turns.cn: 工作人员抱着，轻轻摸耳朵。
turns.en: Staff will hold it. Pet gently, not the ears.

turns.cn: 出口左边，摸完动物都要洗。
turns.en: Left of the exit. Wash after touching animals.
Four PM by the barn.

dlg-fish-01.title: Fishing License
dlg-fish-01.scene: 你在渔具店买钓鱼证和鱼饵。

turns.cn: 本州居民日证十二，年证二十八。
turns.en: In-state day license is twelve, annual is twenty-eight.

turns.cn: 我要年证，今天开始在湖边钓。
鲈鱼季节开放，蚯蚓在那边。
turns.en: Bass season is open. Worms are over there.

turns.cn: 十二英寸以下要放生，详情在册子里。
turns.en: Release under twelve inches. Details are in the booklet.
Good luck out there!

dlg-fish-02.title: On the Lake
dlg-fish-02.scene: 你在湖边钓鱼，向老钓友请教。

turns.cn: 大概十英尺，早晚鱼口好。
turns.en: About ten feet. Morning and evening bite best.

turns.cn: 鲫鱼用蚯蚓，鲈鱼试假饵。
turns.en: Worms for panfish. Try lures for bass.
Not from shore. Boats need registration.

dlg-fish-03.title: Catch and Release
dlg-fish-03.scene: 你钓到一条鱼，旁人教你放生。

turns.en: Nice one! Wet your hands before touching it.

turns.cn: 对，轻轻放回水里，托着肚子。
turns.en: Yes. Gently back in the water, supporting its belly.
Cut the line with pliers. Don't yank it.
Exactly.

dlg-fish-04.title: Ice Fishing
dlg-fish-04.scene: 冬天你在结冰湖面咨询冰钓安全。

turns.cn: 至少四英寸厚才行，这边刚测过。
turns.en: You need at least four inches. We measured here earlier.

turns.cn: 冰钻、小竿、保温椅，穿浮力衣。
turns.en: An auger, short rod, shelter chair, and a flotation suit.
Or small shiners. Lots of perch.

dlg-flea-01.title: Weekend Flea Market
dlg-flea-01.scene: 你在周末跳蚤市场淘旧货。

turns.en: Vintage lamp, forty dollars.
Thirty-five. That's as low as I go.

turns.cn: 昨天还亮着，你回家试试。
turns.en: It worked yesterday. Try it at home.
Yes. No card reader here.

dlg-flea-02.title: Thrift Store
dlg-flea-02.scene: 你在 Goodwill 二手店买衣服。

turns.en: Yellow tags are half off today.
Sixteen originally, eight with the discount.

turns.cn: 后面左边，一次最多五件。
turns.en: Back left. Five items at a time.

turns.cn: 七天内凭小票可换，不退现金。
turns.en: Exchange within seven days with receipt. No cash refunds.

dlg-flea-03.title: Garage Sale
dlg-flea-03.scene: 你路过邻居的庭院旧货甩卖。

turns.cn: 随便看，都是家里不用的。
turns.en: Look around. It's all stuff we don't need.
Twenty bucks. You carry it yourself.

turns.cn: 有点重，能帮我抬到车上吗？

turns.en: Sure. My son's home.

turns.cn: 再加这把椅子，一共三十？

turns.en: Sounds good. Thanks!

dlg-flea-04.title: Antique Negotiation
dlg-flea-04.scene: 你在古董市场看一个老式收音机。

turns.cn: 五十年代收音机，还能响，一百二。
turns.en: Fifties radio, still works, a hundred twenty.

turns.cn: 外观磨损挺厉害，八十怎么样？

turns.en: A hundred with the original knobs thrown in.

turns.cn: 我纯收藏，九十现金现在拿走。

turns.en: Ninety-five. Final price.

turns.cn: 懂货，下次有新品通知你。
turns.en: You know your stuff. I'll let you know when I get more.

dlg-flea-05.title: Selling Your Stuff
dlg-flea-05.scene: 你在跳蚤市场租摊位卖自己的旧物。

turns.cn: 这双鞋多大码？看起来挺新。
turns.en: What size are these shoes? They look almost new.

turns.cn: 九码，只穿过两次，十五块。

turns.en: Twelve cash?
Fine. Got a bag?
Thanks!

dlg-flea-06.title: Vintage Watch Deal
dlg-flea-06.scene: 你在集市看中一块老式手表，深入砍价。

turns.cn: 七十年代欧米茄，走时准，三百五。
turns.en: Seventies Omega, keeps good time, three fifty.

turns.cn: 表蒙有划痕，机芯没保养记录。
可以自己抛光，机芯我听着没问题。
turns.en: You can polish it. The movement sounds fine to me.
Three twenty with an extra strap.
Alright. You know watches.

dlg-flea-07.title: Estate Sale Haggle
dlg-flea-07.scene: 你在遗产拍卖最后一天淘家具。

turns.cn: 最后一天清仓，餐桌标价八十。
turns.en: Last day clearance. Dining table tagged at eighty.

turns.cn: 六十五，螺丝拧紧其实还行。
turns.en: Sixty-five. Tighten the screws and it's fine.

turns.cn: 椅子单卖四十一把，这价太低了。
turns.en: Chairs are forty each. That's too low.

turns.cn: 一百一，现金，车就在外面。

turns.en: Deal. We'll help you load.

dlg-flea-08.title: Bundle at the Swap Meet
dlg-flea-08.scene: 你在 swap meet 买多件旧物打包砍价。

turns.cn: 唱片五块一张，海报十块。
turns.en: Records five each, posters ten.

turns.cn: 我挑六张唱片两张海报，能打包吗？

turns.en: Fifty normally. I'll do forty-five.

turns.cn: 这张披头士封面有折痕，四十。

turns.en: Forty-two and I'll throw in a single.
Here's a shopping bag.

dlg-gdn-01.title: At the Nursery
dlg-gdn-01.scene: 你在园艺中心买阳台种菜苗。

turns.cn: 新手建议番茄和罗勒，好种。
turns.en: For beginners, try tomatoes and basil. They're easy.

turns.cn: 后院有土和肥料，盆在A区。
turns.en: Soil and fertilizer out back. Pots are in aisle A.
Water when the soil feels dry. Don't let it sit soggy.

turns.cn: 好的，这些苗能放车里吗？
可以，别暴晒，回家尽快种。
turns.en: Sure, just avoid direct sun. Plant them soon.

dlg-gdn-02.title: Lawn Care
dlg-gdn-02.scene: 你向邻居请教草坪发黄的问题。

turns.cn: 草坪一块块发黄，怎么回事？
可能是缺水或虫子，你多久浇一次？
turns.en: Could be drought or grubs. How often do you water?

turns.cn: 一周两次，每次二十分钟。
清晨浇更好，秋天可以补播草籽。
turns.en: Early morning is better. You can overseed in the fall.
Slow-release granules. Follow the bag directions.

dlg-gdn-03.title: Flower Shop
dlg-gdn-03.scene: 你在花店订一束生日花。

turns.cn: 要什么风格？玫瑰还是混搭？
turns.en: What style? Roses or a mixed bouquet?

turns.cn: 混搭，颜色亮一点，五十块左右。
可以加贺卡，明天中午送吗？
turns.en: We can add a card. Deliver tomorrow at noon?

turns.cn: 配送费八块，合计五十八。
turns.en: Delivery is eight dollars. Fifty-eight total.
Got it. We'll send a photo when it's done.

dlg-gdn-04.title: Pest on Plants
dlg-gdn-04.scene: 你家的室内植物长蚜虫，去园艺店求助。

turns.cn: 叶子背面有小绿虫，是什么？
像蚜虫，用肥皂水喷或买杀虫皂。
turns.en: Looks like aphids. Spray soapy water or use insecticidal soap.

turns.cn: 杀虫皂比较温和，喷完通风。
turns.en: Insecticidal soap is milder. Ventilate after spraying.
Once a week for three weeks.

dlg-gdn-05.title: Garden Tool Rental
dlg-gdn-05.scene: 你要翻修小院，在五金店租铲土机。

turns.cn: 租四小时七十，全天一百。
turns.en: Seventy for four hours, a hundred for the day.

turns.cn: 两百可退，驾照押复印件。
turns.en: Two hundred refundable. We copy your license.
Thirty dollars within ten miles.
Remember safety glasses and gloves.

dlg-golf-01.title: First Time at the Course
dlg-golf-01.scene: 你第一次去高尔夫球场，在前台登记。

turns.cn: 打过球场吗？需要租球杆吗？
turns.en: Have you played this course? Need club rentals?

turns.cn: 新手，租一套，上午九点开球。
球车和球僮另加，着装请有领衬衫。
turns.en: Cart and caddie are extra. Collared shirt required.

turns.cn: 停车场左边，一桶球八块。
turns.en: Left of the parking lot. A bucket is eight dollars.

dlg-golf-02.title: On the Tee
dlg-golf-02.scene: 你和同伴在第一洞开球，你不太会。

turns.en: You tee off first. Take your time and aim.

turns.cn: 三号木稳一点，一号木你以后再试。
turns.en: Three-wood for control. Try the driver later.

turns.cn: 没事，打定位球，记多一杆。
turns.en: No worries. Take a drop and add a stroke.
We all start that way.

dlg-golf-03.title: Golf Lesson
dlg-golf-03.scene: 你请教练上第一节入门课。

turns.cn: 先练握杆，左手在上，别太紧。
turns.en: Let's start with your grip. Lead hand on top, not too tight.
Feet shoulder-width, knees slightly bent.

turns.cn: 杆头先掠过草皮，再击球。
turns.en: Brush the grass first, then hit the ball.
Practice your short game. That's where scores drop fastest.

dlg-golf-04.title: At the Clubhouse
dlg-golf-04.scene: 打完九洞后，你在球会餐厅点餐。

turns.en: Finished your round? Hot one today, huh?

turns.cn: 是啊，来杯冰茶和俱乐部三明治。

turns.en: Want fries with that?
Drinks are free refills.

dlg-chain-groc-01.title: Chain 1/8: Make a List
dlg-chain-groc-01.scene: 周日早上，你和室友商量去超市买什么。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Fridge is empty. Grocery run?

turns.cn: 走，我要牛奶、鸡蛋、酱油、水果。

turns.en: I'll make the list. You drive?
Loyalty card's in your wallet, right?

dlg-chain-groc-02.title: Chain 2/8: Find Items
dlg-chain-groc-02.scene: 你在超市里找不到酱油，问员工。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.cn: 亚洲食品在七号，或者国际食品区。
turns.en: Asian foods in aisle seven, or the international section.

turns.cn: 七号中间货架，品牌不多。
turns.en: Middle shelf in seven. Not many brands.
Back wall coolers, far left.

dlg-chain-groc-03.title: Chain 3/8: Organic vs Regular
dlg-chain-groc-03.scene: 买苹果时，室友问你选哪种。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.cn: 有机苹果贵一块五一磅，买吗？
turns.en: Organic apples are a dollar fifty more per pound. Worth it?

turns.cn: 做沙拉买有机，煮的话普通就行。

turns.en: One bag of each?
That's everything on the list.

dlg-chain-groc-04.title: Chain 4/8: Self-Checkout Issue
dlg-chain-groc-04.scene: 自助收银机扫不了条码，你叫店员帮忙。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.cn: 不好意思，这个罐头扫不出来。
条码磨花了，我帮您手动输入。
turns.en: The barcode's worn. I'll key it in.

turns.cn: 称重的那袋苹果也卡住了。
请拿开重新放，绿灯亮了再扫别的。
turns.en: Remove it and place it again. Wait for the green light before scanning more.
Call me if anything else comes up.

dlg-chain-groc-05.title: Chain 5/8: Forgot Something
dlg-chain-groc-05.scene: 结完账发现忘了买面包，你回去拿。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: I'll grab it. Wait at the entrance?
Back in two minutes.

dlg-chain-groc-06.title: Chain 6/8: Checkout with Loyalty Card
dlg-chain-groc-06.scene: 你在收银台用会员卡结账。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Do you have a loyalty card?

turns.cn: 一共五十二块三，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Fifty-two thirty total. Need bags?
Insert or tap your card.

dlg-chain-groc-07.title: Chain 7/8: Parking Validation
dlg-chain-groc-07.scene: 离开前在客服台盖停车小票。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: May I see your receipt?
Stamped. First hour is free.

dlg-chain-groc-08.title: Chain 8/8: Unpack at Home
dlg-chain-groc-08.scene: 你们买完东西回家，一起往冰箱里放。（对话链：超市采购）

turns.en: Milk on the top shelf. Don't crush the eggs.

turns.cn: 酱油放调料架，水果洗一下。

turns.en: We shouldn't need groceries this week.
I'll prep the veggies.

dlg-chain-qgroc-01.title: Chain 1/8: Need One Item
dlg-chain-qgroc-01.scene: 做饭发现没酱油，你赶去楼下超市。（对话链：超市）

turns.cn: 调味品区，过道七，最上面一层。
turns.en: Condiment aisle seven, top shelf.
Yes. Green label next to it.

dlg-chain-qgroc-02.title: Chain 2/8: Self Checkout
dlg-chain-qgroc-02.scene: 你使用自助收银机结账。（对话链：超市）

turns.en: Need any help?

turns.cn: 我输代码，是低钠酱油对吧？
turns.en: I'll enter the code. Low-sodium soy sauce, right?
All set. Card reader's here.

dlg-chain-qgroc-03.title: Chain 3/8: Deli Counter
dlg-chain-qgroc-03.scene: 你在熟食柜台买切片火腿。（对话链：超市）

turns.en: Next! What can I get you?

turns.cn: 半磅蜂蜜火腿，切薄一点。
还要别的吗？芝士今天特价。
turns.en: Anything else? Cheese is on sale today.

turns.cn: 来四分之一磅瑞士芝士。

turns.en: Eight fifty total.

dlg-chain-qgroc-04.title: Chain 4/8: Bakery
dlg-chain-qgroc-04.scene: 你在超市面包房买新鲜面包。（对话链：超市）

turns.cn: 刚出炉的法棍，要试试吗？
turns.en: Fresh baguettes just out. Want one?
Want the baguette sliced?
Best while warm. Here you go.

dlg-chain-qgroc-05.title: Chain 5/8: Seafood Counter
dlg-chain-qgroc-05.scene: 你想买鱼，问海鲜部员工。（对话链：超市）

turns.cn: 三文鱼新鲜吗？两个人份量。
今早到的，两块这块大小刚好。
turns.en: Came in this morning. These two fillets are perfect.
Sure. Five minutes.

turns.cn: 好，我去挑蔬菜，一会儿回来取。

dlg-chain-qgroc-06.title: Chain 6/8: Price Check
dlg-chain-qgroc-06.scene: 货架标签掉了，你请员工查价。（对话链：超市）

turns.cn: 这罐番茄酱没标价，能查吗？
我扫一下……两块九，在打折。
turns.en: Let me scan… Two ninety-nine. It's on sale.
Need help carrying them?

dlg-chain-qgroc-07.title: Chain 7/8: Rain Check
dlg-chain-qgroc-07.scene: 特价鸡蛋卖光了，你问雨票。（对话链：超市）

turns.cn: 特价鸡蛋没了，能开 rain check 吗？
可以，下周内同款特价有效。
turns.en: Yes. Same sale price any time next week.
Correct. Present this at checkout.

dlg-chain-qgroc-08.title: Chain 8/8: Express Lane
dlg-chain-qgroc-08.scene: 你排队结账，前面顾客商品超限。（对话链：超市）

turns.cn: 快速通道十五件以内哦。
turns.en: Express lane is fifteen items or fewer.

turns.cn: 我数了一下十二件，可以吗？

turns.en: Sure. Membership number?

turns.cn: 积了两分，一共三十四块。
turns.en: Two points earned. Thirty-four total.
Do you have a loyalty card?

turns.cn: 一共四十八块五，要袋子吗？
turns.en: Forty-eight fifty total. Need bags?
Insert or tap your card.
No signature. Receipt's in the bag.

dlg-groc-02.title: Self-Checkout Problem
dlg-groc-02.scene: 自助收银机扫不了条码，你叫店员帮忙。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这个罐头扫不出来。
条码磨花了，我帮您手动输入。
turns.en: The barcode's worn. I'll key it in.

turns.cn: 称重的那袋苹果也卡住了。
请拿开重新放，绿灯亮了再扫别的。
turns.en: Remove it and place it again. Wait for the green light before scanning more.
Call me if anything else comes up.

dlg-groc-03.title: Asking for Aisle
dlg-groc-03.scene: 你在超市里找不到酱油，问员工。

turns.cn: 亚洲食品在七道，或者国际食品区。
turns.en: Asian foods in aisle seven, or the international section.

turns.cn: 七道中间货架，品牌不多。
turns.en: Middle shelf in seven. Not many brands.
Back wall coolers, far left.

dlg-groc-04.title: Weighing Produce
dlg-groc-04.scene: 你买散装葡萄，在秤上称重打价签。

turns.cn: 自助秤怎么用？第一次用。
选水果代码，放上去，打印贴纸贴袋上。
turns.en: Pick the produce code, place it on the scale, print the sticker for the bag.
Search grape on the screen. Four zero eight one.
Yes. Stick it on before you check out.

dlg-groc-05.title: Asian Market Fish Counter
dlg-groc-05.scene: 你在华人超市鱼档买清蒸鲈鱼。

turns.en: Which fish? Sea bass is fresh today.

turns.cn: 一条鲈鱼，帮忙去鳞去内脏，不切。

turns.en: Clean only? Steaming?

turns.cn: 一斤八块九，这条大概一斤半。
turns.en: Eight ninety a pound. This one's about a pound and a half.
Scallions are up front in produce.

dlg-groc-06.title: Return Without Receipt
dlg-groc-06.scene: 你买的酸奶坏了，没有小票要退货。

turns.en: Customer service. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 会员卡查得到购买记录吗？
turns.en: Can we look it up on your loyalty card?
Found it. Exchange or refund?
It'll go back to your original card.

dlg-groc-07.title: Price Match
dlg-groc-07.scene: 竞品超市同款更便宜，你要求 price match。

turns.cn: 这款麦片隔壁店卖三块九，你们能 match 吗？
请出示广告或手机页面。
turns.en: Please show the ad or the page on your phone.

turns.cn: 可以，我改价，同款限一包。
turns.en: Sure. I'll override it. One item per product.
New price three ninety.

dlg-groc-08.title: Gluten-Free Section
dlg-groc-08.scene: 你对麸质过敏，问员工无麸质面包在哪。

turns.cn: 十二道冷冻柜，绿色标签。
turns.en: Freezer aisle twelve. Green labels.
Yes, to avoid cross-contamination.
Aisle seven Asian section. Small tamari bottles.

dlg-groc-09.title: Bag Fee
dlg-groc-09.scene: 加州超市袋子收费，你跟收银员确认。

turns.cn: 需要袋子吗？每个十美分。
turns.en: Need bags? Ten cents each.

turns.cn: 要两个纸袋，我自己没带。

turns.en: Twenty cents added to your total.
Put heavy items on the bottom.

dlg-groc-10.title: Split Payment
dlg-groc-10.scene: 你想一部分用食品券一部分刷卡。

turns.cn: 能分开付吗？三十块用EBT，其余刷卡。

turns.en: Sure. Swipe EBT first.

turns.cn: EBT不能买这瓶维生素对吧？
对，维生素我单独扫，走信用卡。
turns.en: Correct. I'll ring vitamins separately on your card.
EBT is five short. Please cover the difference.

dlg-groc-11.title: Deli Counter
dlg-groc-11.scene: 你在熟食柜台买切片火鸡。

turns.en: Next. What can I get you?

turns.cn: 半磅低钠火鸡，切薄一点。

turns.en: Any cheese?

turns.cn: 再来四分之一磅瑞士奶酪。

turns.en: Seven twenty total.
Here you go.

dlg-groc-12.title: In-Store Pharmacy Pickup
dlg-groc-12.scene: 你在超市内药房窗口取处方药。

turns.en: Pickup or consultation?

turns.cn: 抗生素，饭后吃，每天两次。
turns.en: Antibiotic. Take with food, twice daily.
Avoid alcohol during the course.
Yes. Please swipe.

dlg-groc-13.title: Rain Check
dlg-groc-13.scene: 促销鸡蛋卖光了，你要 rain check。

turns.cn: 广告上鸡蛋一块九，货架空了，能开 rain check 吗？
可以，补货后两周内同价买两盒。
turns.en: Yes. Same price for two cartons within two weeks of restock.
Usually tomorrow morning.
Keep this slip and show it at checkout.

dlg-groc-14.title: Load Groceries to Car
dlg-groc-14.scene: 你买了很多东西，问店员能否帮忙推到车位。

turns.cn: 能帮我推到停车场吗？东西有点多。

turns.en: Sure. Where's your car?

turns.cn: 冷冻品放最后，我先装干货。
turns.en: I'll load dry goods first, frozen items last.
Much appreciated!

dlg-groc-15.title: Coupon Not Working
dlg-groc-15.scene: 结账时优惠券扫不进去。

turns.cn: 这张两美元优惠券怎么没用上？
要买指定品牌大包装才行。
turns.en: It requires the large size of the named brand.

turns.cn: 我换大瓶可以吗？还差什么？

turns.en: Large size is fine. I'll rescan.
Yes. Total forty-six.

dlg-groc-16.title: PA Announcement Unclear
dlg-groc-16.scene: 超市广播通知，你没听清，问员工。

turns.cn: 刚才广播说什么？要清场吗？
只是冷藏区降价，不是关店。
turns.en: Just a markdown in dairy, not closing.

turns.cn: 没事，听不清可以问我们。
turns.en: No worries. Ask us if you can't hear.

dlg-groc-17.title: Deli Number Called
dlg-groc-17.scene: 熟食柜台叫号，你没听清是不是你的。

turns.en: Number forty-seven! Forty-seven!

turns.cn: 我是四十七吗？刚才没听清。

turns.en: Yes. Here's your turkey.
No problem. Watch the screen next time.

dlg-groc-18.title: Unit Price Question
dlg-groc-18.scene: 两种规格牛奶，你问哪个更便宜。

turns.cn: 你看标签上每盎司价格，大瓶划算吗？
大瓶每盎司便宜三美分。
turns.en: The big one is three cents cheaper per ounce.
Then get the small one. Don't waste it.

dlg-groc-19.title: Lane Closed Redirect
dlg-groc-19.scene: 你排的收银通道突然关闭，店员指示换队。

turns.en: This lane is closed. Please use lane three.
Straight ahead on your left. Green light.
Sure.

dlg-groc-20.title: Senior Discount
dlg-groc-20.scene: 你帮父母结账，问是否有老人折扣。

turns.cn: 六十五岁以上百分之五，要ID。
turns.en: Five percent for sixty-five plus with ID.
Yes. Let me check the birth date.
Discount applied. Go ahead and pay.

dlg-groc-21.title: Gift Card Balance
dlg-groc-21.scene: 你在收银台查礼品卡余额。

turns.cn: 能查这张礼品卡还剩多少吗？

turns.en: Swipe… twelve thirty left.

turns.cn: 不够的话能刷卡补差吗？

turns.en: Yes. Gift card first.
Five sixty more.

dlg-groc-22.title: Sample Station
dlg-groc-22.scene: 试吃摊店员介绍产品，你部分没听懂。

turns.cn: 新口味酸奶，无添加糖，要试试吗？
turns.en: New yogurt, no added sugar. Want a sample?

turns.cn: 有乳糖，也有燕麦款在那边。
turns.en: This one has lactose. Oat version is over there.
Buy two get one. Here's a coupon.

dlg-chain-gym-01.title: Chain 1/8: Sign Up
dlg-chain-gym-01.scene: 你第一次去健身房，在前台办会员。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.en: Welcome! Is this your first time here?

turns.cn: 是的，我想了解一下会员套餐。
月卡四十九，年卡四百九十九。
turns.en: It's forty-nine a month, or four ninety-nine for the year.
It includes two free trial sessions.

turns.cn: 请填一下这张表，我带您参观一下。
turns.en: Please fill out this form, and I'll give you a tour.

dlg-chain-gym-02.title: Chain 2/8: Gym Tour
dlg-chain-gym-02.scene: 前台带你参观健身房各区域。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.cn: 左转，男女分开，带密码锁。
turns.en: Turn left. Men's and women's, with keypad locks.
You can rent one at the desk for a dollar.

turns.cn: 有氧区角落，祝锻炼愉快。
turns.en: By the cardio area. Enjoy your workout.

dlg-chain-gym-03.title: Chain 3/8: Wait for Treadmill
dlg-chain-gym-03.scene: 你想用跑步机，但有人在用。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.cn: 你好，这台跑步机你还要用很久吗？

turns.en: About five more minutes.
All done. It's all yours.

turns.cn: 谢谢！你知道哑铃区在哪里吗？
在后面，过那个双开门就是。
turns.en: In the back, just past those double doors.

dlg-chain-gym-04.title: Chain 4/8: First PT Session
dlg-chain-gym-04.scene: 你的第一节私教课，教练在指导你。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.cn: 先热身五分钟，慢跑或者跳绳。
turns.en: Let's warm up for five minutes, jogging or jump rope.

turns.cn: 好的。我今天主要练什么？
上肢和核心，先做三组俯卧撑。
turns.en: Upper body and core. Start with three sets of push-ups.

turns.cn: 标准俯卧撑我做不了几个。

turns.en: That's fine. Do them on your knees for now.

turns.cn: 做完这组感觉手臂好酸。
很正常，休息一分钟再继续。
turns.en: That's normal. Rest one minute and we'll continue.

dlg-chain-gym-05.title: Chain 5/8: Ask About Equipment
dlg-chain-gym-05.scene: 你想用史密斯机，不确定怎么调。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.cn: 不好意思，史密斯机安全扣怎么卡？
两边旋钮拧紧，杆别滑下来。
turns.en: Tighten both knobs so the bar won't slip.

turns.cn: 空杆先找感觉，再加十磅。
turns.en: Start with the empty bar, then add ten pounds.

dlg-chain-gym-06.title: Chain 6/8: Forgot Towel
dlg-chain-gym-06.scene: 练完后你在更衣室，发现忘带毛巾。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.cn: 不好意思，有多余的毛巾吗？
前台可以租，一美元一条。
turns.en: You can rent one at the front desk for a dollar.
Not at this hour. Go ahead.

dlg-chain-gym-07.title: Chain 7/8: After the Workout
dlg-chain-gym-07.scene: 你刚练完，在休息区和朋友聊天。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.en: How was your workout today?
How long did you work out?

turns.cn: 大概四十五分钟，主要练了腿。
要不要一起去喝杯蛋白奶昔？
turns.en: Want to grab a protein shake together?

dlg-chain-gym-08.title: Chain 8/8: Book Next PT
dlg-chain-gym-08.scene: 离开前，你跟教练约下次课。（对话链：健身房）

chain.title: A Full Gym Session
chain.titleCn: 对话链：健身房锻炼一次

turns.cn: 今天不错，要继续上私教吗？
turns.en: Good session today. Want to keep training with me?

turns.cn: 单次六十，十节套餐五百。
turns.en: Sixty per session, or five hundred for ten.

turns.cn: 先买十节，周三晚上行吗？
七点可以，我发日历给你。
turns.en: Seven PM works. I'll send you a calendar invite.

dlg-gym-01.title: First Day at the Gym
dlg-gym-01.scene: 你第一次去健身房，在前台办会员。

turns.en: Welcome! Is this your first time here?

turns.cn: 是的，我想了解一下会员套餐。
月卡四十九，年卡四百九十九。
turns.en: It's forty-nine a month, or four ninety-nine for the year.
It includes two free trial sessions.

turns.cn: 请填一下这张表，我带您参观一下。
turns.en: Please fill out this form, and I'll give you a tour.

dlg-gym-02.title: Using Equipment
dlg-gym-02.scene: 你想用跑步机，但有人在用。

turns.cn: 你好，这台跑步机你还要用很久吗？

turns.en: About five more minutes.
All done. It's all yours.

turns.cn: 谢谢！你知道哑铃区在哪里吗？
在后面，过那个双开门就是。
turns.en: In the back, just past those double doors.

dlg-gym-03.title: After the Workout
dlg-gym-03.scene: 你刚练完，在休息区和朋友聊天。

turns.en: How was your workout today?
How long did you work out?

turns.cn: 大概四十五分钟，主要练了腿。
要不要一起去喝杯蛋白奶昔？
turns.en: Want to grab a protein shake together?
Let's go. The place downstairs is pretty good.

dlg-gym-04.title: Personal Trainer
dlg-gym-04.scene: 你的第一节私教课，教练在指导你。

turns.cn: 先热身五分钟，慢跑或者跳绳。
turns.en: Let's warm up for five minutes, jogging or jump rope.

turns.cn: 好的。我今天主要练什么？
上肢和核心，先做三组俯卧撑。
turns.en: Upper body and core. Start with three sets of push-ups.

turns.cn: 标准俯卧撑我做不了几个。

turns.en: That's fine. Do them on your knees for now.

turns.cn: 做完这组感觉手臂好酸。
很正常，休息一分钟再继续。
turns.en: That's normal. Rest one minute and we'll continue.

dlg-gym-05.title: Locker Room
dlg-gym-05.scene: 练完后你在更衣室，发现忘带毛巾。

turns.cn: 不好意思，有多余的毛巾吗？
前台可以租，一美元一条。
turns.en: You can rent one at the front desk for a dollar.

turns.cn: 应该有空位，高峰时段要排队。
turns.en: There should be open stalls, but it gets crowded at peak hours.

turns.cn: 储物柜的锁是自带的吗？

turns.en: Yes, or you can buy one at the front desk.

dlg-gym-06.title: Personal Trainer
dlg-gym-06.scene: 你想请私人教练帮你制定训练计划。

turns.en: What's your fitness goal?

turns.cn: 想减脂，顺便增强核心力量。
每周能来几次？有无旧伤？
turns.en: How many days a week can you come? Any old injuries?

turns.cn: 每周三次，膝盖以前受过伤。
我们会避开高冲击动作，先评估体态。
turns.en: We'll avoid high-impact moves and assess your form first.

turns.cn: 单次六十，买十节送一节。
turns.en: Sixty per session, or buy ten and get one free.

dlg-gym-07.title: Renewing Membership
dlg-gym-07.scene: 你的健身房年卡快到期，前台劝你续费。

turns.cn: 您的年卡月底到期，续费有优惠。
turns.en: Your annual membership ends this month. Renewal is on sale.

turns.cn: 现在续四百五，比平时便宜五十。
turns.en: Four fifty if you renew now, fifty off the regular price.

turns.cn: 能暂停一个月吗？我要出差。
年卡可冻三十天，一年一次。
turns.en: Annual plans get thirty freeze days once a year.

turns.cn: 好，我续费，出差回来再冻。

turns.en: Thank you. You can pay by card right here.

dlg-gym-08.title: Trainer Package Renewal
dlg-gym-08.scene: 你的私教课快用完了，教练建议你续课。

turns.en: You have two sessions left. Want to keep going?

turns.cn: 效果不错，有套餐优惠吗？
二十节一千，相当于五十一节。
turns.en: Twenty sessions for a thousand, fifty per session.

turns.cn: 可以，周二四上午我还有空。
turns.en: Sure. Tuesday and Thursday mornings are open.
Great. Let's keep pushing!

dlg-gym-09.title: Free Trial Class
dlg-gym-09.scene: 你第一次来健身房，参加免费体验课。

turns.cn: 欢迎体验课！有旧伤或心脏病史吗？
turns.en: Welcome to your trial! Any injuries or heart conditions?

turns.cn: 膝盖以前扭伤过，其他没有。
好，今天做低冲击有氧加热身拉伸。
turns.en: Okay. Today we'll do low-impact cardio plus stretching.

turns.cn: 高峰可能要等，私教课优先。
turns.en: You might wait at peak hours. Training sessions get priority.

turns.cn: 今天办 waive 入会费，省五十。
turns.en: Sign up today and we waive the fifty-dollar enrollment fee.

dlg-gym-10.title: Asking for a Spot
dlg-gym-10.scene: 你做大重量卧推，请旁边的人帮忙保护。

turns.cn: 不好意思，能帮我spot一下吗？最后一组。

turns.en: Sure. How much weight?

turns.cn: 一百三十五，力竭帮我托起来就行。

turns.en: Got it. I'll stand behind you. Call it.
Nice work.

dlg-gym-11.title: Wipe Down Equipment
dlg-gym-11.scene: 工作人员提醒你练完要擦器械。

turns.cn: 练完请用消毒巾擦一下垫子。
turns.en: Please wipe down the bench when you're done.

turns.cn: 每个器械旁墙上，黄色桶里。
turns.en: On the wall by each station. Yellow bucket.
Thanks. Keeps it clean for everyone.

dlg-gym-12.title: Spin Class Booking
dlg-gym-12.scene: 你在前台预约动感单车团课。

turns.cn: 周三晚七点的spin还有三个位。
turns.en: Three spots left for Wednesday seven PM spin.

turns.cn: 帮我订一个，新手合适吗？

turns.en: Yes. You control your own resistance.
Ten minutes to adjust your bike.
Door closes five minutes after start.

dlg-gym-13.title: Working In
dlg-gym-13.scene: 卧推凳有人用，你问能否交替练。

turns.cn: 你还有多少组？能work in吗？

turns.en: Two sets. Sure. Go lighter if you need to.
No worries. We can alternate.
Sounds good.
Don't let your knees cave in. Keep your heels down.

turns.cn: 大腿平行地面，挺胸，先减重量。
turns.en: Thighs parallel to the floor. Chest up. Drop the weight.

turns.cn: 好多了，记住呼吸，下去吸气起来呼气。
turns.en: Much better. Breathe in down, out on the way up.
Two more. Form beats weight.

dlg-gym-15.title: Class Waitlist
dlg-gym-15.scene: 你想上的瑜伽课满了，前台帮你候补。

turns.cn: 周六上午瑜伽满了，要候补吗？
turns.en: Saturday morning yoga is full. Want the waitlist?

turns.cn: 提前两小时短信，确认才占位。
turns.en: Text two hours ahead. You must confirm to hold the spot.
Yes, and bring water.

dlg-gym-16.title: Protein Shake Bar
dlg-gym-16.scene: 练完你在健身房吧台点蛋白奶昔。

turns.cn: 要什么？巧克力还是香草？
turns.en: What'll it be? Chocolate or vanilla?

turns.cn: 香草，加一勺蛋白粉，少冰。

turns.en: Members get twenty percent off. Six forty.
Fifty cents extra.
Two minutes.

dlg-gym-17.title: Guest Pass
dlg-gym-17.scene: 你想带朋友来健身房体验一天。

turns.cn: 每月一次免费，额外十块一天。
turns.en: One free guest day per month. Extra days are ten bucks.

turns.cn: 朋友周六来，需要预约吗？

turns.en: Register their name at the desk and sign a waiver.
Guests are allowed. Book the class separately.

dlg-gym-18.title: Sauna Rules
dlg-gym-18.scene: 你第一次用健身房桑拿，问工作人员。

turns.cn: 不用预约，每次最多十五分钟，带毛巾垫坐。
turns.en: No booking. Fifteen minutes max. Sit on a towel.

turns.cn: 可以带水吗？手机能带吗？

turns.en: Water yes. Leave your phone. It overheats.
Yes, inside the locker rooms.

dlg-gym-19.title: Cable Machine Help
dlg-gym-19.scene: 你不会用绳索下拉器械，请教练示范。

turns.cn: 坐稳，大腿固定，把手拉到锁骨。
turns.en: Sit tight, thighs under the pad, pull to your collarbone.
Wide for beginners. Drive your elbows down.

turns.cn: 五十磅，十二次三组建控制。
turns.en: Fifty pounds. Three sets of twelve with control.

dlg-gym-20.title: Injury During Workout
dlg-gym-20.scene: 你拉伤肌肉，向前台要冰袋。

turns.cn: 我肩膀拉了一下，有冰袋吗？

turns.en: First aid kit. Sit here. Is it serious?

turns.cn: 应该不严重，先冰敷十五分。

turns.en: See a doctor if pain keeps up.
Need us to call a ride?

dlg-gym-21.title: Foam Rolling Area
dlg-gym-21.scene: 教练教你用泡沫轴放松大腿。

turns.cn: 练完腿要滚一下，慢，别压骨头。
turns.en: Roll your legs after leg day. Go slow. Avoid bone.

turns.cn: 有点酸正常，剧痛就轻一点。
turns.en: A little soreness is normal. Ease up if it's sharp pain.
Thirty seconds to a minute.

dlg-gym-22.title: Rowing Machine
dlg-gym-22.scene: 你第一次用划船机，问正确姿势。

turns.cn: 划船机顺序是什么？腿先还是手先？
腿、臀、手，回去顺序反过来。
turns.en: Legs, hips, arms out. Reverse on the way back.
No. Keep your back flat and core tight.
Yes. Don't yank hard at the start.

dlg-gym-23.title: Cancel Membership
dlg-gym-23.scene: 你搬家要取消会员，前台说明流程。

turns.cn: 我要搬家，能取消年卡吗？
提前三十天书面通知，可能收手续费。
turns.en: Thirty days written notice. There may be a fee.

turns.cn: 年卡不可转，月卡可以一次。
turns.en: Annual plans aren't transferable. Monthly allows one transfer.
Fill it out and we'll email confirmation.

dlg-gym-24.title: Lost Locker Key
dlg-gym-24.scene: 你弄丢了健身房储物柜钥匙。

turns.cn: 储物柜钥匙丢了，能开吗？

turns.en: With ID we'll cut the lock. Twenty-five dollars.

turns.cn: 里面有东西，现在能处理吗？

turns.en: Five minutes. Wait nearby.
Good idea. Five a month.

dlg-gym-25.title: Pilates Reformer
dlg-gym-25.scene: 你第一次上普拉提器械课。

turns.cn: 第一次上reformer？脚放栏上，轻弹簧。
turns.en: First reformer class? Feet on the bar, light springs.
Definitely. I'll modify moves for you.
Slow down. Breathe. Don't hold your breath.

dlg-gym-26.title: Deadlift Platform
dlg-gym-26.scene: 你想用硬拉台，有人在旁边休息。

turns.cn: 最后一组，两分钟让给你。
turns.en: Last set. I'll be done in two minutes.

turns.cn: 能一起用吗？我轻重量热身。

turns.en: Sure. Just stay out of the way.
Thanks.

dlg-hard-01.title: At Home Depot
dlg-hard-01.scene: 你在建材店买油漆和刷子。

turns.en: What are you looking for?

turns.cn: 卧室刷墙，要浅灰色乳胶漆。
多少平方英尺？我帮您算用量。
turns.en: How many square feet? I'll help you estimate.

turns.cn: 大概三百平方英尺，一遍够吗？
建议两遍，一加仑应该够。
turns.en: Two coats is better. One gallon should do it.
Aisle fourteen. I'll show you.

dlg-hard-02.title: Fixing a Leaky Faucet
dlg-hard-02.scene: 你在五金店问怎么修漏水龙头。

turns.cn: 厨房水龙头滴水，该换什么零件？
可能是垫圈老化，龙头什么牌子？
turns.en: Probably a worn washer. What brand is the faucet?

turns.cn: 这套修理包应该可以，八块九。
turns.en: This repair kit should work. Eight ninety-nine.

turns.cn: 对，先关水再拆，说明书在盒里。
turns.en: Yes. Turn off the water first. Instructions are in the box.

dlg-hard-03.title: IKEA Furniture
dlg-hard-03.scene: 你在宜家买书架并咨询配送。

turns.en: Need any help?

turns.cn: 这个书柜有现货吗？货号在这。
仓库有，您可以在那边取。
turns.en: Yes, in the warehouse. You can pick it up over there.

turns.cn: 能送货上楼吗？没有电梯。
配送四十九，含组装加九十九。
turns.en: Delivery is forty-nine. Assembly is ninety-nine extra.

turns.cn: 周六送到，请保持电话畅通。
turns.en: Saturday delivery. Please keep your phone on.

dlg-hard-04.title: Power Outage Supplies
dlg-hard-04.scene: 暴风雪预报，你去买应急用品。

turns.cn: 手电筒快卖完了，还要什么？
turns.en: Flashlights are selling fast. What else do you need?

turns.cn: 电池、蜡烛，还有便携式充电宝。
五号电池在那边，蜡烛在结账台。
turns.en: Double-A's are over there. Candles are at checkout.
A few left in camping.
Everyone says that. Stay safe!

turns.cn: 三分钟就好，每把三块钱。
turns.en: Three minutes. Three dollars each.

turns.cn: 这种型号可以，二十五块。
turns.en: Yes, for this model. Twenty-five dollars.

turns.cn: 那把钥匙也配了，一起付。

turns.en: All set. Try them out.

dlg-hard-06.title: Roof Leak Quote
dlg-hard-06.scene: 下雨天天花板渗水，你请屋顶工估价。

turns.cn: 阁楼看了，瓦片碎了两片，防水层老化。
turns.en: I checked the attic. Two shingles are cracked and the underlayment is worn.

turns.cn: 补几片就行还是要换整面？
局部修补八百，整面坡三千五。
turns.en: Spot repair eight hundred, full slope thirty-five hundred.

turns.cn: 两三年，之后可能还要换。
turns.en: Two or three years, then you may need more work.
I'll schedule Wednesday if it's dry.

dlg-hard-07.title: Gutter Cleaning
dlg-hard-07.scene: 你请工人清理秋天堵满的排水沟。

turns.cn: 两层楼，前后沟，报价一百八。
turns.en: Two stories, front and back gutters, a hundred eighty.

turns.cn: 里面树叶很多，下水管也通吗？

turns.en: Included. We'll flush and test drainage.
Ladders are fine. We're insured.
Sure. I'll remind you in September.

dlg-chain-hol-01.title: Chain 1/8: Halloween Costumes
dlg-chain-hol-01.scene: 十月底，你在派对用品店买万圣节服装。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 需要帮忙吗？今晚很多人买。
turns.en: Need help? It's busy tonight.

turns.cn: 有适合成人的吸血鬼套装吗？
中码在这，含披风和假牙。
turns.en: Medium is here. Cape and fangs included.
Aisle three. Get the waterproof kind.

dlg-chain-hol-02.title: Chain 2/8: Trick or Treat
dlg-chain-hol-02.scene: 万圣节晚上，孩子在你家门口讨糖。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Trick or treat!

turns.cn: 哇，好酷的宇航员！给你几块糖。

turns.en: Thank you!

turns.cn: 记得只说一份，别拿太多哦。

turns.en: Okay!

turns.cn: 晚上注意安全，让家长陪着。

dlg-chain-hol-03.title: Chain 3/8: Thanksgiving Invite
dlg-chain-hol-03.scene: 朋友邀请你感恩节去他家吃饭。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 感恩节来我家吧，火鸡管够。
turns.en: Come over for Thanksgiving. Plenty of turkey.
Perfect. Come around three PM.
Just come early to help set the table.

dlg-chain-hol-04.title: Chain 4/8: Thanksgiving Dinner
dlg-chain-hol-04.scene: 感恩节你去朋友家，帮忙准备晚餐。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 火鸡还要烤一小时，先喝点？
turns.en: The turkey needs another hour. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 好的，我能帮忙摆桌子吗？

turns.en: Silverware is in the cabinet. We need eight places.

turns.cn: 厨房岛台，等会儿一起切。
turns.en: On the kitchen island. We'll slice it later.

dlg-chain-hol-05.title: Chain 5/8: Black Friday Plans
dlg-chain-hol-05.scene: 感恩节饭后，朋友聊第二天黑五抢购。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Black Friday tomorrow. Are you lining up?

turns.cn: 网上买就行，不想凌晨排队。

turns.en: TVs are half off. I'm tempted.

turns.cn: 记得比价，有时候网上更便宜。

turns.en: Good point. I'll check.

dlg-chain-hol-06.title: Chain 6/8: Christmas Shopping
dlg-chain-hol-06.scene: 十二月在商场买圣诞礼物。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Would you like gift wrapping?
Red ribbon or gold?

turns.cn: 当然可以，请把祝福语告诉我。
turns.en: Sure. Tell me what to write.

dlg-chain-hol-07.title: Chain 7/8: Christmas Party
dlg-chain-hol-07.scene: 公司圣诞派对，你和同事聊天。（对话链：节日）

turns.en: Who did you get for Secret Santa?
I got a mug. Practical.
Eight. Dinner first.

dlg-chain-hol-08.title: Chain 8/8: New Year Wishes
dlg-chain-hol-08.scene: 跨年夜，你和朋友说新年计划。（对话链：节日）

turns.cn: 新年快乐！明年有什么打算？
turns.en: Happy New Year! Any resolutions?

turns.cn: 学一门新技能，也许吉他。
turns.en: Learn something new. Maybe guitar.
Deal. Happy New Year!

dlg-hol-01.title: Halloween Costumes
dlg-hol-01.scene: 十月底，你在派对用品店买万圣节服装。

turns.cn: 需要帮忙吗？今晚很多人买。
turns.en: Need help? It's busy tonight.

turns.cn: 有适合成人的吸血鬼套装吗？
中码在这，含披风和假牙。
turns.en: Medium is here. Cape and fangs included.
Aisle three. Get the waterproof kind.

turns.cn: 一共四十二块，祝你们玩得开心！
turns.en: Forty-two total. Have a spooky good time!

dlg-hol-02.title: Trick or Treat
dlg-hol-02.scene: 万圣节晚上，孩子在你家门口讨糖。

turns.en: Trick or treat!

turns.cn: 哇，好酷的宇航员！给你几块糖。

turns.en: Thank you!

turns.cn: 记得只说一份，别拿太多哦。

turns.en: Okay!

turns.cn: 晚上注意安全，让家长陪着。

turns.en: Bye!

dlg-hol-03.title: Christmas Shopping
dlg-hol-03.scene: 十二月在商场买圣诞礼物。

turns.en: Would you like gift wrapping?
Red ribbon or gold?

turns.cn: 当然可以，请把祝福语告诉我。
turns.en: Sure. Tell me what to write.
All set. Wrapping is free.

dlg-hol-04.title: Thanksgiving Dinner
dlg-hol-04.scene: 感恩节你去朋友家，帮忙准备晚餐。

turns.cn: 火鸡还要烤一小时，先喝点？
turns.en: The turkey needs another hour. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 好的，我能帮忙摆桌子吗？

turns.en: Silverware is in the cabinet. We need eight places.

turns.cn: 厨房岛台，等会儿一起切。
turns.en: On the kitchen island. We'll slice it later.

turns.cn: 你才是一家人，开动前先说感恩词。
turns.en: You're family. We'll say what we're thankful for before we eat.

dlg-hol-05.title: New Year Party
dlg-hol-05.scene: 跨年夜你在朋友家倒计时。

turns.en: Five minutes till midnight!
It's chilled. Everyone grab a glass.

turns.cn: 新年快乐！祝你明年一切顺利！

turns.en: Happy New Year! Health and prosperity!
Definitely!

dlg-hol-06.title: Buying a Christmas Tree
dlg-hol-06.scene: 你在户外圣诞树摊挑选树。

turns.cn: 云杉还是冷杉？云杉便宜一点。
turns.en: Spruce or fir? Spruce is a bit cheaper.

turns.cn: 六英尺，四十五块，帮你们绑车上。
turns.en: Six feet, forty-five dollars. We'll tie it to your car.
Yes, twenty-five, right over here.
Merry Christmas!

dlg-chain-home-01.title: Chain 1/14: Wake Up
dlg-chain-home-01.scene: 周末早上八点，室友来叫你起床。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 张伟，八点了，起来吃早饭吗？
turns.en: Zhang Wei, it's eight. Want to get up for breakfast?

turns.cn: 你不是要遛狗吗？九点前凉快。
turns.en: Aren't you walking the dog? Cooler before nine.

turns.cn: 对对对，我起来了，谢谢叫我。

turns.en: I started the coffee maker.

dlg-chain-home-02.title: Chain 2/14: Breakfast
dlg-chain-home-02.scene: 你在厨房做早餐，和家人聊今天安排。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Eggs or oatmeal?

turns.cn: 煎蛋吧，等下遛狗回来再订菜。

turns.en: Can you grab a carton of milk?

turns.cn: 下午大扫除，你负责卫生间？
turns.en: Deep clean this afternoon. You take the bathroom?

dlg-chain-home-03.title: Chain 3/14: Package at Door
dlg-chain-home-03.scene: 门铃响了，快递员送货。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Delivery! Anyone home?

turns.cn: 在的，请放门口就行，谢谢。
这个要签字，您方便开门吗？
turns.en: This one needs a signature. Can you open the door?
Sign here. Have a good weekend.

dlg-chain-home-04.title: Chain 4/14: Walking the Dog
dlg-chain-home-04.scene: 你带狗下楼散步，在小区遇见邻居。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Good morning! Your dog's full of energy.

turns.cn: 早上好，周末它特别兴奋。
那边草坪刚喷了药，别让它进去。
turns.en: They just sprayed the lawn over there. Keep it off.
Bye!

dlg-chain-home-05.title: Chain 5/14: Order Groceries
dlg-chain-home-05.scene: 遛完狗，你打电话订超市配送。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Grocery delivery. Account number, please?

turns.cn: 五五五一二三四，要牛奶和鸡蛋。
今天下午两点到四点可以吗？
turns.en: Today between two and four PM okay?
Tip through the app?

dlg-chain-home-06.title: Chain 6/14: Work from Home Call
dlg-chain-home-06.scene: 上午十点，你在家接同事电话。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Good time to talk?

turns.cn: 文档第三部分，截止下周五对吗？
turns.en: Part three of the doc — due next Friday, right?
Okay. Draft Monday.

dlg-chain-home-07.title: Chain 7/14: Lunch Delivery
dlg-chain-home-07.scene: 中午外卖送到门口。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Your delivery.
Yes. Enjoy your meal!
Check the small pocket in the bag.

dlg-chain-home-08.title: Chain 8/14: Neighbor Borrows Tool
dlg-chain-home-08.scene: 下午邻居敲门借工具。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 能借一下螺丝刀吗？我挂画。
turns.en: Can I borrow a screwdriver? I'm hanging a picture.
Thanks. Back in half an hour.

turns.cn: 物业说明天停水两小时。
turns.en: Management says water's off two hours tomorrow.

dlg-chain-home-09.title: Chain 9/14: Property Repair Call
dlg-chain-home-09.scene: 厨房水槽漏水，你打电话给物业报修。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 物业前台，请问什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Property management. How can I help?

turns.cn: 三零二厨房水槽下面漏水。

turns.en: How bad? Do you need to shut the main valve?

turns.cn: 不严重，一滴一滴，今天能派人吗？
维修下午两点到四点之间。
turns.en: Maintenance between two and four PM.

dlg-chain-home-10.title: Chain 10/14: Weekend Deep Clean
dlg-chain-home-10.scene: 下午你和室友分工做大扫除。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.cn: 大扫除开始，你卫生间我客厅？
turns.en: Deep clean time. You bathroom, me living room?

turns.cn: 可以，吸尘器在我房间，随便用。
清洁剂在厨房柜子下面。
turns.en: Cleaner is under the kitchen cabinet.
Pizza when we're done?

dlg-chain-home-11.title: Chain 11/14: Laundry and Trash
dlg-chain-home-11.scene: 大扫除后洗衣服、倒垃圾。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Is the washer free?

turns.cn: 空了，你用吧，我去倒垃圾。

turns.en: Separate recycling?
Thanks. Pizza when you're back.

dlg-chain-home-12.title: Chain 12/14: Cooking Dinner
dlg-chain-home-12.scene: 傍晚做晚饭，家人来帮忙。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: Smells great. Need help?
Did the milk delivery arrive?
Deep clean was tiring, huh?

turns.cn: 还行，吃完我们看剧放松。

dlg-chain-home-13.title: Chain 13/14: Watch TV Together
dlg-chain-home-13.scene: 晚饭后你和室友在客厅看剧闲聊。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: What should we watch? I found a new series.
Sure. I'll cast it. Want popcorn?
This episode's pretty funny.

dlg-chain-home-14.title: Chain 14/14: Good Night
dlg-chain-home-14.scene: 晚上十点，准备睡觉。（对话链：周末居家）

turns.en: What time's your alarm tomorrow?
I'll turn off the lights.
Good night.

dlg-chain-evening-01.title: Chain 1/6: Stop at the Gym
dlg-chain-evening-01.scene: 下班路上你顺路去健身房。（对话链：工作日晚上）

turns.en: Scan your membership card, please.

turns.cn: 六点后高峰，跑步机可能要等。
turns.en: Rush after six. Treadmills may have a wait.
Towels at the desk.

dlg-chain-evening-02.title: Chain 2/6: Pick Up Dinner
dlg-chain-evening-02.scene: 健身完，你到店取预订的外卖。（对话链：工作日晚上）

turns.en: Pickup? Last four of your phone?
Chicken salad. Dressing on the side.
Enjoy dinner!

dlg-chain-evening-03.title: Chain 3/6: Video Call with Family
dlg-chain-evening-03.scene: 到家后你和国内家人视频聊天。（对话链：工作日晚上）

turns.en: Did you eat? Don't live on takeout.

turns.cn: 吃了沙拉，今天还去了健身房。

turns.en: Good. It's cold. Dress warm.
Talk again on the weekend.

dlg-chain-evening-04.title: Chain 4/6: Chat with Roommate
dlg-chain-evening-04.scene: 吃饭时你和室友聊今天发生的事。（对话链：工作日晚上）

turns.en: How was your day?

turns.cn: 客户会还行，地铁回家绕路了。

turns.en: I'm traveling tomorrow. Back Friday.
I'll take trash out tomorrow morning.

dlg-chain-evening-05.title: Chain 5/6: Wind Down
dlg-chain-evening-05.scene: 晚饭后你在客厅放松，邻居来串门简短聊天。（对话链：工作日晚上）

turns.cn: 没打扰吧？听到你回来了。
turns.en: Hope I'm not bothering you. Heard you come in.

turns.cn: 不了，就说声周末烧烤来不来？
turns.en: No thanks. Weekend BBQ — you in?
Saturday four PM. Rooftop.

dlg-chain-evening-06.title: Chain 6/6: Ready for Sleep
dlg-chain-evening-06.scene: 十点半，你洗漱完准备休息。（对话链：工作日晚上）

turns.cn: 我先睡了，明天七点闹钟。
好，我明天一早出门，轻点。
turns.en: Okay. I leave early. I'll be quiet.
Good night.

dlg-home-01.title: Morning Routine
dlg-home-01.scene: 你和妈妈在卧室，该起床准备上学了。

turns.en: Time to get up! It's already seven o'clock.
No, you'll be late.
Go brush your teeth and wash your face.
Pancakes and milk. They're on the table.

dlg-home-02.title: Doing Chores
dlg-home-02.scene: 周六下午，爸爸让你帮忙做家务。

turns.cn: 能帮我把垃圾拿出去吗？
turns.en: Could you take out the trash for me?

turns.cn: 然后把你的房间收拾一下。
turns.en: And then clean up your room.

turns.cn: 我的房间已经很整洁了。

turns.en: There are clothes all over the floor.

turns.cn: 做得好！晚上请你吃披萨。
turns.en: Good job! I'll treat you to pizza tonight.

dlg-home-03.title: Asking for Help
dlg-home-03.scene: 你在书房写作业，遇到了难题。

turns.en: What's up?
Let me take a look.

turns.cn: 你需要先把这个方程式化简。
turns.en: You need to simplify this equation first.

turns.cn: 不客气。有需要随时叫我。
turns.en: You're welcome. Just let me know if you need anything.

dlg-home-04.title: Watching TV Together
dlg-home-04.scene: 晚上你和家人在客厅看电视选节目。

turns.en: What do you want to watch tonight?

turns.cn: 八点才开始，先看个电影怎么样？
turns.en: It doesn't start until eight. How about a movie first?

turns.cn: 在橱柜里，你自己微波一下。
turns.en: It's in the cabinet. Go microwave some yourself.

turns.cn: 爸，能把声音调小一点吗？

turns.en: Sure. Let's not wake your mom.

dlg-home-05.title: Fixing Something
dlg-home-05.scene: 家里水龙头漏水，你帮爸爸一起修。

turns.en: Hand me the toolbox, please.
Yes, and some tape too.
Turn it clockwise, but don't force it.

turns.cn: 干得不错，以后这种小事你也能自己搞定。
turns.en: Nice work. You'll be able to handle small fixes like this on your own.

dlg-home-06.title: Laundry Day
dlg-home-06.scene: 周末到了，妈妈教你用洗衣机。

turns.cn: 帮我把深色和浅色分开。
turns.en: Help me separate the darks and lights.

turns.cn: 这件白衬衫可以一起洗吗？
不行，白色单独洗，用冷水。
turns.en: No, wash whites separately in cold water.

turns.cn: 到这条线就行，别放太多。
turns.en: Up to this line. Don't use too much.

turns.cn: 这件毛衣只能晾干，其他的可以烘干。
turns.en: This sweater has to air-dry. The rest can go in the dryer.

dlg-home-07.title: Power Outage
dlg-home-07.scene: 家里突然停电，你打电话给电力公司。

turns.en: Power company. What's your address?

turns.cn: 我们已收到报告，是线路故障。
turns.en: We have a report. It's a line outage.

turns.cn: 预计两小时内，会发短信更新。
turns.en: About two hours. We'll text you updates.

turns.cn: 四小时以内一般没问题，尽量少开门。
turns.en: It should be fine for four hours if you keep the door closed.

dlg-home-08.title: Pest Control
dlg-home-08.scene: 家里发现蟑螂，你预约除虫服务。

turns.en: Pest control. Where's the problem?

turns.cn: 厨房和卫生间看到蟑螂。
建议全屋喷洒，宠物要送走吗？
turns.en: I recommend a full treatment. Do you have pets?

turns.cn: 有一只猫，需要离开多久？
喷洒后通风四小时再回。
turns.en: Ventilate for four hours before she comes back.

turns.cn: 十点可以，我提前十五分钟到。
turns.en: Ten o'clock works. I'll arrive fifteen minutes early.

dlg-chain-hosp-01.title: Chain 1/8: Call to Book
dlg-chain-hosp-01.scene: 你感冒发烧三天，打电话预约门诊。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.cn: 社区医院，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Community Clinic. How can I help you?

turns.cn: 我想预约看感冒，明天上午有空吗？

turns.en: Do you have your insurance card number?

turns.cn: 可以，请提前十五分钟到。
turns.en: Yes. Please arrive fifteen minutes early.
ID, insurance card, and a mask.

dlg-chain-hosp-02.title: Chain 2/8: Front Desk Check-in
dlg-chain-hosp-02.scene: 第二天你到了诊所前台。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.en: Here for an appointment?

turns.cn: 请填这张表，签字同意治疗。
turns.en: Please fill out this form and sign consent for treatment.

turns.cn: 过敏要写吗？我对青霉素过敏。

turns.en: Yes. Put it in section two.
Yes. We'll call your name.

dlg-chain-hosp-03.title: Chain 3/8: Nurse Triage
dlg-chain-hosp-03.scene: 护士先叫你进去量体温、量血压。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.en: Have a seat. What's bothering you?
Open your mouth and say ah. Let's take your temperature.

turns.cn: 三十八点二，比昨天高一点。

turns.en: The doctor will be right in. Wait here.

dlg-chain-hosp-04.title: Chain 4/8: See the Doctor
dlg-chain-hosp-04.scene: 医生进来详细问诊。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.en: When did the symptoms start?

turns.cn: 周一开始，越来越没力气。
听诊一下……肺里有点杂音。
turns.en: Let me listen. There's some congestion in your lungs.

turns.cn: 像是病毒感染，先不开抗生素。
turns.en: Looks viral. No antibiotics for now.

turns.cn: 多休息多喝水，我开些对症的药。
turns.en: Rest and fluids. I'll prescribe something for symptoms.

dlg-chain-hosp-05.title: Chain 5/8: Lab Test
dlg-chain-hosp-05.scene: 医生让你去检验科抽血。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.en: Have a seat. Left arm out, make a fist.

turns.cn: 需要空腹吗？我早上吃了面包。

turns.en: Not for this test. Just relax.

turns.cn: 两小时内在 App 里看。
turns.en: Within two hours on the app.

dlg-chain-hosp-06.title: Chain 6/8: Pick Up Prescription
dlg-chain-hosp-06.scene: 你拿着处方去医院药房。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.en: Pickup? Last name?

turns.cn: 一天两次饭后，可能犯困。
turns.en: Twice daily after meals. May cause drowsiness.

turns.cn: 第一次别开车，观察反应。
turns.en: Not the first time. See how you react.
Fifteen dollars. Card here.

dlg-chain-hosp-07.title: Chain 7/8: Pay and Check Out
dlg-chain-hosp-07.scene: 看完病，你回到前台结账。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.cn: 今天自付三十块，保险报其余。
turns.en: Your copay today is thirty dollars. Insurance covers the rest.
The doctor can write one. Want it?
Printed. Feel better soon.

dlg-chain-hosp-08.title: Chain 8/8: Follow-up Call
dlg-chain-hosp-08.scene: 三天后症状没好转，你打电话约复诊。（对话链：门诊看病）

chain.title: A Clinic Visit from Start to Finish

turns.cn: 社区医院，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Community Clinic. How can I help you?

turns.cn: 我周一来看过感冒，还没好，想复诊。

turns.en: Same doctor?

turns.cn: 对，王医生，明天下午行吗？
三点可以，请带之前的化验单。
turns.en: Three o'clock works. Bring your lab results.

dlg-hosp-01.title: Seeing a Doctor
dlg-hosp-01.scene: 你感冒发烧，去医院看门诊。

turns.en: What seems to be the problem?

turns.cn: 张嘴说「啊」，我检查一下喉咙。
turns.en: Open your mouth and say ah. Let me check your throat.

turns.cn: 喉咙很痛，吃东西也困难。
是病毒感染，多休息多喝水。
turns.en: It's a viral infection. Get plenty of rest and drink fluids.

turns.cn: 不需要，这是处方药，一天三次。
turns.en: No. Take this prescription three times a day.

dlg-hosp-02.title: Emergency Room
dlg-hosp-02.scene: 你摔伤了脚踝，来急诊室。

turns.en: What happened? Where does it hurt?

turns.cn: 疼痛等级一到十，你打几分？
turns.en: On a scale of one to ten, how bad is the pain?
Please take a wheelchair. The doctor will see you shortly.

turns.cn: 医生会判断，先填一下这张表。
turns.en: The doctor will decide. Please fill out this form first.

turns.cn: 社区医院，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Community Clinic. How can I help you?
Do you have your insurance card number?

turns.cn: 有的，下周四上午有空吗？

turns.en: Nine o'clock works. You'll need to fast beforehand.

turns.cn: 提前十五分钟，带身份证和保险卡。
turns.en: Fifteen minutes early, with your ID and insurance card.

dlg-hosp-04.title: Picking Up Prescription
dlg-hosp-04.scene: 你在医院药房取处方药。

turns.en: Hi, are you picking up a prescription?

turns.cn: 一天两次，饭后服用，共七天。
turns.en: Take it twice a day after meals for seven days.
It may cause drowsiness. Don't drive.

turns.cn: 最好先问我，有些不能混用。
turns.en: Ask me first. Some combinations aren't safe.

dlg-hosp-05.title: Follow-up Visit
dlg-hosp-05.scene: 你按预约来医院复查，向医生说明恢复情况。

turns.cn: 张先生，上次感冒后感觉怎么样？
turns.en: Mr. Zhang, how have you been since the cold?

turns.cn: 咳嗽好多了，但偶尔还会头晕。

turns.en: Are you still taking the medicine? How often?

turns.cn: 一天三次，昨天忘了一次。
尽量按时吃。我听听心肺。
turns.en: Try to stay on schedule. Let me listen to your heart and lungs.

turns.cn: 不用，两周后若无症状可以停药。
turns.en: No. You can stop the medicine in two weeks if you feel fine.

dlg-hosp-06.title: Clinic Check-In
dlg-hosp-06.scene: 你到医院诊所前台签到，职员说话很快。

turns.cn: 预约时间？保险卡请刷一下。
turns.en: Appointment time? Swipe your insurance card.

turns.cn: 三点，张伟。能再说一遍要刷什么吗？
保险卡，背面或正面芯片。
turns.en: Insurance card, chip or magnetic strip.
Thirty for specialist. Please wait in the lobby.
Yes. Listen for the announcement.

dlg-hosp-07.title: Blood Draw
dlg-hosp-07.scene: 护士给你抽血，你紧张并确认空腹。

turns.en: You fasted, right? Left arm, please.

turns.cn: 对，昨晚八点后就没吃。有点怕针。

turns.en: Relax. Quick pinch. Look away.
Two to three days in the patient portal.

dlg-hosp-08.title: Insurance Not Accepted
dlg-hosp-08.scene: 前台说你的保险不在网络内，你询问选项。

turns.en: Your plan is out-of-network. You'll pay more out of pocket.

turns.cn: 大概多多少？能写清楚吗？
估计多一百到两百，看项目。
turns.en: Roughly a hundred to two hundred extra, depending on services.

turns.cn: 能今天先看，账单以后再付吗？

turns.en: Yes. Sign a financial agreement.

dlg-hosp-09.title: Urgent Care Wait Time
dlg-hosp-09.scene: 你在 urgent care 问要等多久。

turns.cn: 目前等候大约四十五分钟。
turns.en: Current wait is about forty-five minutes.

turns.cn: 能先做登记吗？我喉咙很痛。

turns.en: Fill this out. ID and insurance card.

turns.cn: 一般是的，严重情况会去急诊。
turns.en: Usually yes. Severe cases go to the ER.

dlg-hosp-10.title: Prescription at Hospital Pharmacy
dlg-hosp-10.scene: 医生开药后，你在院内药房取药。

turns.cn: 张伟？抗生素，饭后吃，每天两次。
turns.en: Zhang Wei? Antibiotic with food, twice daily.

turns.cn: 七天，即使好了也要吃完。
turns.en: Seven days. Finish even if you feel better.
Yes. Card here.

dlg-chain-house-01.title: Chain 1/8: Schedule a Viewing
dlg-chain-house-01.scene: 你在网上看到一套公寓，打电话预约看房。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.en: Hello, Oak Apartments leasing.

turns.cn: 我想看一室一厅，明天下午有空吗？
三点可以，请问怎么称呼？
turns.en: Three PM works. May I have your name?

turns.cn: 身份证就行，到了前台登记。
turns.en: Just ID. Check in at the front desk.

dlg-chain-house-02.title: Chain 2/8: Apartment Tour
dlg-chain-house-02.scene: 中介带你参观公寓。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 欢迎，这套一室一厅，月租一千八。
turns.en: Welcome. This is a one-bedroom, eighteen hundred a month.

turns.cn: 水电费包含在房租里吗？
不含，暖气另算，大概每月八十。
turns.en: No, heat is separate, about eighty a month.

turns.cn: 可以养猫，狗需要额外押金。
turns.en: Cats are fine. Dogs require an extra deposit.

turns.cn: 下月一号，要先交一个月押金。
turns.en: The first of next month. One month's deposit required.

dlg-chain-house-03.title: Chain 3/8: Apply for Lease
dlg-chain-house-03.scene: 你看中了，问中介申请流程。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 我想申请这套，需要什么材料？
申请表、收入证明、推荐信。
turns.en: Application form, proof of income, and a reference letter.

turns.cn: 申请费多少？多久出结果？
五十块，通常三到五个工作日。
turns.en: Fifty dollars. Usually three to five business days.
I'll follow up once I receive it.

dlg-chain-house-04.title: Chain 4/8: Sign the Lease
dlg-chain-house-04.scene: 申请通过，你来签租约拿钥匙。（对话链：租房入住）

turns.cn: 恭喜通过，这是租约，请过目。
turns.en: Congratulations. Here's the lease. Please review it.

turns.cn: 租期一年，提前退租要赔一个月对吧？
对，首月房租加押金今天一起付。
turns.en: Correct. First month's rent plus deposit due today.

turns.cn: 可以，大门和信箱各一把。
