turns.cn: 物业办公室，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Property management. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我新搬来802，来办入住登记。

turns.en: Please show your lease and ID.

turns.cn: 登记后发两张，丢卡补办二十块。
turns.en: Two after registration. Replacement is twenty dollars.

turns.cn: 垃圾和快递规则有手册吗？

dlg-chain-prop-02.title: Chain 2/8: HOA Fee Question
dlg-chain-prop-02.scene: 你收到物业费账单，询问涨幅原因。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我收到物业费涨了，能解释一下吗？
今年电梯维修基金增加了每月二十块。
turns.en: The elevator reserve fund added twenty dollars a month this year.

turns.cn: 在业主网站上下载，上个月已通过。
turns.en: They're on the owner portal. The vote passed last month.

turns.cn: 登录业主账户，用银行卡即可。
turns.en: Log into your owner account and use a bank card.

dlg-chain-prop-03.title: Chain 3/8: Parking Permit
dlg-chain-prop-03.scene: 你向物业申请小区停车许可证。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我想办一张住户停车证。
请填表，附车辆登记和保险复印件。
turns.en: Fill out this form with a copy of registration and insurance.

turns.cn: 访客区两小时免费，超时会被拖。
turns.en: Guest spots are free for two hours. After that, towing is possible.

turns.cn: 有等候名单，目前要等两个月。
turns.en: There's a waitlist. About two months right now.

dlg-chain-prop-04.title: Chain 4/8: Pick Up Package
dlg-chain-prop-04.scene: 你的快递在物业快递室，你去取。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 你好，有我的包裹吗？姓张。

turns.en: A few. May I see your ID?

turns.cn: 这个大箱子是我的，能借小推车吗？

turns.en: Sure. Return it to the entrance when you're done.

turns.cn: 晚上九点，节假日到六点。
turns.en: Nine PM. Six on holidays.

dlg-chain-prop-05.title: Chain 5/8: Report a Repair
dlg-chain-prop-05.scene: 电梯坏了，你打电话报修。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: B座电梯卡在五楼不动了。

turns.en: Is anyone inside?

turns.cn: 没有，我刚走出来它就停了。
已通知维保，大概三十分钟到。
turns.en: Maintenance is notified. They'll be here in about thirty minutes.

turns.cn: 另一台电梯够用吗？早高峰怕挤。
会加保安维持秩序，抱歉不便。
turns.en: We'll have security manage the line. Sorry for the inconvenience.

dlg-chain-prop-06.title: Chain 6/8: Noise Complaint
dlg-chain-prop-06.scene: 楼上长期噪音，你向物业投诉。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我想投诉502长期深夜噪音。

turns.en: When does it happen? How long has it been going on?

turns.cn: 几乎每晚十一点后，两周了。
我们会发书面警告，请留记录。
turns.en: We'll send a written warning. Please keep a log.
You can, but check local laws on recording.

dlg-chain-prop-07.title: Chain 7/8: Renovation Permit
dlg-chain-prop-07.scene: 你要装修厨房，去物业办施工许可。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我想装修厨房，需要报备吗？
要，填施工表，交押金五百。
turns.en: Yes. Fill out a work form and pay a five-hundred-dollar deposit.

turns.cn: 工作日九点到六点，周末禁止噪音施工。
turns.en: Weekdays nine to six. No noisy work on weekends.
Within two weeks after final inspection.

dlg-chain-prop-08.title: Chain 8/8: Owners Meeting
dlg-chain-prop-08.scene: 物业通知开业主大会，你打电话确认。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 业主大会周六上午十点，社区活动室。
turns.en: The owners meeting is Saturday at ten AM in the community room.

turns.cn: 绿化改造和门禁升级预算。
turns.en: Landscaping upgrades and access control budget.

turns.cn: 不能到场能委托投票吗？

turns.en: Yes. Submit a proxy form in advance.

dlg-prop-01.title: HOA Fee Question
dlg-prop-01.scene: 你向物业前台询问管理费账单。

turns.cn: 物业办公室，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Property management. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我收到物业费涨了，能解释一下吗？
今年电梯维修基金增加了每月二十块。
turns.en: The elevator reserve fund added twenty dollars a month this year.

turns.cn: 在业主网站上下载，上个月已通过。
turns.en: They're on the owner portal. The vote passed last month.

turns.cn: 登录业主账户，用银行卡即可。
turns.en: Log into your owner account and use a bank card.

dlg-prop-02.title: Noise Complaint to Management
dlg-prop-02.scene: 楼上长期噪音，你向物业投诉。

turns.cn: 我想投诉502长期深夜噪音。

turns.en: When does it happen? How long has it been going on?

turns.cn: 几乎每晚十一点后，两周了。
我们会发书面警告，请留记录。
turns.en: We'll send a written warning. Please keep a log.
You can, but check local laws on recording.

dlg-prop-03.title: Package Room
dlg-prop-03.scene: 你的快递在物业快递室，你去取。

turns.cn: 你好，有我的包裹吗？姓张。

turns.en: A few. May I see your ID?

turns.cn: 这个大箱子是我的，能借小推车吗？

turns.en: Sure. Return it to the entrance when you're done.

turns.cn: 晚上九点，节假日到六点。
turns.en: Nine PM. Six on holidays.

dlg-prop-04.title: Parking Permit
dlg-prop-04.scene: 你向物业申请小区停车许可证。

turns.cn: 我想办一张住户停车证。
请填表，附车辆登记和保险复印件。
turns.en: Fill out this form with a copy of registration and insurance.

turns.cn: 访客区两小时免费，超时会被拖。
turns.en: Guest spots are free for two hours. After that, towing is possible.

turns.cn: 有等候名单，目前要等两个月。
turns.en: There's a waitlist. About two months right now.

dlg-prop-05.title: Elevator Out of Service
dlg-prop-05.scene: 小区电梯坏了，你询问物业维修进度。

turns.cn: 两部电梯都坏了，老人怎么上楼？

turns.en: We're very sorry. Parts arrive tomorrow.

turns.cn: 消防梯仅供搬运，需要预约。
turns.en: The freight elevator is for moves by appointment only.

turns.cn: 董事会讨论中，有更新会通知。
turns.en: The board is discussing it. We'll notify owners with updates.

dlg-rec-01.title: Sorting Recycling
dlg-rec-01.scene: 你不确定垃圾怎么分，问邻居。

turns.cn: 请问披萨盒是扔回收还是垃圾？
油污太多的话扔垃圾，干净部分撕下来回收。
turns.en: If they're greasy, trash. Tear off clean cardboard for recycling.
Yes, and screw the caps back on.
Wednesday morning. Blue bin at the curb.

dlg-rec-02.title: Electronics Recycling
dlg-rec-02.scene: 你去回收中心扔旧电脑和电池。

turns.cn: 电脑放那边，电池单独这边。
turns.en: Computers over there, batteries in this bin.

turns.cn: 硬盘里的数据需要先处理吗？
建议您自己清除，我们粉碎但不保证。
turns.en: We recommend you erase it yourself. We shred drives but can't guarantee.

turns.cn: 可以，电子垃圾免费回收。
turns.en: Yes. E-waste recycling is free.
No. We're open all day Saturday.

dlg-rec-03.title: Compost Bin
dlg-rec-03.scene: 社区推广厨余堆肥，你咨询怎么参加。

turns.cn: 想领厨余桶吗？每月五块。
turns.en: Want a compost bin? It's five dollars a month.

turns.cn: 果皮、咖啡渣、蛋壳，不要肉和油。
turns.en: Fruit peels, coffee grounds, eggshells. No meat or oil.

turns.cn: 可以，每周三放楼道收集点。
turns.en: Yes. Put it in the hall collection spot on Wednesdays.
Fill out this form. We'll deliver the bin next week.

dlg-rec-04.title: Donating Clothes
dlg-rec-04.scene: 你把旧衣服捐给慈善回收箱。

turns.en: Let me help if the bags are heavy.

turns.cn: 这些还能穿，鞋子也可以捐吗？
鞋子成对放，太破的不要。
turns.en: Shoes in pairs, please. Nothing too worn out.

turns.cn: 网站自助打印，估个总价就行。
turns.en: Print one from our website with an estimated value.
Thank you for donating!

dlg-chain-rem-01.title: Chain 1/8: Test Equipment
dlg-chain-rem-01.scene: 早上九点会议前，你检查摄像头和麦克风。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 九点的会，你设备测过了吗？
turns.en: Nine o'clock meeting. Did you test your setup?

turns.cn: 刚测，耳机正常，摄像头有点暗。

turns.en: Turn on a desk lamp. Keep the background tidy.
I sent the meeting link to your email.

dlg-chain-rem-02.title: Chain 2/8: Join the Stand-up
dlg-chain-rem-02.scene: 团队站会开始，主持人点名。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 张伟，昨天进展和今天计划？
turns.en: Zhang Wei, what did you finish yesterday and what's the plan today?

turns.cn: 昨天完成了测试，今天修两个 bug。

turns.en: Any blockers?

turns.cn: 需要设计稿确认，已私信设计师。

turns.en: Okay. Let's sync this afternoon.

dlg-chain-rem-03.title: Chain 3/8: Share Your Screen
dlg-chain-rem-03.scene: 你向客户演示方案，需要共享屏幕。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.en: Ready to walk us through it?

turns.cn: 好的，我共享屏幕，看得到吗？

turns.en: Yes. Please go to slide three.

turns.cn: 这页是核心功能，加载时间两秒。

turns.en: Does it work on mobile too?
Clear. Please continue.

dlg-chain-rem-04.title: Chain 4/8: Fix Audio Issues
dlg-chain-rem-04.scene: 会议中你的麦克风突然没声音。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 张伟，你静音了吗？听不到你。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, are you muted? We can't hear you.
How about now?
Yes. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 好，我刚才说的是截止日期。

dlg-chain-rem-05.title: Chain 5/8: Breakout Room
dlg-chain-rem-05.scene: 主持人把你们分到小组讨论室。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 咱们组讨论方案 B 对吧？
turns.en: We're discussing option B, right?
But launch would be two weeks later.

turns.cn: 可以分阶段，先上核心功能。
好，我记要点，五分钟后汇报。
turns.en: Good. I'll take notes. We report in five minutes.

turns.cn: 你来主讲，我补充技术细节。

dlg-chain-rem-06.title: Chain 6/8: One-on-One with Boss
dlg-chain-rem-06.scene: 下午你和老板视频一对一。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 最近远程协作还顺利吗？
turns.en: How's remote collaboration going lately?

turns.cn: 总体顺利，有时时差开会比较累。

turns.en: Anything you need support with?

turns.cn: 希望减少不必要的会，留时间写代码。
合理，我会注意。继续保持。
turns.en: Fair point. I'll watch that. Keep up the good work.

dlg-chain-rem-07.title: Chain 7/8: Record the Meeting
dlg-chain-rem-07.scene: 培训会需要录制，你向组织者确认。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 这次培训会要录屏，可以吗？
turns.en: We'll record this training session. Is that okay?

turns.cn: 上传到内网，只有团队能看。
turns.en: Internal site. Team access only.

turns.cn: 好，我关一下通知避免弹窗。

turns.en: Thanks. Starting now.

dlg-chain-rem-08.title: Chain 8/8: Send Meeting Notes
dlg-chain-rem-08.scene: 会议结束，你在群里发纪要。（对话链：远程会议）

chain.title: A Remote Workday of Video Meetings

turns.cn: 纪要发群了，请确认行动项。
看到了，我周五前交报告。
turns.en: Got it. I'll submit the report by Friday.

turns.cn: 设计稿周三前定稿对吧？
对，有问题随时 ping 我。
turns.en: Right. Ping me if anything comes up.
You too. See you tomorrow.

dlg-rem-01.title: Zoom Meeting
dlg-rem-01.scene: 远程会议开始时你的麦克风没声音。

turns.cn: 张伟，你静音了吗？我们听不到你。
turns.en: Zhang Wei, are you muted? We can't hear you.

turns.cn: 可以了，你先分享一下屏幕。
turns.en: Yes. Go ahead and share your screen.
Could you zoom in a bit?
Perfect. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 聊天区有问题可以打字。
turns.en: Type questions in the chat if you have any.

turns.cn: 教授，第三张幻灯片公式能再讲一遍吗？

turns.en: Sure. Let me go back to that slide.

turns.cn: 二十四小时内上传到课程网站。
turns.en: Within twenty-four hours on the course site.

turns.cn: 作业还是周日截止对吧？

turns.en: Yes. Submit by eleven PM.

dlg-rem-03.title: Working from Home
dlg-rem-03.scene: 你在家办公，经理视频检查进度。

turns.en: How's working from home going today?

turns.cn: 顺利，上午完成了报告初稿。
下午三点有个客户会，能上线吗？
turns.en: There's a client call at three PM. Can you join?

turns.cn: 可以，链接发我邮箱就行。
背景有点吵，是孩子在吗？
turns.en: It's a bit noisy. Kids at home?
No problem. Thanks for your flexibility.

dlg-rem-04.title: IT Support Remote
dlg-rem-04.scene: 你电脑远程办公连不上公司VPN。

turns.en: IT support. What's wrong with the VPN?

turns.cn: 一直转圈连不上，密码刚改过。
新密码同步要等十五分钟，再试。
turns.en: New passwords take fifteen minutes to sync. Try again.

turns.cn: 我远程控制你桌面，请点允许。
turns.en: I'll remote into your desktop. Please click allow.

turns.cn: 别关客户端，有问题再打电话。
turns.en: Keep the client open. Call if it drops again.
Can you see and hear me clearly?

turns.cn: 很清楚，谢谢您安排时间。
请简单介绍自己和最近的项目。
turns.en: Please introduce yourself and your recent projects.

turns.cn: 我是软件工程师，最近在做支付系统重构。
如果网络断了我会重拨。
turns.en: If we get disconnected, I'll call you back.
Let's move on to technical questions.

dlg-chain-rest-01.title: Chain 1/8: Call to Reserve
dlg-chain-rest-01.scene: 周五下午，你打电话预订今晚的餐厅座位。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 红叶餐厅，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Maple Leaf Restaurant. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我想订今晚七点半，两位。

turns.en: Name? Any seating preference?

turns.cn: 张伟，靠窗最好，有花生过敏。

turns.en: Noted. We'll hold it for fifteen minutes.

dlg-chain-rest-02.title: Chain 2/8: Arrive and Be Seated
dlg-chain-rest-02.scene: 七点二十五，你和朋友到了餐厅门口。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 晚上好，预订了七点半，张伟，两位。
欢迎光临，靠窗准备好了，请跟我来。
turns.en: Welcome. Your window table is ready. Right this way.
Of course. Your server will be right over.
They're on the table. Enjoy your meal.

dlg-chain-rest-03.title: Chain 3/8: Order Food
dlg-chain-rest-03.scene: 服务员来点餐，你和朋友各点一份。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 晚上好，准备好点餐了吗？
turns.en: Good evening. Ready to order?

turns.cn: 我要烤三文鱼，配菜换西兰花。

turns.en: Anything to drink?
Would you like the bread basket?

dlg-chain-rest-04.title: Chain 4/8: Confirm Allergy
dlg-chain-rest-04.scene: 你再次跟服务员确认花生过敏事项。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 提醒一下，我对花生严重过敏。
预订里看到了，厨房会分开处理。
turns.en: I see it on the reservation. The kitchen will handle it separately.

turns.cn: 三文鱼配柠檬黄油酱，安全的。
turns.en: The salmon comes with lemon butter. That's safe.

turns.cn: 我会在订单上特别标注。
turns.en: I'll flag it on the ticket.

dlg-chain-rest-05.title: Chain 5/8: Food Is Slow
dlg-chain-rest-05.scene: 等了二十五分钟主菜还没来，你礼貌询问。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 不好意思，我们的主菜大概还要多久？
厨房有点忙，大约五分钟。
turns.en: The kitchen's backed up. About five more minutes.
Right away. Sorry for the wait.

dlg-chain-rest-06.title: Chain 6/8: Wrong Side Dish
dlg-chain-rest-06.scene: 主菜来了，但你的配菜不是西兰花。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 抱歉，我点的是西兰花，不是薯条。

turns.en: My apologies. I'll swap it right away.

turns.cn: 三文鱼看起来很好，不用重做。

turns.en: Thank you. Two minutes.

dlg-chain-rest-07.title: Chain 7/8: Pay the Bill
dlg-chain-rest-07.scene: 用餐结束，你准备结账。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.cn: 一共六十八块，含小费吗？
turns.en: That's sixty-eight dollars. Is tip included?

turns.cn: 不含的话我付百分之十八小费。

turns.en: Tip isn't included. You can pay here.
Thank you for coming!

dlg-chain-rest-08.title: Chain 8/8: Leave a Review
dlg-chain-rest-08.scene: 走出餐厅，朋友问你今晚怎么样。（对话链：外出就餐）

turns.en: How was it? Would you come back?

turns.cn: 鱼不错，就是上菜慢了点。
我帮你在 Google 写个好评？
turns.en: Want me to leave a good Google review?

turns.cn: 行，记得提一下过敏处理得好。

turns.en: Try a new place next week?

dlg-rest-01.title: Ordering at a Restaurant
dlg-rest-01.scene: 你在一家美式餐厅用餐，服务员来点餐。

turns.en: Good evening! Welcome. How many in your party?

turns.cn: 两位，靠窗的位置可以吗？
当然，请跟我来。这是菜单。
turns.en: Of course. Right this way. Here are your menus.
Are you ready to order?

turns.cn: 我要牛排，五分熟，配薯条。

turns.en: And what would you like to drink?
Great. I'll put that order in right away.

dlg-rest-02.title: Food Allergy
dlg-rest-02.scene: 你对花生过敏，点餐时需要说明。

turns.cn: 请问，这道菜里有花生吗？

turns.en: Let me check that for you.
The dressing does contain peanuts.

turns.cn: 我对花生严重过敏，有别的推荐吗？
烤鸡配蔬菜不含坚果，很安全。
turns.en: The grilled chicken with vegetables is nut-free. It's a safe choice.

turns.cn: 我会在订单上注明过敏信息。
turns.en: I'll make a note about the allergy on your order.
That'll be forty-two fifty.
Sure. How would you like to split it?
Okay. Will that be card or cash?
Thank you for coming. Have a wonderful evening!
Hi, what can I get for you?

turns.cn: 一个巨无霸套餐，可乐换成雪碧。

turns.en: Large fries or medium?
For here or to go?
That'll be twelve forty. It'll be right out.

dlg-rest-05.title: Making a Reservation
dlg-rest-05.scene: 你打电话预订餐厅座位。

turns.cn: 您好，意大利餐厅，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Hello, Italian Bistro. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 我想订今晚七点的位子，四个人。

turns.en: May I have your name, please?

turns.cn: 我尽量安排，有特殊要求吗？
turns.en: I'll do my best. Any special requests?

turns.cn: 好的，今晚七点，四位，张先生。
turns.en: Perfect. Seven o'clock, party of four, Mr. Zhang.

dlg-rest-06.title: Wrong Order
dlg-rest-06.scene: 服务员端上的菜不是你点的，你需要礼貌说明。

turns.cn: 不好意思，这好像不是我点的。

turns.en: I'm so sorry. What did you order?

turns.cn: 我要的是烤鸡，不是这份鱼。

turns.en: I'll get that fixed right away. One moment, please.

turns.cn: 没关系，不过请确认一下没有花生。
会在厨房注明，送一杯饮料致歉。
turns.en: I'll note that in the kitchen. We'll bring a complimentary drink.

turns.cn: 要什么？今天特餐是韩式炸鸡卷。
turns.en: What'll it be? Today's special is Korean fried chicken tacos.
Any drinks? Homemade lemonade.
Nineteen bucks. Cash or Venmo only.
It's on the window sticker. Thanks!

dlg-rest-08.title: Sunday Brunch
dlg-rest-08.scene: 周日你和朋友去吃早午餐，要排队。

turns.en: Party of two? About a thirty-minute wait.

turns.cn: 吧台可以，好了短信通知您。
turns.en: The bar is open. We'll text you when ready.

turns.cn: 早午餐套餐含，单点另加。
turns.en: It's included in brunch combos, extra if ordered alone.
Ms. Zhang, your table is ready.

dlg-chain-salon-01.title: Chain 1/8: Walk-in Wait
dlg-chain-salon-01.scene: 你没预约直接走进理发店。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.en: Do you have an appointment?

turns.cn: 大概二十分钟，您先坐一下。
turns.en: About twenty minutes. Please have a seat.
May I have your phone number?

dlg-chain-salon-02.title: Chain 2/8: Describe Haircut
dlg-chain-salon-02.scene: 发型师开始给你剪头发。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.en: What would you like done today?

turns.cn: 稍微修短一点，两边推短。

turns.en: How long do you want the bangs?

turns.cn: 盖过眉毛就好，不要太短。

turns.en: Would you like a shampoo? It's five extra.

dlg-chain-salon-03.title: Chain 3/8: Check the Result
dlg-chain-salon-03.scene: 剪完发型师让你看镜子。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.en: How does that look?

turns.cn: 整体不错，右边还能再短一点吗？

turns.en: No problem. I'll fix that.
Want a little styling wax?

dlg-chain-salon-04.title: Chain 4/8: Ask About Color
dlg-chain-salon-04.scene: 你想下次染发，先咨询价格和流程。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 我想染成深棕色，自然一点。
您现在发色偏黑，可能需要漂浅。
turns.en: Your hair is quite dark now. We may need to lighten it first.

turns.cn: 会有损伤，做完护理会好一些。
turns.en: Some damage is possible, but a treatment helps.

turns.cn: 大概要多长时间？多少钱？
三小时，一百二十美元起。
turns.en: About three hours, starting at a hundred twenty dollars.

dlg-chain-salon-05.title: Chain 5/8: Nail Service
dlg-chain-salon-05.scene: 剪完发，你在店里顺便做指甲。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 您想做哪种？美甲还是光疗？
turns.en: What would you like? Regular polish or gel?

turns.cn: 需要修甲型吗？方形还是圆形？
turns.en: Would you like a shape? Square or round?

turns.cn: 光疗照灯后会保持两周。
turns.en: After curing, gel lasts about two weeks.

turns.cn: 卸的时候也是在这里吗？

dlg-chain-salon-06.title: Chain 6/8: Pay and Tip
dlg-chain-salon-06.scene: 服务结束，你到前台结账。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 剪发三十五，光疗四十五，一共八十。
turns.en: Thirty-five for the cut, forty-five for gel. Eighty total.
Yes. Enter amounts here.
Thank you. Book next time for less wait.

dlg-chain-salon-07.title: Chain 7/8: Wrong Cut Fix
dlg-chain-salon-07.scene: 回家发现刘海剪太短，你打电话店里。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 我是下午那位，刘海好像比说的短了。
非常抱歉，您方便明天来我帮您修？
turns.en: I'm sorry. Can you come in tomorrow? I'll fix it free.

turns.cn: 十二点可以，我留时间给您。
turns.en: Noon works. I'll reserve time for you.

dlg-chain-salon-08.title: Chain 8/8: Book Next Visit
dlg-chain-salon-08.scene: 修好后你预约下次剪发和染发。（对话链：理发美容）

turns.cn: 想约下个月染发加剪发，周六上午。
十点有位，大概三小时，要吗？
turns.en: Ten AM is open. About three hours total. Want it?

turns.cn: 要，还是找今天这位发型师。
记下了，提前一天可改期。
turns.en: Booked. You can reschedule up to one day before.
What would you like done today?

turns.cn: 稍微修短一点，两边推短。

turns.en: How long do you want the bangs?

turns.cn: 盖过眉毛就好，不要太短。

turns.en: Would you like a shampoo? It's five extra.
How does that look?

dlg-salon-02.title: Hair Color
dlg-salon-02.scene: 你想染发，和发型师沟通颜色。

turns.cn: 我想染成深棕色，自然一点。
您现在发色偏黑，可能需要漂浅。
turns.en: Your hair is quite dark now. We may need to lighten it first.

turns.cn: 会有损伤，做完护理会好一些。
turns.en: Some damage is possible, but a treatment helps.

turns.cn: 大概要多长时间？多少钱？
三小时，一百二十美元起。
turns.en: About three hours, starting at a hundred twenty dollars.

turns.cn: 您想做哪种？美甲还是光疗？
turns.en: What would you like? Regular polish or gel?

turns.cn: 需要修甲型吗？方形还是圆形？
turns.en: Would you like a shape? Square or round?

turns.cn: 光疗照灯后会保持两周。
turns.en: After curing, gel lasts about two weeks.

turns.cn: 卸的时候也是在这里吗？

turns.en: Yes. Removal is ten dollars.

dlg-salon-04.title: Walk-in Wait
dlg-salon-04.scene: 你没预约直接走进理发店。

turns.en: Do you have an appointment?

turns.cn: 大概二十分钟，您先坐一下。
turns.en: About twenty minutes. Please have a seat.
May I have your phone number?
Mr. Zhang, you're up next.
Eyebrows only or full face?
Close your eyes. It might sting a little.
All done. How do they look?

turns.cn: 水疗中心，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Spa desk. How may I help you?

turns.cn: 想预约周六下午的深度按摩。

turns.en: We have two or four o'clock open.

turns.cn: 请提前十分钟到，穿宽松衣服。
turns.en: Arrive ten minutes early in comfortable clothes.

turns.cn: 取消需提前二十四小时，否则收一半。
turns.en: Cancel twenty-four hours ahead or we charge half.

dlg-salon-07.title: Gel Nail Repair
dlg-salon-07.scene: 你做的光疗甲裂了，去店里修补。

turns.cn: 食指甲裂了，能补吗？上周刚做的。
可以补，单指五块，全手重做二十五。
turns.en: We can repair it. Five per nail, or twenty-five for a full redo.

turns.cn: 只补这一根，颜色还能对上吗？
我查记录，应该是这个粉。
turns.en: I'll check your file. Should be this pink.

turns.cn: 少抠东西，睡前涂指缘油。
turns.en: Don't pick at things. Use cuticle oil before bed.

dlg-school-01.title: First Day of Class
dlg-school-01.scene: 新学期第一天，老师自我介绍并点名。

turns.cn: 欢迎大家！请先自我介绍一下。
turns.en: Welcome, everyone! Please introduce yourselves.

turns.cn: 我叫张伟，来自北京，很高兴认识大家。
很好。课程大纲在网站上，请下载。
turns.en: Great. The syllabus is on the website. Please download it.
The campus bookstore or online.

turns.cn: 每周日晚上十一点前提交。
turns.en: Every Sunday by eleven PM.

dlg-school-02.title: Asking the Teacher
dlg-school-02.scene: 课后你留下来问老师问题。

turns.cn: 老师，我能问您一个问题吗？

turns.en: Of course. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 我不太理解今天讲的那个公式。

turns.en: Which part is unclear?

turns.cn: 我画个图给你解释，周三office hour也可以来。
turns.en: Let me draw it out for you. You can also come to office hours on Wednesday.

dlg-school-03.title: Group Project
dlg-school-03.scene: 你和同学讨论小组项目分工。

turns.cn: 我们得在周五前交报告。
turns.en: We need to turn in the report by Friday.

turns.cn: 我来负责写引言部分吧。
好，我做数据分析和图表。
turns.en: Sounds good. I'll do the data analysis and charts.

turns.cn: 周三晚上开个线上会议碰一下？

turns.en: Does eight o'clock work?

turns.cn: 可以，我把草稿先发群里。

turns.en: Perfect. Let's do this!

dlg-school-04.title: Library Study Room
dlg-school-04.scene: 你在图书馆前台预约小组研讨室。

turns.cn: 你好，我想预约一间研讨室。

turns.en: How many people, and for how long?

turns.cn: 四个人，两个小时，今天下午三点。

turns.en: Room 302 on the third floor is open. I'll need your student ID.
Drinks only, no takeout food.

dlg-school-05.title: Borrowing Notes
dlg-school-05.scene: 你生病缺课，向同学借笔记。

turns.cn: 昨天你没来上课吗？我缺了一节。

turns.en: I was there. The professor covered a new chapter.
Sure. I'll take photos and send them tonight.

turns.cn: 延到周五，多做两道练习题。
turns.en: It's due Friday now. Two extra practice problems.

dlg-school-06.title: Extension Request
dlg-school-06.scene: 你因故无法按时交作业，发邮件后当面跟老师说明。

turns.cn: 老师，关于论文延期的事，我想当面说一下。
请坐。邮件我看了，家里出事？
turns.en: Have a seat. I read your email. A family emergency?

turns.cn: 是的，我不得不回老家一周。
可以延一周，但不能再晚了。
turns.en: I can give you one more week, but no later than that.

turns.cn: 不用，按时发到系统里就行。
turns.en: No. Just upload it to the system on time.

dlg-2nd-01.title: Facebook Marketplace Meetup
dlg-2nd-01.scene: 你在网上买了二手书桌，和卖家约在停车场面交。

turns.cn: 嗨，你是买书桌的张伟吗？
turns.en: Hi, are you Zhang Wei buying the desk?

turns.cn: 当然，有一个抽屉拉不太顺。
turns.en: Sure. One drawer sticks a little.

turns.cn: 还行，八十块现金可以吗？

turns.en: I listed it at ninety. How about eighty-five?
I'll help you load it.

dlg-2nd-02.title: Item Not as Described
dlg-2nd-02.scene: 面交时发现商品和描述不符，你和卖家交涉。

turns.cn: 你说几乎全新，但屏幕有很大划痕。

turns.en: I didn't notice in the photos. Sorry.

turns.cn: 五十块吧，不然我不买了。

turns.en: Sixty is my minimum. It's already a steal.
Fine.

turns.cn: 谢谢，以后描述写清楚些。

dlg-2nd-03.title: Safety When Meeting
dlg-2nd-03.scene: 你卖手机，和买家约在警察局门口交易。

turns.cn: 约在这安全吗？我头一次面交。
turns.en: Is it safe to meet here? It's my first time.

turns.cn: 警察局门口最安全，白天人多。

turns.en: Can you turn it on so I can check it?

turns.cn: 当然，账号已退出，外观视频里都有。

turns.en: Okay. Three hundred cash.
Thank you!

dlg-2nd-04.title: Posting an Item Online
dlg-2nd-04.scene: 你帮朋友写英文卖二手自行车的帖子。

turns.en: What should the title say?
What goes in the description?

turns.cn: 尺寸、去年买的、可试骑、现金面交。

turns.en: Where should we meet?

turns.cn: 家门口超市停车场，白天。

turns.en: Okay, it's posted.

dlg-2nd-05.title: Shipping Instead of Meetup
dlg-2nd-05.scene: 买家在外地，你协商邮寄二手相机。

turns.en: Can you ship it? I'm in another state.

turns.cn: 可以，运费你出，大概十五块。

turns.en: Can you video the packing?

turns.cn: 可以，付款后当天寄，给追踪号。

turns.en: PayPal friends and family okay?
Got it. I'll pay now.

dlg-chain-svc-01.title: Chain 1/8: Dry Cleaning Drop-off
dlg-chain-svc-01.scene: 你把西装送去干洗店。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Hi, what can we clean for you today?

turns.cn: 这套西装，下周三前要取。
袖口有个污渍，我们会重点处理。
turns.en: There's a stain on the cuff. We'll treat that.

turns.cn: 十二块九，加急另收五块。
turns.en: Twelve ninety. Rush is five extra.
Here's your ticket. Bring it when you pick up.

dlg-chain-svc-02.title: Chain 2/8: Dentist Checkup
dlg-chain-svc-02.scene: 你定期去牙医那里洗牙。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Any bleeding when you brush lately?

turns.cn: 偶尔有一点，右边磨牙敏感。
我看看……牙龈有点发炎，今天先洗牙。
turns.en: Let me take a look. Your gums are a bit inflamed. We'll clean them today.

turns.cn: 洗牙不用，如果补牙再说。
turns.en: Not for cleaning. We'll see if you need one for a filling.

dlg-chain-svc-03.title: Chain 3/8: Schedule Filling
dlg-chain-svc-03.scene: 牙医建议你补牙，前台帮你约时间。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.cn: 医生建议补右上磨牙，要约吗？
turns.en: The doctor recommends a filling on your upper right molar. Book it?

turns.cn: 周二下午三点或周四上午十点。
turns.en: Tuesday at three PM or Thursday at ten AM.

turns.cn: 大部分覆盖，自付大概五十。
turns.en: Mostly covered. Copay is about fifty.

dlg-chain-svc-04.title: Chain 4/8: DMV Renewal
dlg-chain-svc-04.scene: 你去车管所换驾照。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Hi, what brings you in today?
Please fill out this form and take the vision test.
No, just pass the vision screening.

turns.cn: 两周左右，这期间用纸质的临时证。
turns.en: About two weeks. Use this paper temp license until then.

dlg-chain-svc-05.title: Chain 5/8: Shoe Repair
dlg-chain-svc-05.scene: 你去修鞋店换鞋底。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.cn: 这双皮鞋鞋底磨平了，能换吗？
可以，橡胶底四十五，皮底六十。
turns.en: Yes. Rubber soles are forty-five, leather sixty.
Three days. Pick up Thursday.

dlg-chain-svc-06.title: Chain 6/8: Pick Up Dry Cleaning
dlg-chain-svc-06.scene: 周三你去取干洗的西装。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Pickup? May I see your ticket?

turns.cn: 在这，袖口污渍去掉了吗？

turns.en: We got it out. Please check the fit.
Twelve ninety. Thank you.

dlg-chain-svc-07.title: Chain 7/8: Key Copy
dlg-chain-svc-07.scene: 你顺路在五金店配一把备用钥匙。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: Sure. Standard keys are three dollars.
Five minutes. One moment.

dlg-chain-svc-08.title: Chain 8/8: Errands Done
dlg-chain-svc-08.scene: 你办完一堆事回家，跟室友汇报。（对话链：生活服务）

turns.en: You were out forever. Get everything done?

turns.cn: 干洗取了，牙约了，驾照续了，鞋送去修。

turns.en: Productive day. I'll make dinner.
Remember shoes on Thursday.
Hi, what can we clean for you today?

turns.cn: 这套西装，下周三前要取。
袖口有个污渍，我们会重点处理。
turns.en: There's a stain on the cuff. We'll treat that.

turns.cn: 十二块九，加急另收五块。
turns.en: Twelve ninety. Rush is five extra.
Here's your ticket. Bring it when you pick up.

dlg-svc-02.title: At the Dentist
dlg-svc-02.scene: 你定期去牙医那里洗牙。

turns.en: Any bleeding when you brush lately?

turns.cn: 偶尔有一点，右边磨牙敏感。
我看看……牙龈有点发炎，今天先洗牙。
turns.en: Let me take a look. Your gums are a bit inflamed. We'll clean them today.

turns.cn: 洗牙不用，如果补牙再说。
turns.en: Not for cleaning. We'll see if you need one for a filling.
Just relax. This won't take long.
Hi, what brings you in today?
Please fill out this form and take the vision test.
No, just pass the vision screening.

turns.cn: 两周左右，这期间用纸质的临时证。
turns.en: About two weeks. Use this paper temp license until then.

dlg-svc-04.title: Weather Small Talk
dlg-svc-04.scene: 你在公交站和人闲聊天气。

turns.en: It's really pouring out there!

turns.cn: 是啊，我没带伞，要淋湿了。

turns.en: They said it'll clear up this afternoon.

turns.cn: 希望如此，我待会还要出门。
便利店有伞卖，几块钱一把。
turns.en: The convenience store sells umbrellas for a few bucks.
Bye. Watch your step!
Has distance vision been blurry lately?
Cover your left eye and read this line.

turns.cn: 轻度近视，镜片加防蓝光吗？
turns.en: Mild myopia. Want blue-light filtering lenses?
One week. You can pick frames now.

dlg-svc-06.title: Tax Preparation
dlg-svc-06.scene: 你去找会计师帮忙报税。

turns.en: Please bring your W-2 and any 1099 forms.

turns.cn: 都在这里，去年有房租收入。

turns.en: Do you have mortgage interest statements?

turns.cn: 大概能退一千二，一周出结果。
turns.en: You'll likely get about twelve hundred back. Results in a week.
A hundred fifty for this level of complexity.

dlg-svc-07.title: Dental Filling
dlg-svc-07.scene: 牙医发现蛀牙，你要做补牙。

turns.cn: 左下大牙有个小洞，建议今天补。
turns.en: There's a small cavity on your lower left molar. I'd fill it today.

turns.cn: 会打局部麻药，保险通常报八成。
turns.en: We'll numb the area. Insurance usually covers eighty percent.

turns.cn: 后牙用复合树脂，颜色和牙接近。
turns.en: Composite resin for back teeth. It matches your tooth color.

turns.cn: 张嘴，麻药起效后告诉我。
turns.en: Open wide. Let me know when the numbness kicks in.

dlg-svc-08.title: DMV Counter Documents
dlg-svc-08.scene: 你在 DMV 窗口办驾照，职员语速快。

turns.en: Passport, two proofs of address, and your I-ninety-four.

turns.cn: 水电账单可以吗？再说一遍地址证明要什么？
三个月内的账单或租约，要有名字地址。
turns.en: Bills or lease from the last three months with your name and address.

turns.cn: 视力检测通过去拍照，三十三块。
turns.en: Pass vision, then photos. Thirty-three dollars.
Two weeks. Use the paper temp until then.

dlg-svc-09.title: Phone Store New Line
dlg-svc-09.scene: 你刚到美国，在手机店办号码和套餐。

turns.cn: 预付费还是合约？无限流量五十起。
turns.en: Prepaid or contract? Unlimited starts at fifty.

turns.cn: 预付费，一个月，能保留旧号码吗？

turns.en: Yes, porting. Bring your old account number and PIN.
SIM's free. We'll activate today.
App or cash in store.

dlg-svc-10.title: Social Security Office
dlg-svc-10.scene: 你去社安局办公室申请 SSN。

turns.en: Do you have an appointment? Passport and I-twenty or work visa.

turns.cn: 填这份表，英文地址别漏公寓号。
turns.en: Fill this form. Don't skip your apartment number.
About two weeks by mail. No expedite.
Employers use the receipt letter. Ask your HR.

dlg-svc-11.title: Library Card Application
dlg-svc-11.scene: 你在公共图书馆办借书证。

turns.cn: 住本县吗？带照片ID和地址证明。
turns.en: Do you live in this county? Photo ID and proof of address.
Yes. Fill out the form. It's free.

turns.cn: 纸质二十本，电子书用Libby App。
turns.en: Twenty print items. E-books through the Libby app.

turns.cn: 每天二十五美分，上限十块。
turns.en: Twenty-five cents a day, ten-dollar cap.

dlg-svc-12.title: Street Parking Permit
dlg-svc-12.scene: 你在市政府办街区停车证。

turns.cn: 居民许可一年六十，要车辆登记和地址证明。
turns.en: Resident permit sixty a year. Vehicle registration and proof of address.

turns.cn: 租房没有车位，这条街能停吗？
有许可可以，注意清扫日。
turns.en: With a permit yes. Watch street cleaning days.

turns.cn: 每月第二个周二早八到十。
turns.en: Second Tuesday monthly, eight to ten AM.
Driver's side inside.

dlg-shop-01.title: At the Clothing Store
dlg-shop-01.scene: 你在商场里想买一件新衬衫。

turns.en: Hi! Can I help you?
What size do you wear?
Yes, we do. The fitting room is over there.
It's forty-nine ninety, tax included.

dlg-shop-02.title: Returning an Item
dlg-shop-02.scene: 你买了一条裤子，尺码不对，去柜台退货。

turns.en: Is there a problem with them?
Sure, I can process a refund for you.

turns.cn: 您是用卡还是现金付的？
turns.en: Did you pay with a card or cash?

turns.cn: 退款三到五个工作日到账。
turns.en: The refund will go back to your card in three to five business days.

dlg-shop-03.title: At the Supermarket
dlg-shop-03.scene: 你在超市找东西，向店员问路。

turns.cn: 乳制品区在后面，左边第三个过道。
turns.en: The dairy section is in the back, third aisle on the left.

turns.cn: 谢谢！顺便问一下，今天鸡蛋有折扣吗？
有的，本周特价两美元一打。
turns.en: Yes, they're two dollars a dozen this week.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.cn: 欢迎光临！需要什么帮助？
turns.en: Welcome! How can I help you?

turns.cn: 我想买一双跑步鞋，十码。
这款很受欢迎，您要试穿吗？
turns.en: This model is very popular. Would you like to try them on?

turns.cn: 我给您拿大半码的试试。
turns.en: Let me get you a half size larger.

turns.cn: 这双舒服多了，就这双吧。

turns.en: Great. I'll ring them up for you.

dlg-shop-05.title: Black Friday Sale
dlg-shop-05.scene: 黑色星期五，你在商场抢购打折商品。

turns.cn: 原价一百二，现在四十 off，七十二块。
turns.en: It was one twenty, now forty percent off, so seventy-two.

turns.cn: 太划算了！有大一号的吗？

turns.en: Let me check in the back. One moment, please.
Yes, this is the last one we have.

turns.cn: 那我马上买，别被别人抢走了。
明智之选！请到这边结账。
turns.en: Smart choice! Checkout is right over here.

dlg-shop-06.title: Exchange Size
dlg-shop-06.scene: 你买的裤子尺码不对，去柜台换货。

turns.cn: 你好，这条裤子太小了，能换大一号吗？

turns.en: May I see the receipt and the tags?

turns.cn: 三十二码还有货，我去拿。
turns.en: We still have size thirty-two in stock. I'll grab a pair.
No, it's the same style and price.

dlg-shop-07.title: Self Checkout
dlg-shop-07.scene: 你在超市使用自助结账机遇到问题。

turns.cn: 不好意思，机器说商品无法识别。
我帮您扫，是农产品对吧？
turns.en: I'll scan it for you. It's produce, right?
Fixed. Go ahead and scan the rest.

turns.cn: 这台只刷卡，现金请去人工通道。
turns.en: This kiosk is card only. Use a staffed lane for cash.

dlg-chain-soc-01.title: Chain 1/8: Birthday Invitation
dlg-chain-soc-01.scene: 朋友邀请你参加周六生日派对。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 周六晚上我家生日派对，你能来吗？
turns.en: Birthday party at my place Saturday night. Can you come?

turns.cn: 七点，随便穿，带肚子来就行。
turns.en: Seven PM. Casual dress. Just bring your appetite.
Just yourself. Wine is welcome if you like.

dlg-chain-soc-02.title: Chain 2/8: Buy a Gift
dlg-chain-soc-02.scene: 你周末前去商场挑生日礼物。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 想给朋友买生日礼物，三十左右。
男士女士？喜欢实用还是有趣？
turns.en: For a man or woman? Practical or fun?

turns.cn: 这款手冲套装不错，二十八块。
turns.en: This pour-over set is nice, twenty-eight.
Sure, free of charge.

dlg-chain-soc-03.title: Chain 3/8: Arrive at Party
dlg-chain-soc-03.scene: 你参加朋友的生日派对。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: You made it! Thanks for coming!

turns.cn: 生日快乐！这是给你的礼物。
你太客气了，随便坐，有吃的在那边。
turns.en: You're too kind. Make yourself at home. Food's over there.

turns.cn: 不用，一会儿切蛋糕，大概八点。
turns.en: We're good. Cake's around eight.

dlg-chain-soc-04.title: Chain 4/8: Meet New People
dlg-chain-soc-04.scene: 派对上朋友给你介绍新朋友。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 嗨，我是 Lisa，寿星的同学。
turns.en: Hi, I'm Lisa. I went to school with the birthday boy.
What do you do?

turns.cn: 设计师，也许以后能合作。
turns.en: Designer. Maybe we can collaborate sometime.

dlg-chain-soc-05.title: Chain 5/8: Sing Happy Birthday
dlg-chain-soc-05.scene: 八点大家唱生日歌、切蛋糕。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: Thanks everyone for coming. I'm thirty!
Done. Come get some cake.
I'll save you a slice to go.

dlg-chain-soc-06.title: Chain 6/8: Sunday BBQ Invite
dlg-chain-soc-06.scene: 派对上另一个朋友邀请你周日烧烤。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.en: BBQ in my backyard tomorrow. Coming?
Two PM. Come hungry.
Perfect. I'll text you the address.

dlg-chain-soc-07.title: Chain 7/8: Backyard BBQ
dlg-chain-soc-07.scene: 周日下午你在朋友家后院烧烤。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 肉还要烤十分钟，先喝点？
turns.en: Meat needs ten more minutes. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 来杯啤酒，谢谢。需要我翻肉吗？
帮我把那盘香肠拿过来就行。
turns.en: Just grab that tray of sausages.
Secret recipe. I'll teach you sometime.

turns.cn: 好，我带点甜点下次带过来。

dlg-chain-soc-08.title: Chain 8/8: Say Goodbye
dlg-chain-soc-08.scene: 烧烤结束，你和主人家道别。（对话链：社交聚会）

turns.cn: 客气，下次带你家那位来。
turns.en: Anytime. Bring your partner next time.
Drive safe. See you around.

dlg-soc-01.title: Birthday Party
dlg-soc-01.scene: 你参加朋友的生日派对。

turns.en: You made it! Thanks for coming!

turns.cn: 生日快乐！这是给你的礼物。
你太客气了，随便坐，有吃的在那边。
turns.en: You're too kind. Make yourself at home. Food's over there.

turns.cn: 不用，一会儿切蛋糕，大概八点。
turns.en: We're good. Cake's around eight.
Yeah. So glad you could make it.

dlg-soc-02.title: BBQ at Home
dlg-soc-02.scene: 你在朋友家后院烧烤聚会。

turns.cn: 肉还要烤十分钟，先喝点？
turns.en: Meat needs ten more minutes. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 来杯啤酒，谢谢。需要我翻肉吗？
帮我把那盘香肠拿过来就行。
turns.en: Just grab that tray of sausages.
Secret recipe. I'll teach you sometime.

turns.cn: 好，我带点甜点下次带过来。

turns.en: Perfect!

dlg-soc-03.title: Wedding Invitation
dlg-soc-03.scene: 朋友邀请你参加婚礼，你确认出席。

turns.cn: 我们要结婚了！六月十五号，你能来吗？
turns.en: We're getting married! June fifteenth. Can you come?

turns.cn: 恭喜！我一定到，需要带伴吗？
可以带一位，请月底前回复。
turns.en: One guest is fine. Please RSVP by the end of the month.

turns.cn: 半正式，户外仪式，穿舒服的鞋。
turns.en: Semi-formal. It's outdoors, so comfortable shoes.

turns.cn: 网站链接在请柬里，人来就是最好的礼物。
turns.en: Link's on the invite, but your presence means the most.

dlg-soc-04.title: Declining an Invitation
dlg-soc-04.scene: 朋友邀请你周末聚会，你有事去不了。

turns.en: Want to come over for dinner Saturday?

turns.cn: 谢谢邀请，那天我要回老家。

turns.en: No worries. Let's plan another time.

turns.cn: 下周怎么样？我请你吃饭。

turns.en: Wednesday evening works.
Looking forward to it!

dlg-soc-05.title: Meeting Someone New
dlg-soc-05.scene: 朋友在聚会上介绍你认识新朋友。

turns.cn: 嗨，听说你也是做软件的？
turns.en: Hi, I heard you work in software too?
I'm in product at a startup.

turns.cn: 挺忙的最近吧？行业都这样。
是啊，不过挺有成就感。住这附近吗？
turns.en: Yeah, but it's rewarding. Do you live around here?

turns.cn: 三个街区，常来这家酒吧。

turns.en: Let's grab a drink sometime!

dlg-chain-sport-01.title: Chain 1/8: Join a Basketball Game
dlg-chain-sport-01.scene: 你想加入陌生人的半场篮球。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.cn: 嘿，要打一局吗？我们缺一个人。
turns.en: Hey, want to run a game? We need one more.
Eleven, win by two.

turns.cn: 你打什么位置？我打后卫。

turns.en: I'm center. Come on, you check up.

dlg-chain-sport-02.title: Chain 2/8: Swim at the Pool
dlg-chain-sport-02.scene: 你去社区游泳池游泳。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.en: Please shower before getting in the pool.

turns.cn: 慢速靠右，中间中速，左边快游。
turns.en: Slow on the right, medium in the center, fast on the left.

turns.cn: 二十五美分押金，前台能换。
turns.en: A quarter deposit. We can make change at the desk.

turns.cn: 晚上九点，八点四十五停止入场。
turns.en: Nine PM. Last entry at eight forty-five.

dlg-chain-sport-03.title: Chain 3/8: Book Tennis Court
dlg-chain-sport-03.scene: 你打电话预订网球场。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.cn: 市立体育馆，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: City rec center. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想订明天下午四点的网球场。
二号场空着，一小时十五块。
turns.en: Court two is open. Fifteen dollars per hour.
Five dollars a pair. Balls sold separately.

dlg-chain-sport-04.title: Chain 4/8: Play Tennis
dlg-chain-sport-04.scene: 你和朋友在网球场打球。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.en: You serve, I'll receive.
Deal. Loser buys water.
Was that ball out?

dlg-chain-sport-05.title: Chain 5/8: Rent Bikes
dlg-chain-sport-05.scene: 打完球你去湖边租自行车骑行。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.cn: 想租两辆自行车，两小时。
十五块一小时一辆，头盔免费。
turns.en: Fifteen an hour each. Helmets are free.
Yes, five extra.

turns.cn: 往北十英里平路，风景好。
turns.en: North ten miles, flat and scenic.

dlg-chain-sport-06.title: Chain 6/8: Bike Trouble
dlg-chain-sport-06.scene: 骑行中轮胎没气，你向路人求助。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.cn: 不好意思，有打气筒吗？胎瘪了。

turns.en: I do. I'll help you inflate it.

turns.cn: 可能是扎了，能撑回租车点吗？

turns.en: Go slow. Two miles to the shop.

dlg-chain-sport-07.title: Chain 7/8: Return Bikes
dlg-chain-sport-07.scene: 你回到租车点还车说明情况。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.cn: 这辆胎扎了，另一辆没事。
补胎十块，正常租金照算。
turns.en: Patch is ten dollars. Regular rental still applies.
How was the ride?

dlg-chain-sport-08.title: Chain 8/8: After Workout Meal
dlg-chain-sport-08.scene: 运动一天后，你和球友去吃健康餐。（对话链：运动）

chain.title: A Day of Sports and Exercise

turns.cn: 今天运动量够大，吃什么？
turns.en: Big day. What are we eating?

turns.cn: 沙拉加鸡胸肉吧，我请客。

turns.en: Same time Saturday?
See you next week.

dlg-sport-01.title: Basketball Court
dlg-sport-01.scene: 你想加入陌生人的半场篮球。

turns.cn: 嘿，要打一局吗？我们缺一个人。
turns.en: Hey, want to run a game? We need one more.
Eleven, win by two.

turns.cn: 你打什么位置？我打后卫。

turns.en: I'm center. Come on, you check up.

turns.cn: 没问题，每周六上午我们都来。
turns.en: No problem. We're here every Saturday morning.
Please shower before getting in the pool.

turns.cn: 慢速靠右，中间中速，左边快游。
turns.en: Slow on the right, medium in the center, fast on the left.

turns.cn: 二十五美分押金，前台能换。
turns.en: A quarter deposit. We can make change at the desk.

turns.cn: 晚上九点，八点四十五停止入场。
turns.en: Nine PM. Last entry at eight forty-five.

turns.cn: 市立体育馆，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: City rec center. How can I help?

turns.cn: 想订明天下午四点的网球场。
二号场空着，一小时十五块。
turns.en: Court two is open. Fifteen dollars per hour.
Five dollars a pair. Balls sold separately.

turns.cn: 确认短信已发，提前十分钟到前台。
turns.en: Confirmation text sent. Check in at the desk ten minutes early.

dlg-sport-04.title: Ski Lesson
dlg-sport-04.scene: 你在滑雪场报名参加初学者课程。

turns.en: Is this your first time skiing?

turns.cn: 没关系，先学刹车和摔倒姿势。
turns.en: No worries. We'll start with stopping and how to fall safely.

turns.cn: 脚趾刚好碰到前端就行，我帮您调。
turns.en: Your toes should just touch the front. Let me adjust them.
Take your time. Safety first.

dlg-sport-05.title: Joining a Gym Class
dlg-sport-05.scene: 你想报名健身房的瑜伽团课。

turns.en: Is this your first yoga class?

turns.cn: 可以租，一块五。请穿舒服的衣服。
turns.en: You can rent one for a dollar fifty. Wear comfortable clothes.
Beginner level. Rest whenever you need to.
Don't push too hard. Breathing is what matters.

dlg-sport-06.title: Beach Day
dlg-sport-06.scene: 你在海滩租遮阳伞和躺椅。

turns.cn: 租伞和椅子，一天二十五。
turns.en: Umbrella and chairs, twenty-five for the day.

turns.cn: 涨潮会淹，建议中间区域。
turns.en: The tide comes in. I'd pick a spot in the middle.
Down the boardwalk. Showers are a dollar.
Enjoy the sun!

dlg-sport-07.title: Pickup Soccer
dlg-sport-07.scene: 你在公园看到野球足球，想加入。

turns.cn: 缺一个，我们踢小场，十一对十一。
turns.en: We need one. Small-sided, eleven on eleven.
An hour. It's sunny, bring a hat.
Cool. Here's a green bib.

dlg-sport-08.title: Running Club
dlg-sport-08.scene: 你参加社区跑步俱乐部第一次集合。

turns.cn: 新人？今天五公里，配速十分每英里。
turns.en: First time? Five K today, ten-minute miles.

turns.cn: 我可能慢一点，能跟十英里组吗？

turns.en: Sure. I'll sweep in the back.
One small hill. Loop around the lake.
Only for night runs. Not today.

dlg-sport-09.title: Open Gym Volleyball
dlg-sport-09.scene: 你去体育馆开放排球时间。

turns.cn: 七到九点，中级水平，现场组队。
turns.en: Seven to nine PM. Intermediate level. Teams form on site.
Yes. They usually balance teams.
Five for residents, eight for non-residents.

dlg-sport-10.title: Rock Climbing Gym
dlg-sport-10.scene: 你第一次去室内攀岩馆。

turns.cn: 第一次要上课才能爬，一小时三十。
turns.en: First visit requires an intro class. Sixty minutes, thirty bucks.
Yes, and we provide the harness.

turns.cn: 自动保护器区不用，教练会教。
turns.en: Not for auto-belay walls. The instructor will show you.

turns.cn: 两点开始，请提前十分钟。
turns.en: Starts at two PM. Arrive ten minutes early.

dlg-sport-11.title: Track Lane Rules
dlg-sport-11.scene: 你在高中操场跑步，不确定跑道规则。

turns.cn: 最外道慢跑，内线给快的。
turns.en: Outermost lane for slow pace. Inside lanes for faster.
Counterclockwise. Standard here.
Four laps on this track.

dlg-sport-12.title: HIIT Class
dlg-sport-12.scene: 你参加健身房 HIIT 团课，教练喊口令很快。

turns.cn: 二十秒波比跳，十秒休息，Go！
turns.en: Twenty seconds burpees, ten off. Go!

turns.cn: 对不起，下一个动作是什么？

turns.en: High knees! Knees to hip level!
Yes. Just keep moving.
Last round. Push it!

turns.cn: 订一小时壁球场，今晚六点。
三号场空，护目镜必须戴。
turns.en: Court three is open. Goggles are required.
Five each at the front desk.
Doubles or singles both work.

dlg-sport-14.title: Stretching After Run
dlg-sport-14.scene: 跑完步，跑友教你拉伸小腿。

turns.cn: 跑完别立刻坐，先走两分钟。
turns.en: Don't sit right away. Walk two minutes first.

turns.cn: 扶墙，后腿伸直，脚跟贴地。
turns.en: Hands on the wall, back leg straight, heel down.
Thirty seconds each side, twice.
Hydrate. You might be sore tomorrow.

dlg-sport-15.title: Youth Soccer Signup
dlg-sport-15.scene: 你在社区中心给孩子报青少年足球。

turns.cn: U8组周六上午，一季一百二。
turns.en: Under-eight division, Saturday mornings, a hundred twenty a season.
Required. No metal cleats.

turns.cn: 持证志愿者，每周六练一小时。
turns.en: Certified volunteers. One hour each Saturday.
Welcome to the league!

dlg-sport-16.title: Swimming Laps Etiquette
dlg-sport-16.scene: 泳池人多，你不确定怎么跟游分道。

turns.en: Sure. We circle swim. Stay to the right.

turns.cn: 中间别撞，轻触脚表示让一下。
turns.en: Pass in the middle. A light tap on the foot asks them to let you by.
Twenty-five.

dlg-sport-17.title: Badminton Open Play
dlg-sport-17.scene: 你去体育馆打羽毛球开放场。

turns.cn: 你们还缺人吗？水平一般。

turns.en: We need one for doubles until nine.
Split four ways. Four bucks each.
Switch when feathers fly off.

dlg-sport-18.title: Table Tennis
dlg-sport-18.scene: 社区中心乒乓球台要排队，你问规则。

turns.cn: 白板写名字，赢家留台最多两局。
turns.en: Sign the board. Winners stay two games max.
Two dollars a pair. Ten deposit.

turns.cn: 人少时可以，人多请轮流。
turns.en: When it's quiet, yes. Rotate when it's busy.

dlg-sport-19.title: Physical Therapy
dlg-sport-19.scene: 你膝盖运动后疼，去看物理治疗师。

turns.cn: 哪里疼？什么时候开始的？
turns.en: Where does it hurt? When did it start?

turns.cn: 跑步后膝盖外侧，两周了。
可能是IT band，先停跑，做这些拉伸。
turns.en: Could be your IT band. Stop running for now. Do these stretches.
Light weight only. Stop if it hurts.

turns.cn: 两周，每天在家练习十五分钟。
turns.en: Two weeks. Fifteen minutes of homework daily.

dlg-sport-20.title: Pickleball Beginners
dlg-sport-20.scene: 朋友教你打匹克球，场地规则你不太懂。

turns.en: No smashing in the kitchen. Remember?
Right. Soft shots only within seven feet.
Yes, diagonally.

turns.cn: 比分怎么喊？我老听不清。
三个数：我方、对方、第几发球。
turns.en: Three numbers: us, them, which server.

dlg-sport-21.title: Lap Swim Class
dlg-sport-21.scene: 你报名游泳班提高自由泳，教练语速快。

turns.cn: 下一组四趟，呼吸三划一换。
turns.en: Next set, four lengths, breathe every three strokes.
Pick one side. Don't switch.
We have them. Kick first, then pull.

dlg-sport-22.title: Fitness Tracker
dlg-sport-22.scene: 朋友帮你设置运动手环记录跑步。

turns.en: Pick Outdoor Run and turn on GPS.
Green is aerobic. Don't stay in red too long.
Bluetooth syncs automatically.

dlg-sport-23.title: Basketball Foul Call
dlg-sport-23.scene: 半场篮球你犯规了，用英语道歉沟通。

turns.en: You're good. Let's keep playing.
A little sore. I can keep going.
Cool. Check it up.

dlg-stor-01.title: Renting a Storage Unit
dlg-stor-01.scene: 你搬家过渡期，去迷你仓公司租单元。

turns.cn: 要多大？五乘五还是五乘十？
turns.en: What size? Five by five or five by ten?

turns.cn: 五乘十，放家具和三十箱。

turns.en: A hundred twenty a month. Half off the first month.

turns.cn: 恒温仓加三十，门禁早六晚十。
turns.en: Climate control is thirty extra. Gate is six AM to ten PM.
We recommend it. Fifteen a month.

dlg-stor-02.title: Accessing Your Unit
dlg-stor-02.scene: 你去储物间取冬天衣物，门禁出问题。

turns.cn: 门禁码刷不开，账号是张伟。
月租昨天到期，更新付款就恢复。
turns.en: Rent was due yesterday. It'll work once payment clears.
Yes. You'll get a new code by text after.

turns.cn: 报单元号，我派人换灯泡。
turns.en: Give me your unit number. I'll send someone to change the bulb.

dlg-stor-03.title: Moving Out of Storage
dlg-stor-03.scene: 你搬完家，去迷你仓办退租。

turns.cn: 清空了吗？钥匙和挂锁请归还。
turns.en: Is it empty? Return the key and padlock.

turns.cn: 我检查一下，没有损坏就退押金。
turns.en: I'll inspect it. Deposit returns if there's no damage.

turns.cn: 七到十个工作日原路退。
turns.en: Seven to ten business days to your card.

dlg-stor-04.title: Buying Packing Supplies
dlg-stor-04.scene: 你在仓储公司买纸箱和气泡膜。

turns.cn: 中号箱一块五，大号两块。
turns.en: Medium boxes a dollar fifty, large ones two.

turns.cn: 要十五个中号、五个大号，加胶带。
易碎品建议加气泡膜，十二块一卷。
turns.en: For fragile stuff, grab bubble wrap. Twelve a roll.
Yes. Queen size is eight bucks.

turns.cn: 车在门口，能帮忙装车吗？

turns.en: Sure. Carts are by the entrance.

dlg-stor-05.title: Auction on Abandoned Unit
dlg-stor-05.scene: 你对迷你仓弃置单元拍卖感兴趣，咨询规则。

turns.cn: 上午十点，现金或借记卡，整单元出价。
turns.en: Ten AM. Cash or debit. You bid on the whole unit.

turns.cn: 只能门口看，不能翻，买下才开门。
turns.en: From the doorway only. No digging. Winner gets access.

turns.cn: 四十八小时，逾期每天罚五十。
turns.en: Forty-eight hours. Fifty a day after that.

dlg-tech-01.title: Phone Screen Repair
dlg-tech-01.scene: 你手机屏幕碎了，去维修店。

turns.cn: 什么机型？只是外屏还是内屏也坏了？
turns.en: What model? Outer glass only or the display too?

turns.cn: iPhone 14，触摸正常，就是玻璃裂了。
换外屏九十九，一小时好。
turns.en: Ninety-nine for the glass. About an hour.
No, but I'd back up first anyway.
Ninety days on defects.

dlg-tech-02.title: Laptop Running Slow
dlg-tech-02.scene: 你的笔记本电脑很慢，去店里检查。

turns.en: What's the issue?

turns.cn: 开机要五分钟，程序经常卡死。

turns.en: Your drive is almost full. I'd upgrade to an SSD.

turns.cn: 五百一十二G加安装一百四，当天取。
turns.en: A five-twelve gig SSD plus labor, one forty, same-day pickup.
That's included in the labor.

dlg-tech-03.title: Apple Store Genius Bar
dlg-tech-03.scene: 你在 Apple Store 预约天才吧维修。

turns.cn: 您好，预约的张伟？设备什么问题？
turns.en: Hi, Zhang Wei with an appointment? What's wrong with the device?

turns.cn: MacBook 电池只能撑两小时了。
我跑个诊断……循环次数偏高，建议换电池。
turns.en: Let me run diagnostics. Cycle count is high. Battery replacement is recommended.

turns.cn: 保修过了，换电池一百九十九。
turns.en: Warranty expired. Battery service is one ninety-nine.

turns.cn: 两到三小时，建议先备份。
turns.en: Two to three hours. Please back up first.

dlg-tech-04.title: Setting Up Wi-Fi
dlg-tech-04.scene: 你买了新路由器，请店员帮忙说明安装。

turns.cn: 这款支持Wi-Fi 6，覆盖两千平方英尺。
turns.en: This one is Wi-Fi six, covers about two thousand square feet.

turns.cn: 网线接光猫，App按步骤就行。
turns.en: Ethernet from the modem, then follow the app steps.
Yes, enter it during setup.
Fifteen days if unopened.

dlg-tech-05.title: Data Recovery
dlg-tech-05.scene: 你的硬盘坏了，咨询数据恢复。

turns.en: What symptoms? Does the computer see the drive?

turns.cn: 不认，里面有工作照片和文档。
先检测，免费，恢复另收费。
turns.en: We'll diagnose it free. Recovery is extra.

turns.cn: 简单逻辑故障三百起，物理损坏更贵。
turns.en: Simple logical issues start at three hundred. Physical damage costs more.

turns.cn: 检测完才能评估，三天出报告。
turns.en: We can tell you after the exam. Report in three days.

dlg-chain-trans-01.title: Chain 1/8: Buy a Metro Card
dlg-chain-trans-01.scene: 你第一次去纽约坐地铁，在窗口买 MetroCard。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 你好，我想买一张地铁卡。
充多少？单次 ride 两点七五。
turns.en: How much do you want to load? Each ride is two seventy-five.
Card or cash is fine.

turns.cn: 坐 N 线或 R 线，往北方向。
turns.en: Take the N or R train heading uptown.

dlg-chain-trans-02.title: Chain 2/8: Ask for Directions
dlg-chain-trans-02.scene: 你进了地铁站，不确定往哪边走。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，去时代广场的 N 线在哪边？

turns.en: Go downstairs and turn left. Follow the signs.

turns.cn: 谢谢，这是往曼哈顿方向吗？

turns.en: Yes. Don't go the wrong way.

dlg-chain-trans-03.title: Chain 3/8: On the Train
dlg-chain-trans-03.scene: 地铁上广播太快，你没听清，问旁边的人。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 下一站四十二街，可以换乘。
turns.en: Next stop Forty-Second Street. You can transfer there.

turns.cn: 我要去时代广场，这站下吗？
再一站，时代广场是下一站。
turns.en: One more stop. Times Square is next.

dlg-chain-trans-04.title: Chain 4/8: Missed Your Stop
dlg-chain-trans-04.scene: 你不小心坐过了站，向工作人员求助。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.en: Which stop were you supposed to get off at?

turns.cn: 下一站下车，走对面站台坐回去。
turns.en: Get off at the next stop and cross to the opposite platform.

turns.cn: 不用，两小时内换乘免费。
turns.en: No, transfers are free within two hours.

dlg-chain-trans-05.title: Chain 5/8: Transfer to Bus
dlg-chain-trans-05.scene: 出了地铁站，你要转公交去博物馆。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 这辆车到大都会博物馆吗？
对，请刷卡或投币两块二五。
turns.en: Yes. Please tap your card or pay two twenty-five.

turns.cn: 请在第五大道让我下车。

turns.en: Sure. I'll call it out when we get there.
About twenty minutes, depending on traffic.

dlg-chain-trans-06.title: Chain 6/8: Forgot to Tap
dlg-chain-trans-06.scene: 下车时你发现忘了刷卡，问司机怎么办。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 现在刷也行，或者下次补。
turns.en: You can tap now, or make it up next time.
All set. Remember next time.

dlg-chain-trans-07.title: Chain 7/8: Last Stop Directions
dlg-chain-trans-07.scene: 公交到站，你问路人博物馆入口在哪。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，大都会博物馆入口怎么走？
往前两个路口，大台阶那边。
turns.en: Two blocks ahead, by the big steps.
Five minutes. You can't miss it.

dlg-chain-trans-08.title: Chain 8/8: Check Card Balance
dlg-chain-trans-08.scene: 回家路上，你在地铁站查 MetroCard 余额。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 能帮我查一下卡里还剩多少吗？
插进去……还剩六块五，够两次。
turns.en: Insert it. Six fifty left. Enough for two rides.
The machines reload too. No line needed.

dlg-trans-01.title: Buying a Metro Card
dlg-trans-01.scene: 你第一次在纽约坐地铁，买MetroCard。

turns.cn: 你好，我想买一张地铁卡。

turns.en: How much do you want to load? Each ride is two seventy-five.
Card or cash is fine.
Take the N or R train heading uptown.

dlg-trans-02.title: On the Bus
dlg-trans-02.scene: 你在公交站等车，向司机问路。

turns.cn: 对，请刷卡或投币两块二五。
turns.en: Yes. Please tap your card or pay two twenty-five.

turns.cn: 请在第五大道让我下车。

turns.en: Sure. I'll call it out when we get there.
About twenty minutes, depending on traffic.

dlg-trans-03.title: Missed Your Stop
dlg-trans-03.scene: 你不小心坐过了站，向工作人员求助。

turns.en: Which stop were you supposed to get off at?

turns.cn: 下一站下车，走对面站台坐回去。
turns.en: Get off at the next stop and cross to the opposite platform.

turns.cn: 不用，两小时内换乘免费。
turns.en: No, transfers are free within two hours.

dlg-trans-04.title: Rideshare
dlg-trans-04.scene: 你用App叫了网约车，上车和司机确认。

turns.en: Are you Zhang Wei?

turns.cn: 大概十五分钟，系好安全带。
turns.en: About fifteen minutes. Please buckle up.
Sure. Would you like some music?

turns.cn: 不用了，谢谢。到了麻烦告诉我。

turns.en: We're here. Have a great day!

dlg-trans-05.title: Train Delay
dlg-trans-05.scene: 地铁站广播列车晚点，你向工作人员询问换乘。

turns.en: The N train is running about twenty minutes late.

turns.cn: 我有换乘，会错过连接车吗？
您可以改坐R线，在42街换乘。
turns.en: You can take the R train and transfer at Forty-Second Street.

turns.cn: 不用，同一张卡两小时内免费换乘。
turns.en: No. Transfers are free within two hours on the same card.

turns.cn: 对面站台，往北方向，请看指示牌。
turns.en: The opposite platform, heading uptown. Follow the signs.

dlg-trans-06.title: Which Bus to Downtown
dlg-trans-06.scene: 你在公交站不确定坐哪辆车。

turns.en: Fourteen or thirty-eight. Check the direction on the sign.
Fourteen is direct. Thirty-eight transfers.
Clipper card. Tap when you board.

dlg-trans-07.title: Card Declined at Turnstile
dlg-trans-07.scene: 地铁闸机刷卡失败，你向工作人员求助。

turns.cn: 余额可能不够，最低两块五。
turns.en: Balance might be low. Minimum two fifty to enter.

turns.cn: 那台灰色，现金或信用卡。
turns.en: Gray one over there. Cash or credit.
Yes. Try this gate again after.

dlg-trans-08.title: Missed Your Stop
dlg-trans-08.scene: 你没听清报站坐过了，问司机怎么办。

turns.cn: 不好意思，我该在Market街下，坐过了吗？
刚过一站，下一站下车往回走。
turns.en: One stop back. Get off next and walk back.
Five minutes, or catch the thirty-eight the other way.
Free transfer within two hours.

dlg-trans-09.title: Reading the Subway Map
dlg-trans-09.scene: 你在地铁站研究路线图，向路人求助。

turns.cn: 去机场要转几次？我看不懂颜色线。

turns.en: Yellow north first, then blue at Embarcadero.
Right. Don't board wrong way. Look for uptown.
About forty minutes.

dlg-trans-10.title: Bus Is Full
dlg-trans-10.scene: 早高峰公交满了，你问司机还能上吗。

turns.en: You can stand by the door. Hold the rail.
I'll call it out. Watch the screen too.

turns.cn: 下一站是哪里？没听清广播。

turns.en: Sixteenth Street. Mission is two stops after.

dlg-trans-11.title: Train Platform Direction
dlg-trans-11.scene: 你不确定等的车是否方向正确。

turns.en: Opposite platform. This side goes to San Jose.

turns.cn: 工作日十二点十五，周末早一点。
turns.en: Twelve fifteen weekdays. Earlier on weekends.

turns.cn: 非高峰可以，看车厢贴纸。
turns.en: Off-peak yes. Check the car stickers.

dlg-chain-travel-01.title: Chain 1/8: Book the Hotel
dlg-chain-travel-01.scene: 你计划去纽约玩，打电话确认酒店预订。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.en: Hello, Manhattan Hotel front desk.

turns.cn: 我订了下周三大床房，张伟，住三晚。
找到了，含早餐，下午三点入住。
turns.en: Found it. Breakfast included. Check-in is three PM.
Yes, from ten AM.

dlg-chain-travel-02.title: Chain 2/8: Hotel Check-in
dlg-chain-travel-02.scene: 你到达酒店前台办理入住。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.cn: 您好，欢迎入住！请问有预订吗？
turns.en: Hello, welcome! Do you have a reservation?
I found it. One king room for three nights.

turns.cn: 是的，早上六点半到十点半。
turns.en: Yes, it's served from 6:30 to 10:30 AM.
Your room is on the eighth floor, room 808.

turns.cn: 在房卡套上，祝您住得愉快！
turns.en: It's on the key card sleeve. Enjoy your stay!

dlg-chain-travel-03.title: Chain 3/8: Tourist Information
dlg-chain-travel-03.scene: 你在旅游咨询中心询问景点信息。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.cn: 你好，这附近有什么值得看的景点？
自由女神像和中央公园都很受欢迎。
turns.en: The Statue of Liberty and Central Park are very popular.

turns.cn: 可以坐地铁到南街海港，然后坐船。
turns.en: Take the subway to South Street Seaport, then catch a ferry.

turns.cn: 建议提前在网上订，周末人很多。
turns.en: I'd recommend booking online. Weekends get very crowded.

dlg-chain-travel-04.title: Chain 4/8: Take a Taxi
dlg-chain-travel-04.scene: 你在路边拦出租车去码头。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.cn: 你好，去南街海港码头，走高速可以吗？

turns.en: Sure. It should take about twenty minutes.
No problem. Traffic looks good right now.
Of course.

dlg-chain-travel-05.title: Chain 5/8: Ask for a Photo
dlg-chain-travel-05.scene: 你在自由女神像前，请路人帮忙拍照。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.cn: 打扰一下，能帮我们拍张照吗？

turns.en: Sure. Portrait or landscape?

turns.cn: 竖拍，把雕像拍进去就行。

turns.en: Done. How does it look?

turns.cn: 很好，谢谢！我帮你也拍一张？

turns.en: Yes, please. Thank you!

dlg-chain-travel-06.title: Chain 6/8: Buy Souvenirs
dlg-chain-travel-06.scene: 你在景点小店买纪念品。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.cn: 看看纪念品吧，都是本地手工的。
turns.en: Check out our souvenirs. They're all locally made.
Five dollars, or three for twelve.

turns.cn: 那我买三个吧，可以刷卡吗？

turns.en: Yes, but there's a ten-dollar minimum for cards.

turns.cn: 没问题，再加一张明信片。

dlg-chain-travel-07.title: Chain 7/8: Room Problem
dlg-chain-travel-07.scene: 晚上回酒店，发现隔壁太吵。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.cn: 隔壁房间太吵了，能换房吗？
抱歉，我查一下空房……八零五可以吗？
turns.en: Sorry about that. Let me check. Would 805 work?

turns.cn: 八零二在走廊尽头，现在帮您换。
turns.en: 802 is at the end of the hall. I'll move you now.

dlg-chain-travel-08.title: Chain 8/8: Check Out
dlg-chain-travel-08.scene: 最后一天，你在前台退房去机场。（对话链：城市旅游）

chain.title: A City Trip from Arrival to Departure

turns.en: Checking out? Key cards, please.

turns.cn: 808，迷你吧没动，能存行李到下午吗？

turns.en: Yes, complimentary storage until four PM.

turns.cn: 谢谢光临，祝您一路平安。
turns.en: Thank you for staying. Have a safe trip.

dlg-chain-trip-01.title: Chain 1/8: Plan the Trip
dlg-chain-trip-01.scene: 你和朋友们商量周末自驾游。（对话链：旅游）

turns.en: Beach or mountains?

turns.cn: 山里吧，秋天看枫叶，开车三小时。

turns.en: Cabin or camping?

turns.cn: 好，我负责订房，你规划路线。
turns.en: Deal. I'll book lodging. You plan the route.

dlg-chain-trip-02.title: Chain 2/8: Rent a Car
dlg-chain-trip-02.scene: 你在租车公司取车。（对话链：旅游）

turns.cn: 预订了 SUV 对吧？驾照和信用卡。
turns.en: Reserved an SUV? License and credit card, please.

turns.cn: 含基础险，全险每天多十五。
turns.en: Basic is included. Full coverage is fifteen extra per day.
Yes. Otherwise we charge per gallon.

turns.cn: 车在外场 B 区 12 号，钥匙在这。
turns.en: Car is in lot B, space twelve. Keys are here.

dlg-chain-trip-03.title: Chain 3/8: Gas Stop
dlg-chain-trip-03.scene: 高速公路上你们停车加油。（对话链：旅游）

turns.cn: 油剩四分之一了，下一个出口加吧。
turns.en: A quarter tank left. Let's fill up at the next exit.

turns.cn: 好，我下去加，你要咖啡吗？

turns.en: Large iced Americano, please.

turns.cn: 洗手间在哪问一下店员。
后面左转，快点天要黑了。
turns.en: Left in the back. Hurry, it's getting dark.

dlg-chain-trip-04.title: Chain 4/8: Scenic Stop
dlg-chain-trip-04.scene: 你们在观景台停车拍照。（对话链：旅游）

turns.cn: 这角度好看，能帮我拍张照吗？
turns.en: Great angle here. Could you take a photo for me?
Phone is fine. Portrait mode.

turns.cn: 完美，谢谢！你们也是来赏枫的？
turns.en: Perfect, thanks! You here for the foliage too?

dlg-chain-trip-05.title: Chain 5/8: Check In at Cabin
dlg-chain-trip-05.scene: 傍晚你们到达民宿办理入住。（对话链：旅游）

turns.cn: 欢迎！预订两晚对吧？钥匙在盒子里。
turns.en: Welcome! Two nights, right? Keys are in the lockbox.

turns.cn: 墙上温控器，设六十八华氏度。
turns.en: Thermostat on the wall. Set it to sixty-eight.

turns.cn: 开车五分钟，地图发你手机了。
turns.en: Five minutes by car. I texted you the map.

dlg-chain-trip-06.title: Chain 6/8: Local Restaurant
dlg-chain-trip-06.scene: 晚上你们在镇上小馆吃饭。（对话链：旅游）

turns.cn: 今晚特供是炖牛肉，要试试吗？
turns.en: Tonight's special is beef stew. Want to try it?

turns.cn: 听起来不错，来两份，再加沙拉。

turns.en: Anything to drink?

turns.cn: 一壶热茶，本地啤酒有吗？

turns.en: Yes, brewed nearby. Very popular.

dlg-chain-trip-07.title: Chain 7/8: Hiking Trail
dlg-chain-trip-07.scene: 周日早上你们向游客中心问路线。（对话链：旅游）

turns.cn: 有半天能走完的步道吗？
瀑布线四英里，中等难度。
turns.en: Falls Trail, four miles, moderate.
Recommended. A few steep sections.

turns.cn: 给，下午四点前下山，天黑快。
turns.en: Here you go. Be back before four PM. Gets dark early.

dlg-chain-trip-08.title: Chain 8/8: Drive Home
dlg-chain-trip-08.scene: 周日下午你们还车踏上归途。（对话链：旅游）

turns.en: Return went smoothly?

turns.cn: 顺利，加满油了，没额外费用。

turns.en: Where next? The beach?

turns.cn: 夏天吧，这次山里太棒了。
同意，到家约饭复盘照片。
turns.en: Agreed. Dinner and photo review when we're home.

dlg-travel-01.title: Hotel Check-in
dlg-travel-01.scene: 你到达酒店前台办理入住。

turns.cn: 您好，欢迎入住！请问有预订吗？
turns.en: Hello, welcome! Do you have a reservation?
I found it. One king room for three nights.

turns.cn: 是的，早上六点半到十点半。
turns.en: Yes, it's served from 6:30 to 10:30 AM.
Your room is on the eighth floor, room 808.

turns.cn: 在房卡套上，祝您住得愉快！
turns.en: It's on the key card sleeve. Enjoy your stay!

dlg-travel-02.title: Asking for Tourist Info
dlg-travel-02.scene: 你在旅游咨询中心询问景点信息。

turns.cn: 你好，这附近有什么值得看的景点？
自由女神像和中央公园都很受欢迎。
turns.en: The Statue of Liberty and Central Park are very popular.

turns.cn: 可以坐地铁到南街海港，然后坐船。
turns.en: Take the subway to South Street Seaport, then catch a ferry.

turns.cn: 建议提前在网上订，周末人很多。
turns.en: I'd recommend booking online. Weekends get very crowded.

dlg-travel-03.title: Taking a Taxi
dlg-travel-03.scene: 你在路边拦出租车去机场。

turns.cn: 你好，去肯尼迪机场，走高速可以吗？

turns.en: Sure. It should take about forty minutes.

turns.cn: 我十一点半的飞机，来得及吗？

turns.en: No problem. Traffic looks good right now.

turns.cn: 到了能在航站楼门口停吗？

turns.en: Of course. Which terminal?
Here we are. Have a safe flight!

dlg-travel-04.title: Buying Souvenirs
dlg-travel-04.scene: 你在旅游景点的小店买纪念品。

turns.cn: 看看纪念品吧，都是本地手工的。
turns.en: Check out our souvenirs. They're all locally made.
Five dollars, or three for twelve.

turns.cn: 那我买三个吧，可以刷卡吗？

turns.en: Yes, but there's a ten-dollar minimum for cards.

turns.cn: 没问题，再加一张明信片。

turns.en: Thank you! Enjoy the rest of your trip!

dlg-travel-05.title: Taking Photos
dlg-travel-05.scene: 你在著名景点，想请路人帮忙拍照。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，能帮我们拍张照吗？

turns.en: Sure! Go ahead and pose.

turns.cn: 请把后面的雕像也拍进去。

turns.en: Done. Want to take a look?

turns.cn: 太好了！你也需要我们帮你拍吗？

turns.en: Yes, please. Thank you!

dlg-travel-06.title: Currency Exchange
dlg-travel-06.scene: 你到达国外后在机场兑换当地货币。

turns.en: Hello. Do you need to exchange currency?

turns.cn: 我想把五百美元换成欧元。
今日汇率是一点零五，含手续费。
turns.en: Today's rate is one point zero five, including the service fee.

turns.cn: 五十美元起，请出示护照。
turns.en: Fifty dollars minimum. I'll need your passport.
Sure. Please count the cash to confirm.

dlg-travel-07.title: Hotel Checkout
dlg-travel-07.scene: 你准备离开酒店办理退房。

turns.en: Did you use the minibar?

turns.cn: 账单一共三百二，含税费。
turns.en: Your total is three twenty, taxes included.
Sure. I'll email it to you.
Would you like us to call a cab to the airport?

dlg-travel-08.title: Tour Group
dlg-travel-08.scene: 你参加一日游，导游集合讲解。

turns.cn: 各位早上好！八点大巴出发，请准时。
turns.en: Good morning, everyone! The bus leaves at eight. Please be on time.

turns.cn: 包含简餐，有特殊饮食请告诉我。
turns.en: A light lunch is included. Tell me about any dietary needs.

turns.cn: 记下了，餐厅会准备鸡肉。
turns.en: Noted. The restaurant will prepare chicken instead.

turns.cn: 景点两小时，三点大巴回。
turns.en: Two hours at the site. Bus back at three.

dlg-travel-09.title: Cruise Embarkation
dlg-travel-09.scene: 你在港口办理邮轮登船手续。

turns.cn: 护照和预订确认函请出示。
turns.en: Passport and booking confirmation, please.

turns.cn: 在这里，行李需要贴标签吗？
标签在这，晚上送到舱房。
turns.en: Tags are here. Bags arrive at your cabin tonight.

turns.cn: 下午两点后，现在可以先去自助餐。
turns.en: After two PM. You can hit the buffet now.

turns.cn: 船上商店有，医务室也可咨询。
turns.en: The onboard shop has some. The medical center can help too.

dlg-travel-10.title: Road Trip Rest Stop
dlg-travel-10.scene: 你自驾公路旅行，在休息站停一下。

turns.cn: 大概三小时，这段路风景不错。
turns.en: About three hours. This stretch is pretty scenic.

turns.cn: 五十英里外有个小镇，价格会贵一点。
turns.en: There's a town in fifty miles. Gas costs a bit more there.
Drive safe. Don't push it if you're tired.

dlg-travel-11.title: Returning Rental Car
dlg-travel-11.scene: 你还租车，工作人员检查车况。

turns.cn: 还车吗？里程和油量我记一下。
turns.en: Returning the car? I'll note mileage and fuel.

turns.cn: 油箱满了，里程比取车时多四百。
车门有个小划痕，您知道吗？
turns.en: There's a small scratch on the door. Were you aware?

turns.cn: 取车时就有，单子上写过。
对，看到了，不会额外收费。
turns.en: Right, I see it. No extra charge.

turns.cn: 三到五个工作日到卡上。
turns.en: Three to five business days back to your card.

dlg-travel-12.title: Lost Luggage
dlg-travel-12.scene: 你到达后行李没出来，去柜台查询。

turns.cn: 我的行李箱没出来，航班UA88。
行李牌还在吗？请描述箱子。
turns.en: Do you still have the baggage tag? Describe the bag.

turns.cn: 黑色二十四寸，红色丝带。
可能在芝加哥中转延误，今晚或明早到。
turns.en: It may have been delayed in Chicago. Tonight or tomorrow morning.

turns.cn: 可以，填地址，临时用品可报销一部分。
turns.en: Yes. Fill in the address. We'll reimburse some essentials.

dlg-vote-01.title: Registering to Vote
dlg-vote-01.scene: 你在 DMV 顺便办理选民登记。

turns.en: Would you like to register to vote today?

turns.cn: 是的，我是美国公民，刚搬来本州。
请填这张表，选政党或无党派。
turns.en: Fill out this form. Pick a party or no party.

turns.cn: 可以，但初选可能有限制。
turns.en: Yes, but some primaries may be limited.

turns.cn: 选前会寄选民手册和地点。
turns.en: You'll get a voter guide and location before the election.

dlg-vote-02.title: At the Polling Place
dlg-vote-02.scene: 选举日你去投票站投票。

turns.en: Hello. May I see your ID?
Sign here and take this card.

turns.cn: 帘子后面，工作人员会演示。
turns.en: Behind the booths. A worker will show you.
Yes, until you press confirm.

dlg-vote-03.title: Mail-in Ballot
dlg-vote-03.scene: 你选择邮寄投票，向工作人员咨询流程。

turns.en: Are you registered at an address in this county?

turns.cn: 选票会寄到家，填完要证人签名。
turns.en: It'll be mailed to you. You need a witness signature.

turns.cn: 选举日当天前邮戳有效，也可投箱。
turns.en: Postmarked by election day, or use a drop box.

dlg-vote-04.title: Asking About a Ballot Issue
dlg-vote-04.scene: 你对选票上的地方提案不清楚，向朋友请教。

turns.cn: 对，房产税加一点，建两所新校。
turns.en: Yes. A small property tax bump for two new schools.

turns.cn: 反对的人说财政不透明。
选民手册两边论点都有，值得读。
turns.en: The voter guide has both sides. Worth reading.
That's fine. Look into it before you vote.

dlg-chain-wh-01.title: Chain 1/8: Sign Up for Membership
dlg-chain-wh-01.scene: 你第一次去 Costco，在入口办会员。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Do you have a membership card?

turns.cn: 普通会员六十一年，高级一百二含返现。
turns.en: Standard is sixty a year. Executive is a hundred twenty with cashback.

turns.cn: 普通版就行，今天能用吗？

turns.en: Yes, as soon as you pay.

turns.cn: 可以，但结账要用您的卡。
turns.en: Yes, but checkout must be on your card.

dlg-chain-wh-02.title: Chain 2/8: Get a Cart
dlg-chain-wh-02.scene: 你进去发现需要大推车，问员工在哪。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 大推车在哪？入口好像没了。
刚用完，等两分钟推一批来。
turns.en: They just ran out. Another batch in two minutes.
By the appliances section inside.

dlg-chain-wh-03.title: Chain 3/8: Food Samples
dlg-chain-wh-03.scene: 你在仓储超市试吃样品。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Want to try our new energy bars?
Yes, almonds. Here's the ingredient list.

turns.cn: 理解，那边有无坚果的饼干试吃。
turns.en: Got it. There are nut-free cookies sampling over there.

dlg-chain-wh-04.title: Chain 4/8: Bulk Household Items
dlg-chain-wh-04.scene: 你在买大包装日用品，向员工问路。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 日用品区，过道十二尽头。
turns.en: Household aisle twelve, at the back.

turns.cn: 三十卷装减五块，本周有效。
turns.en: The thirty-roll pack is five off this week.

turns.cn: 好，推车放不下了怎么办？
可以开双车，或结账后放车里再逛。
turns.en: You can take two carts, or check out and keep shopping.

dlg-chain-wh-05.title: Chain 5/8: Electronics Section
dlg-chain-wh-05.scene: 你看中一台电视，问保修政策。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 厂家一年，店里延保另买。
turns.en: One year from the maker. Store extended warranty costs extra.
Fifty extra for two-person carry upstairs.

dlg-chain-wh-06.title: Chain 6/8: Checkout Line
dlg-chain-wh-06.scene: 结账队伍很长，你和旁边顾客聊天。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Busy weekend. Do you come here often?

turns.cn: 和家庭分着买划算，别一个人囤。
turns.en: Split with family. Don't stockpile alone.

turns.cn: 有道理，我可能就买太多了。

turns.en: As long as it fits in the freezer.

dlg-chain-wh-07.title: Chain 7/8: Gas Station
dlg-chain-wh-07.scene: 你在 Costco 加油站加油。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 这队挺长的，但比外面便宜不少。
turns.en: Long line, but it's way cheaper than outside.

turns.cn: 是啊，必须刷会员卡对吧？

turns.en: Right. Swipe first, then pump.

turns.cn: 加满，这边每加仑能省二三十美分。
turns.en: I fill up. You save twenty or thirty cents a gallon here.

dlg-chain-wh-08.title: Chain 8/8: Load the Car
dlg-chain-wh-08.scene: 你把大包装商品装进后备箱，室友来帮忙。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 买这么多，冰箱塞得下吗？
turns.en: That's a lot. Will the fridge fit it all?

turns.cn: 厕纸放储物间，吃的分你一半。
行，下次带我，我也想办会员。
turns.en: Deal. Take me next time. I want a membership too.
Perfect.

dlg-wh-01.title: Costco Membership
dlg-wh-01.scene: 你第一次去 Costco，在入口办会员。

turns.en: Do you have a membership card?

turns.cn: 普通会员六十一年，高级一百二含返现。
turns.en: Standard is sixty a year. Executive is a hundred twenty with cashback.

turns.cn: 普通版就行，今天能用吗？

turns.en: Yes, as soon as you pay.

turns.cn: 可以，但结账要用您的卡。
turns.en: Yes, but checkout must be on your card.

dlg-wh-02.title: Sampling Food
dlg-wh-02.scene: 你在仓储超市试吃样品并购买。

turns.en: Want to try our new energy bars?
Yes, almonds. Here's the ingredient list.

turns.cn: 理解，那边有无坚果的饼干试吃。
turns.en: Got it. There are nut-free cookies sampling over there.

dlg-wh-03.title: Bulk Shopping
dlg-wh-03.scene: 你在买大包装日用品，向员工问路。

turns.cn: 日用品区，过道十二尽头。
turns.en: Household aisle twelve, at the back.

turns.cn: 三十卷装减五块，本周有效。
turns.en: The thirty-roll pack is five off this week.

turns.cn: 好，推车放不下了怎么办？
可以开双车，或结账后放车里再逛。
turns.en: You can take two carts, or check out and keep shopping.

dlg-wh-04.title: Gas Station at Costco
dlg-wh-04.scene: 你在 Costco 加油站加油，排队较长。

turns.cn: 这队挺长的，但比外面便宜不少。
turns.en: Long line, but it's way cheaper than outside.

turns.cn: 是啊，必须刷会员卡对吧？

turns.en: Right. Swipe first, then pump.

turns.cn: 加满，这边每加仑能省二三十美分。
turns.en: I fill up. You save twenty or thirty cents a gallon here.

dlg-wh-05.title: Return at Warehouse
dlg-wh-05.scene: 你在 Costco 退一个用了一周的电器。

turns.en: What are you returning? Membership card?

turns.cn: 这个搅拌机噪音太大，有收据。

turns.en: Our policy allows it. Full refund.
Yes, in three to five business days.

dlg-wed-01.title: At the Ceremony
dlg-wed-01.scene: 你作为宾客参加户外婚礼仪式。

turns.cn: 欢迎！请柬在吗？新娘还是新郎那边？
turns.en: Welcome! May I see your invitation? Bride or groom's side?

turns.cn: 在这，我是新郎的大学同学。
请坐右边第三排，仪式马上开始。
turns.en: Right side, third row. Ceremony starts shortly.

turns.cn: 仪式中请收起手机，之后随意。
turns.en: Please put phones away during vows. After that, go ahead.

turns.cn: 十分钟后转室内宴会厅。
turns.en: We move to the ballroom in ten minutes if needed.

dlg-wed-02.title: Reception Seating
dlg-wed-02.scene: 婚宴开始，你在签到台找座位。

turns.en: Your name? I'll find your table.

turns.cn: 七号桌，靠舞池。胸花请别在胸前。
turns.en: Table seven by the dance floor. Please pin on your boutonniere.

turns.cn: 有的，上菜时跟服务员说。
turns.en: Yes. Tell the server when they take orders.
The gift table by the entrance.

dlg-wed-03.title: Wedding Toast
dlg-wed-03.scene: 朋友请你帮忙在婚宴上简短祝酒。

turns.cn: 愿意祝酒吗？一两分钟就行。
turns.en: Would you give a toast? Just a minute or two.

turns.cn: 可以，我说中英混合行吗？
当然，新人会喜欢。九点切蛋糕前。
turns.en: Of course. They'd love it. Right before cake at nine.

turns.cn: 需要提前把稿子给你看吗？
不用，轻松幽默就好，别太长。
turns.en: No need. Keep it light and short.

turns.cn: 好，我准备了几个大学趣事。

turns.en: You're the best!

dlg-wed-04.title: Wedding Dance Floor
dlg-wed-04.scene: 婚宴上有人邀请你跳舞。

turns.cn: 来跳一支？新娘马上要抛花球了。
turns.en: Care for a dance? Bouquet toss is coming up.

turns.cn: 我不太会跳，慢舞可以吗？

turns.en: Sure. This one's perfect.
The bride is my cousin. You?

turns.cn: 新郎同事，一起做过项目。

turns.en: Lovely wedding, isn't it?

dlg-wed-05.title: Leaving the Reception
dlg-wed-05.scene: 婚宴结束，你跟新人告别。

turns.cn: 今晚太棒了，祝你们幸福！
谢谢赶来！礼物我们很喜欢。
turns.en: Thanks for coming! We love the gift.

turns.cn: 蜜月去哪？什么时候出发？

turns.en: Hawaii next week for five days.

turns.cn: 不用，酒店有车，再次感谢！
turns.en: We're good. The hotel has a shuttle. Thanks again!
